# Following Up
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends, Did you read yesterday’s email from Matt, our campaign manager? **He shared with you that we’re closing the gap on our mid-month fundraising goal, and we’ve got just a few more days to raise $57,000 before our deadline.** While other campaigns are funded by the typical special interests, we’re counting on the financial support of patriotic Americans like you who believe that We the People should still be in charge. [**So, I’ve got to ask: what can you contribute TODAY to get us across that finish line? Can you make a donation of ANY SIZE - $50, $25, or even just $10! – to help us spread our America First message throughout the country?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=24fb376ff1&e=0be619cbaa) It doesn’t matter how much the GOP Establishment try to silence our campaign with their silly games. It won’t work. We’ve got the backing of a growing number of Americans sick and tired of the status quo, where career politicians won’t do what it takes to get our country back on track. Bottom line: I’m the only candidate with the courage and independence to get things done for our great country. But I can’t do it alone. We’ve running a lean campaign with dedicated staff who are fighting every day for the cause. Still, I need the prayers, votes, and generosity of folks just like you who are ready to join me in standing up to take this country back. [**Please, won’t you help us by donating to our campaign TODAY? Your donation of ANY AMOUNT brings us one step closer to crushing this pivotal mid-month goal.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=7b754f36e5&e=0be619cbaa) Thank you,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: On This Shabbat We Pray for Peace in Israel
body:
We PRAY that peace, stability, and justice will ultimately prevail, just as GOD would have it. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---

**On This Shabbat We Pray for Peace in Israel**
After reflection on the atrocities which have occurred in Israel, one should naturally experience immense empathy for the devastated individuals, families, a nd nation as a whole. It’s painful to see the carnage humans reason their way to inflicting on each other.
MIGOP condemns the war crime level atrocities Hamas perpetrated in Israel, especially against civilians, and will do so wherever such sociopathic behavior occurs throughout the world.
We pray that while Israelis experience immense suffering words can't describe, they exercise restraint by not engaging in like-for-like retaliatory actions that would kill innocent civilians, and instead, surgically pursue justice against the mass-murdering perpetrators.
We must pray for the victims and for peace in the Middle East.
We also must pray for the people in the Gaza Strip. Often time innocent people, many of them children are victimized after being indirectly associated with perpetrators who have engaged in psychopathic behavior.
We PRAY that peace, stability and justice will ultimately prevail, just as GOD would have it.
Min haShamayim Tenuhamu “May you be consoled from Heaven.”

### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.
| [DONATE NOW](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=ddf6db2ac7&e=a2af77507c)

clean_body: This is the last time we’ll email you about our mid-month deadline. | | | | | ---|--- This is the last email we’ll send you about our mid-month deadline. Thanks to the unwavering support of grassroots supporters like you over these last few days, we were able to close in on our fundraising gap, bringing us to 81% of our mid-month goal. But here’s the thing: There are FOUR HOURS left before our mid-month deadline. We still need to raise $40,000 if we want to hit our goal. And as the fight for battleground Virginia intensifies, we need the strength of dedicated Democrats in your community to help steer our party toward victory. Thousands of Democrats have joined our movement to defeat extreme Republicans. This is the energy we need to propel Democrats forward: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Let's be clear: failing to meet tonight's goal could give extreme Republicans an edge as we head into November. With seven high-stakes special elections and every seat on the ballot in Virginia next month, hitting our target is an absolute must. If Republicans win, so does their hateful, racist, and xenophobic far-right agenda. Donations from supporters like you allow us to build winning campaigns, strengthen our on-the-ground efforts, and mobilize voters. But, our strategy to defeat the right-wing agenda hinges on your commitment. We’ve witnessed the incredible achievements we can accomplish when we unite behind a common cause, and with you by our side, there's no challenge we can't overcome. subject: Madera Board of Supervisors Chair David Rogers Endorses John Duarte
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Duarte For Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0cb1728d2fc7/john-duarte-launches-campaign-for-13th-congressional-district-9585421?e=76a47b375f)
---
| |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
October 13, 2023
Contact: Duane Dichiara
Phone: (916) 997-4784
---
| **Madera County Board of Supervisors Chairman David Rogers Endorses Congressman John Duarte **
---
| | **Modesto, CA –** Today, John Duarte, Representative for California Congressional District 13, announced the endorsement of Madera County Board of Supervisors Chairman David Rogers. Rogers’ endorsement adds to the growing list of local support Duarte’s re-election campaign has received, highlighting Duarte’s commitment to serving Valley residents.

David Rogers, a respected leader in Madera County, has served the community as a City Councilman, Mayor pro tem, Mayor, and Supervisor. His endorsement of John Duarte underscores John’s leadership and his commitment to putting the needs of Valley families first in Washington.

Grateful for David Rogers’ endorsement, John Duarte stated, “I am thankful to receive the endorsement of Chairman David Rogers. David’s decades of service to our community, his commitment to our veterans, and his extensive experience in public office make his support especially meaningful. I look forward to working closely with David and continuing our efforts to improve the lives of Valley families.”

John Duarte remains focused on lowering the cost of living and making prices more affordable, working towards a brighter future for Central Valley residents. With the endorsement of David Rogers, Duarte’s campaign continues to gain momentum, and he looks forward to earning the support of more local leaders districtwide.

Please visit [www.johnduarteforcongress.com](https://johnduarteforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d614871a572868b235b65477d&id=bbd1fced51&e=76a47b375f) for more information about the campaign. ###

Hey,

Last week, we sent you our urgent petition asking you to agree with Jamie Raskin after he called the impeachment inquiry into President Biden an ‘impeachment hearing about nothing’.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t sign.** Without your signature, we’re still [5] signatures short of our vital signature goal.

So we’re giving you a second chance to add your signature now. Andrew

Listen, even Republicans’ own witnesses admitted there’s no evidence that President Biden committed a crime! **WOW!**
**IF** we expose the sham impeachment inquiry for what it is – _a partisan witch hunt with no basis in reality_ – then we can stop it in its tracks!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Noah?=
subject: Did You Catch David on AVL?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo]( "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo")
body:
Support Israel | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7323f982b7bd/did-you-catch-david-on-avl?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=f4e89e7084&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Hey Peter,

Hope you're holding up well. I've got a couple of things to share that I believe you'll find compelling.

First off, David Flippo, our very own Lt. Colonel, [had an insightful chat on America's Voice Live recently](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=395d972d6e&e=273c9a71fb). With Terrance Bates at the helm in place of Steve Gruber, they delved into the current situation in Israel. Given David's deep expertise in foreign policy and national security, it was a conversation that left many of us thinking.

A couple of takeaways:
* David's unwavering stance on the U.S. supporting Israel's right to exist.
* His candid feedback on the Biden Administration's approach to the situation.
* [Did you miss the live segment? No problem. Catch the full discussion here.](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=684abc0400&e=273c9a71fb)

[Stand With Israel Petition](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=ea1544a662&e=273c9a71fb)
In light of recent events and the importance of showing our support, we've launched [a "Stand With Israel" petition.](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=8ba39f1c7b&e=273c9a71fb) It's a chance for us to come together and voice our collective backing for one of our closest allies. [If you believe in Israel's right to peace and security, please add your name here.](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=da5005e749&e=273c9a71fb)

Your voice matters, and together, we can send a strong message of unity and support.

As always, if you have any thoughts or questions, or just want to chat about recent events, I'm here. Let's keep the conversation going.

For America,

Noah Amuer
Political Director
Committee to Elect David Flippo

clean_body: Support Israel | | | | | | Hey Peter, Hope you're holding up well. I've got a couple of things to share that I believe you'll find compelling. First off, David Flippo, our very own Lt. Colonel, . With Terrance Bates at the helm in place of Steve Gruber, they delved into the current situation in Israel. Given David's deep expertise in foreign policy and national security, it was a conversation that left many of us thinking. A couple of takeaways: David's unwavering stance on the U.S. supporting Israel's right to exist. His candid feedback on the Biden Administration's approach to the situation. In light of recent events and the importance of showing our support, we've launched It's a chance for us to come together and voice our collective backing for one of our closest allies. Your voice matters, and together, we can send a strong message of unity and support. As always, if you have any thoughts or questions, or just want to chat about recent events, I'm here. Let's keep the conversation going. For America, Noah Amuer Political Director Committee to Elect David Flippo | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | "Paid for by The Committee To Elect David Flippo" | | Copyright © 2023 Committee To Elect David Flippo, All rights reserved.

body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54895?t=6&akid=11201%2E878179%2EML2EmE) James Carville here, folks, and I’m personally reaching out tonight because I’M F&$%ING TERRIFIED.

[**I need to ask you to split an urgent donation between Jon Tester’s campaign and the Voter Protection Project NOW and stop that no-good Mitch McConnell from buying Montana’s Senate seat.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54895?t=7&akid=11201%2E878179%2EML2EmE)

Mitch and his super PAC buddies have raised BONKERS amounts of money in the past year to stop Jon by any means necessary. And if they’re successful, Democrats can kiss their majority goodbye. **BOOM: national abortion ban, lower wages, your health care gutted.**

Jon needs your help like, yesterday. Hell, even if you already gave yesterday, he needs you to give again.

Because here’s the deal about this MASSIVE fundraising deadline, folks— _we ain’t there yet._ **And guess what?! ALL donations will help protect the Dem majority. Isn’t that worthwhile?**

[**We need an extra push to get us across that finish line, and I know we can do it together. Split an urgent contribution of $10 (or more if you’re feeling spicy!) between Jon’s campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help reelect Jon and double your impact:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54895?t=8&akid=11201%2E878179%2EML2EmE) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54896?t=9&akid=11201%2E878179%2EML2EmE)

Here’s the deal. If we lose Montana, it’s GAME OVER. Mitch McConnell and his far-right cronies would snatch back Senate control and wreck our country with their extremist agenda. That’s why he’s so focused on beating Jon, and why Sunday’s deadline means EVERYTHING for the campaign.

**Jon Tester is Democrats' only chance to hold this seat and protect our Senate majority. But ONLY with your support.**

[**So click that donate button, put the pedal to the metal, and let’s win this thing for our future, our families, and our country.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/54895?t=14&akid=11201%2E878179%2EML2EmE)
Thanks, y’all.

—James Carville

name: Chuck Grassley (US Senator, R-Iowa)
subject: Second Amendment Questionnaire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I really need your response | Peter – Chuck Grassley here.

I’m reaching out because one of our most crucial **constitutional rights is under assault from the radical Left: The Second Amendment.**

Left-wing politicians have openly stated they want to TAKE GUNS AWAY from law-abiding citizens. One of Joe Biden’s Democratic Governors is doing just that. [**She issued an “emergency” public health declaration to SUSPEND individuals’ rights to carry and bear arms.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8a8f54035d4448e88bf3ffefed5a84da&_e=WvzEmSlN7dFwtQqPn7hn6Ow4cqaO_cHzNvMy2pI7ShXc5Zm3NImKsl2n49d0QiTmFvXg0hlgrlGCxDJ_XEHnk3cZ50NtVLiCJeQrvzDrqiWg6abtYs1fsC-KeA2w0fU4qbDfLzjVkso0AGQ_SjdCJ2Z89Ihkna6_VkFpPQxNg_PygrvoZqR4m7x-CADHMnazO9EOud8fLOde7GOCnToKZH1uYLGU_x4ybHaFBnbsQy4DqtQ5O2bZHakTtDa9-tQ52dEv7efGEaKwHJRMNNPHd9bLZccpV5FQOdbcu6Ra8MEMMBoK6Vag1SwnYI3l5fpjQ5i4ZrvqM8vcm40sOMm5auMAg_pJdeocTW6kq5VchIIh2Hpzc22Xm8DkvtGSfjjp9a1syncH4eCqmCkXuY4jAX9yF2g659aZR8ogt0luzr_I2PMt6auxhhpi_hRva_OPEshHDB1ZSpqsZcjBf2k9Cw%3D%3D)

Our Second Amendment Rights are not up for grabs, and I’m reaching out because we desperately need help from dedicated Americans like you to PROTECT our constitutional right to keep and bear arms.

Will you take a few minutes and complete my quick [**Second Amendment Questionnaire?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8a8f54035d4448e88bf3ffefed5a84da&_e=WvzEmSlN7dFwtQqPn7hn6Ow4cqaO_cHzNvMy2pI7ShXc5Zm3NImKsl2n49d0QiTmFvXg0hlgrlGCxDJ_XEHnk3cZ50NtVLiCJeQrvzDrqiWg6abtYs1fsC-KeA2w0fU4qbDfLzjVkso0AGQ_SjdCJ2Z89Ihkna6_VkFpPQxNg_PygrvoZqR4m7x-CADHMnazO9EOud8fLOde7GOCnToKZH1uYLGU_x4ybHaFBnbsQy4DqtQ5O2bZHakTtDa9-tQ52dEv7efGEaKwHJRMNNPHd9bLZccpV5FQOdbcu6Ra8MEMMBoK6Vag1SwnYI3l5fpjHvFgc63M-p8GnbHuuDMHFrCEH327I2U0Yaq_sn7XclVKbRSC_7_wtZzU_8JP390JBTh1n8NXbO21lY61KTERJF7d68ItZqea6RGMA45H2EdyAH79p8Fk2O6Ai4UrNlkYsnObzM5WB8GA0AwCiZtzzA%3D%3D) It’s crucial I receive your response as soon as possible with our gun rights under direct assault from Left-wing Governors.

[**Please take the CRUCIAL Second Amendment Questionnaire As Soon As Possible. >>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8a8f54035d4448e88bf3ffefed5a84da&_e=WvzEmSlN7dFwtQqPn7hn6Ow4cqaO_cHzNvMy2pI7ShXc5Zm3NImKsl2n49d0QiTmFvXg0hlgrlGCxDJ_XEHnk3cZ50NtVLiCJeQrvzDrqiWg6abtYs1fsC-KeA2w0fU4qbDfLzjVkso0AGQ_SjdCJ2Z89Ihkna6_VkFpPQxNg_PygrvoZqR4m7x-CADHMnazO9EOud8fLOde7GOCnToKZH1uYLGU_x4ybHaFBnbsQy4DqtQ5O2bZHakTtDa9-tQ52dEv7efGEaKwHJRMNNPHd9bLZccpV5FQOdbcu6Ra8MEMMBoK6Vag1SwnYI3l5fpjia-xLtSbqh3voYMWtSZ-xXacMBSE6nN4hNHgZjrj1Zbtj1__FYESmMkljg5VANdplKqa-27s2h-d370389eN5OTFLa-I_WDfa4Zrobk2kCrNX8xNdpnv3e311HCLv2dgQi7_hqo_-3G7gY-Gsm0kmw%3D%3D)

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: less than a month out!
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Late-Term Abortion is on the ballot in Ohio, and early voting is already underway!

With time running out, it's all hands-on-deck as whatever happens in Ohio will have HUGE ramifications nationwide!

If passed, Ohio _Issue 1_ would enshrine abortion in the state’s Constitution and allow abortion through all nine months of pregnancy for any reason whatsoever!

All of this is to say – _since we’re under** _ONE MONTH_** away from Ohio’s November 7th referendum battle_ – **_NOW_** is the time to buckle down!

**[So, would you please consider helping our battle in Ohio by making your most generous contribution of $100, $75, $50, or $25 to _Students for Life Action_ today](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sgldid-duchtdja-y/)?**

For weeks now, _Students for Life Action_ has been training activists, registering voters on college campuses, making calls, and texting to ensure we win the referendum fight – _all plans we’ll continue through Election Day._

We’ve even been running some POWERFUL online ads, featuring an Ohio Attorney and a female doctor both explaining exactly what this referendum would do!

We’ve also been joined in opposing _Issue 1_ by over 100 Ohio pastors in the African American community who wrote a letter citing that, _“This is a moral issue and for the Black community in particular, it is a life-or-death matter.”_

We’ve made sure through our Ohio election plans to leave no stone unturned because right now it’s just too risky to not do everything we can – _we can’t afford to lose Buckeye state to the Abortion Lobby, so every bit counts._

**[So, if what I asked you for earlier is just too much, even just a gift of $10 will be crucial to winning this fight](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sgldid-duchtdja-j/)!**

If passed, Ohio’s abortion referendum would:

******* Enshrine abortion-on-demand in Ohio’s state Constitution throughout all nine months of a pregnancy;

******* Allow abortionists to commit abortions on pregnant minors without parents knowing anything about it; and

******* Allow surgeons to mutilate the bodies of minors with sex change surgeries and allow Planned Parenthood to dispense hormone treatment to these same minors with zero parental involvement.
Needless to say, this referendum would spell disaster for Ohioan mothers and their preborn babies.

That’s why _Students for Life Action_ is fighting back HARD to:

**>>> _Continue hosting political workshops all across Ohio to train and mobilize over 200 pro-life activists_.**

As they’re trained, these activists will help distribute tens of thousands of voter registration and absentee ballot request forms to pro-life voters on college campuses, holding events at colleges and universities;
**>>> _Target Ohio’s Christian colleges and universities to drive up pro-life turnout_.**

My hope is that this new project we’re launching in Ohio and in Virginia’s off-year elections this fall could be a game changer for both 2023 and 2024 if we can raise enough resources to fund it.
Polling shows that Christian Gen Z-ers actually outvoted other evangelical demographics in 2022. But as _Christianity Today_ noted, they’ve become a swing demographic. They’re no longer dependable pro-life voters that we can take for granted.
This is exactly the kind of situation where _Students for Life Action’s_ **“VOTE PRO-LIFE FIRST!”** campaigns are most effective;
**>>> _Launch an all-out traditional media and social media effort_.**

No, we won’t get a fair shake by the media gatekeepers, but that’s not an excuse not to fight. Over the years, we’ve developed an impressive media program that rivals organizations that are many times larger – one that earned over $60 million in media coverage in 2022 alone!
Not only that, but we’ve also become effective at bypassing Big Tech censors. Today, we boast 38 million users across the nation on social media platforms like Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, and TikTok; and
**>>> _Unleash an all-out voter contact blitz targeting 18-35 year-olds with our PROVEN program_.**

Using lessons we learned during the COVID-19 shutdowns _(which forced us to focus on texting and digital communications with young people since campuses were closed),_ we were able to convert 14% of the young voters we talked to online in 2022. And we did it at a cost of only $1.13 per conversion!
Not only that, but our grassroots presence is already making a difference on the streets of Ohio.

Last week, our team actually led the March for Life in Columbus!

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sgldid-duchtdja-i/)

But all of this is dependent on whether I can count on you Pro-Life Friend.

**[So, could you please agree to your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ to help us continue our critical work in Ohio and other battleground states](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sgldid-duchtdja-d/)?**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sgldid-026154D2-duchtdja-h) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-sgldid-duchtdja-k/)
**

**

body:
The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week.

| | | | **[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zaohsfdaki4k3tdfd210n3a91hibkfogi6lpu43g_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jm6pr2cph2bs)**

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqn3sg1gvolb0olt5sbueoeosj5cgggrb81tcpio_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jm6pr2cph2bs)

| | Dear Friend,
---
| | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.
---
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbkjddrjmj8tcf35l2mb27gg8063cajnoqh8vkco_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jm6pr2cph2bs)
This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the **John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.**

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: Jim Jordan for Speaker
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

It’s official. Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) has been ousted as Speaker of the House.

Now, there’s a new battle for House Speaker going on!
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-swhitl-duchtdja-y/)
There have been some candidates’ names thrown around on Capitol Hill, but U.S. Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) has just announced that he will be running for House Speaker.

And he’s the only candidate in the race with an A+ pro-life voting record!

I don’t know how all of this is going to play out.

But I want to know what pro-life Americans like you are thinking, Pro-Life Friend.

**[Please CLICK HERE to take your “Pro-Life Speaker” Survey to let me know whether or not you support Rep. Jim Jordan as our next Speaker of the House](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-swhitl-duchtdja-j/)!**

Pro-Life Friend, one thing I’m positive of is that the Abortion Lobby is already trying to take advantage of this power vacuum at the House Speaker position.

They want nothing more than to have a radical pro-abortion Democrat like former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) holding the gavel.

But I’m sure they’d be perfectly fine settling for a weak-kneed Republican like Nancy Mace (R-SC) or Brian Fitzpatrick (R-PA) making sure no life-saving legislation of any substance gets through the House.

**[That’s why it’s critical that you CLICK HERE to take your “Pro-Life Speaker” Survey to let me know whether or not you support Rep. Jim Jordan as our next Speaker of the House](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-swhitl-duchtdja-i/)!**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

name: Your America
subject: The Future of Hearing Aids
body:
This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market

| [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24153%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pe5Q68OR%2f%2fpfp9dO2zEZmA&sysid=1)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24154%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fiyti191WL1JaWI1ca4hxA&sysid=1)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they’ve seen in over a decade.

It’s called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24165%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tbcbju7odmUr4AK%2b7C821Q&sysid=1)
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24154%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fiyti191WL1JaWI1ca4hxA&sysid=1)
What makes Horizon so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you’ll completely forget you’re wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It’s not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It’s about speech clarity. And that’s precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24165%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tbcbju7odmUr4AK%2b7C821Q&sysid=1)

Your America News
---

name: John Eastman
subject: OUTRAGEOUS Prosecution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC
body:
The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week.

| | | | **[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsnb345lrv6igd3mpaiktjpnajkl5a2h131c2m9o_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jmeor1c5h2bs)**
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z25u0egltj1uimq39psv4am30l04q2a1embo0988_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jmeor1c5h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkso9gfevbr07v7cuudgsst24a7dvp27f4phe8p8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jmeor1c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,
---
| | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.
---
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7qspatff1e0bajk5nav0j1mdj7ug4m47jpau01o_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jmeor1c5h2bs)
This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the **John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.**
| | **[DONATE $15](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zufdvvu8ql03f3ai9pg3amtj9cgboknpgs9tokg0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jmeor1c5h2bs)**

name: American Action News
subject: The Future of Hearing Aids
body:
This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaekq5i23jc4unbmfcupmckdu7in8ic0r3r09ngg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jmeor6cph2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7a79aut6ubdnbq3q4jd71qelg01lkj7ujminlu8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jmeor6cph2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrobbt12nhp5hvn88j10gr38pel4d896h2sjel30_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jmeor6cph2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zamk86c6u42db8vjf5ddbmlc0dv82jfgondf8rl0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jmeor6cph2bs)
What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9s20tdt18758eacmen7kp4jlcahvurt6on3p4po_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9jmeor6cph2bs)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
America as we know it obliterated in the blink of an eye

| |
---
| | | **URGENT: CRITICAL OCTOBER PETITION TO BLOCK D.C. STATEHOOD**
Hey Friend,

The clock is ticking. Last month, we fell short of our signature target to halt the Radical Left's push for D.C. statehood, and now we can't afford to let up. We NEED your immediate action today!
**[SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C. STATEHOOD](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8motu9j5iftspbsufr11dgog8pgqoqa6f3bj02o_ "SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C. STATEHOOD")**
Here's why this is so urgent:
1. Democrats are on the verge of making D.C. the 51st state, which could happen within DAYS. This is not a drill. American conservative values are on the line, and patriots like you MUST ACT NOW to PREVENT this bill from passing!

2. If D.C. gains statehood, Chuck Schumer will cement PERMANENT Democratic majorities with TWO more far-Left Senators.

3. What's even more alarming is that the Radical Left will then have the authority to IMPEACH Clarence Thomas and PACK the Supreme Court--obliterating our country as we know it!

No second thoughts--join us by signing the _**State Republicans' Official Petition**_ urgently to Stop D.C. Statehood BEFORE the Democrats push the bill to a vote.

This is an all-or-nothing moment. If this bill passes, nothing else will matter. Conservatives will lose their voice forever. Act NOW!
**[SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C. STATEHOOD](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za31j1joffgojie7o5ee723qp951qckkhuhaa11g_ "SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C. STATEHOOD")**

We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. name: David Horowitz
subject: the enemy within
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoorj474kpcfuh0t0g9vimrb4ugj2sd8ahignlu0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge8oj2cph2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs9oaoramrsdfiu0a7e9vd96k48q8l224165qc2o_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge8oj2cph2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmlm2pghoag4r7bdkgu69qqau45dvu1a2naa7tog_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge8oj2cph2bs)**

body:
America as we know it obliterated in the blink of an eye

| |
---
| | | **URGENT: CRITICAL OCTOBER PETITION TO BLOCK D.C. STATEHOOD**
Hey Friend,

The clock is ticking. Last month, we fell short of our signature target to halt the Radical Left's push for D.C. statehood, and now we can't afford to let up. We NEED your immediate action today!
**[SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C. STATEHOOD](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0796bfvrurmomgf93s1qddjcvcqplcfcs9op768_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge2o76c3h2bs "SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C. STATEHOOD")**
Here's why this is so urgent:
1. Democrats are on the verge of making D.C. the 51st state, which could happen within DAYS. This is not a drill. American conservative values are on the line, and patriots like you MUST ACT NOW to PREVENT this bill from passing!

2. If D.C. gains statehood, Chuck Schumer will cement PERMANENT Democratic majorities with TWO more far-Left Senators.

3. What's even more alarming is that the Radical Left will then have the authority to IMPEACH Clarence Thomas and PACK the Supreme Court--obliterating our country as we know it!

No second thoughts--join us by signing the _**State Republicans' Official Petition**_ urgently to Stop D.C. Statehood BEFORE the Democrats push the bill to a vote.

This is an all-or-nothing moment. If this bill passes, nothing else will matter. Conservatives will lose their voice forever. Act NOW!
**[SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C. STATEHOOD](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6une37cbr41k1uo6jv2vl93ns8ajam6jhkvb7o8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge2o76c3h2bs "SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C. STATEHOOD")**

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: David Horowitz
subject: the enemy within
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlnrtnjd9on11p4r0sg1h3sldca8s606fbdl2668_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge2o75cjh2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8a46irmct383j3pra935r9n3bjs7ts4bj5gia0g_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge2o75cjh2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z419njje50l4uf4nmh7okonnsabih1p32plqg9mg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge2o75cjh2bs)**
---

---

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 10.13.2023
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-xlhvht-didthutlhu-tj/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-r/) **October 13, 2023** Friend,The Republican Party of Wisconsin stand with the people of Israel, and condemns the horrific attacks on the Jewish people by Hamas terrorists. We mourn the [1,200+ ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-y/)Israelis and [2](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-j/)[7 ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-t/)Americans who have been murdered. We pray for the protection of more than [150 ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-i/)individuals kidnapped by these insurgents and the innocents subjected to this terror. Read our latest update below. -Team WisGOP | Tammy Baldwin has doubled-down on her anti-women agenda, with her renewed crusade against biological females. This past week the Human Rights Campaign honored Baldwin at their Fall Luncheon as a trailblazer for transgender rights and legislation. [71 percent](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-d/) of Wisconsinites believe that transgender athletes should compete on sports teams that match their biological sex, and [56 percent](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-h/) of Wisconsinites support a ban on minors having access to hormone therapies or sex-changing surgeries. Baldwin has trivialized the transgender issue pandering to her far-left supporters and disregarding the concerns of doctors, parents, and women. Wisconsin test scores still have not recovered since the pandemic with gaps in math and language arts worsening. Less than [42%](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-k/) of Wisconsin third through eighth graders were deemed at a proficient level on the state's Forward tests, a couple of [percentage points](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-u/) below 2019 results. This marks another year that the Wisconsin public education system has delivered a below average proficiency rate.
---

[SIGN UP TO BE POLL WORKERS!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-o/) The November 30 deadline for poll-worker sign-ups is quickly approaching. Make sure to sign up to be one of our Republican nominated poll workers, and put yourself on the frontlines in our fight for election integrity! This is the most important way to protect the Wisconsin vote in upcoming elections. The Biden Administration has an exceptional talent for taking money out of the pockets of hard-working Americans. Once again, economists note that inflation is ["hotter than expected," ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-b/)remaining up 3.7 percent over the last year. Prices have skyrocketed, increasing [17.7 percent ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-a/)since Biden took office. To add fuel to the fire, real wages have decreased [3.2 percent](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-f/). "Bidenomics" continues to put average Americans at a disadvantage, but the President and his administration refuse to amend their economic policy. While the President and his administration attempt to gaslight us into believing the United States economy is thriving, Wisconsinites are being forced to spend more for less.
---

# **In Case You Missed It**
**[ICYMI: Tammy Baldwin continues crusade against biological females-- honored by advocates of gender transition treatments for children](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-z/)**
In case you missed it, Tammy Baldwin doubled-down on her anti-women agenda that harms children at the same time.
**[WisDems Socialist Caucus refuses to condemn Hamas terrorism](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-v/)**
In case you missed it, today the Wisconsin Assembly voted unanimously to [condemn Hamas' barbaric attack against Israel](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-e/). However, three Democratic members of the Assembly, including two members of their [Socialist Caucus](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-s/), [refused to vote](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-g/) to denounce the terrorism inflicted on the Israeli people this week.
**[Bidenflation Isn't Going Away](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-w/)**
Biden has made life increasingly difficult and expensive for Americans. The latest Consumer Price Index data shows year-over-year inflation, coming in [higher](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-yd/) than expected at [3.7 percent](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-yh/) and remaining more than twice the rate compared to when Biden took office.
**[The Republican Point: Five Major Takeaways From the Week](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-yk/)**
Here's the point: Joe Biden has made America weaker and emboldened our adversaries. America and our allies can't afford four more years of his failed leadership.
**[The Republican Point: Want a Secure Border? Vote Republican](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-yu/) **
Joe Biden and his administration are repeating the lie that "[without the help of Republicans](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xlhvht-didthutlhu-jl/)," Biden "is doing everything that he can to deal with the border." While Biden is determined to make the border crisis worse, Republicans are doing their job and securing the border.

The latest Consumer Price Index data shows year-over-year inflation, coming in than expected at and remaining more than twice the rate compared to when Biden took office. Here's the point: Joe Biden has made America weaker and emboldened our adversaries. America and our allies can't afford four more years of his failed leadership. Joe Biden and his administration are repeating the lie that "," Biden "is doing everything that he can to deal with the border." While Biden is determined to make the border crisis worse, Republicans are doing their job and securing the border. subject: Need your eyes on this

body:
America as we know it obliterated in the blink of an eye

| |
---
| | | **URGENT: CRITICAL OCTOBER PETITION TO BLOCK D.C. STATEHOOD**
Hey Friend,

The clock is ticking. Last month, we fell short of our signature target to halt the Radical Left's push for D.C. statehood, and now we can't afford to let up. We NEED your immediate action today!
**[SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C. STATEHOOD](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670819%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u3Co6ClnSTGgyZeuHAqxWA&sysid=1 "SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C.
STATEHOOD")**
Here's why this is so urgent:
1. Democrats are on the verge of making D.C. the 51st state, which could happen within DAYS. This is not a drill. American conservative values are on the line, and patriots like you MUST ACT NOW to PREVENT this bill from passing!

2. If D.C. gains statehood, Chuck Schumer will cement PERMANENT Democratic majorities with TWO more far-Left Senators.

3. What's even more alarming is that the Radical Left will then have the authority to IMPEACH Clarence Thomas and PACK the Supreme Court--obliterating our country as we know it!

No second thoughts--join us by signing the _**State Republicans' Official Petition**_ urgently to Stop D.C. Statehood BEFORE the Democrats push the bill to a vote.

This is an all-or-nothing moment. If this bill passes, nothing else will matter. Conservatives will lose their voice forever. Act NOW!
**[SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C. STATEHOOD](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670819%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u3Co6ClnSTGgyZeuHAqxWA&sysid=1 "SIGN TO HELP STOP D.C.
STATEHOOD")**

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: How Politicians North of Richmond Got So Rich
body:
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9aop0eofe0mcta4q5u670eovpttds013d7pbe68_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)
The Rich Men North of Richmond is not a new problem.

Friend,

The Rich Men North of Richmond is not a new problem.

Unfortunately, it's a problem that has occurred throughout history. This isn't the first time singers wrote songs about it, but this time, it really struck a chord with people.

In the 1800s, a French economist, Frederic Bastiat, wrote a booklet called _The Law_. Bastiat describes that law is fundamentally force and violence, and the only moral use of force is self-defense of life, liberty, and property.

Bastiat writes about the producers versus the plunderers.

**_The Rich Men North of Richmond, aka the politicians and the bureaucratic class in Washington, D.C., are the plunderers_.** They plunder the fruits of the producers - business owners and laborers - through taxation and regulations.

This isn't a new phenomenon. However, what is new is the millions waking up to the plundering. _And what happens when millions realize they are being plundered?_

That's what we're doing at the Foundation for Economic Education.

**Not only are we giving copies of _The Law_ to high school students, but _FEE in the Classroom_ is countering radical indoctrination by going into classrooms across the country to teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.**

Our goal is to teach 75,000 students the principles of liberty this year.

I want to send you a copy of _The Law_ by supporting FEE today.

[Friend, can you help support FEE -- and receive a copy of The Law by Frederic Bastiat by donating $10, $25, $50, or any amount? And if you donate $250 or more, you can get a personally signed copy from FEE's President. Click here to send your gift. >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6enmmre30ng1gr3gj2ovhedv20f9rpsj20qr6sg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)

[Receive Your Copy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbadel10jr1djv1nfk08sntuphqn36bg160rm8ig_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zabf2q7la19ca3damaqfikumuui1a14a15fkiurg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)
This program uniquely challenges high school students to think outside the box to challenge the mainstream narrative.

In a single day, an average of 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As.

Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

[Get your copy of _The Law_ today >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9m1dqn71t7h075qkj1nlog5h6jgjddpn965c9n0_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)

Friend, FEE has a long history of fighting socialism.

Before the collapse of the Soviet Empire, I smuggled books (and raised money to support book smuggling) into Eastern European countries such as Poland and into the Soviet Union itself.

I understand how the ideas of liberty can change the course of history.

That's why FEE in the Classroom is very important.

Now, they're building a legacy of freedom by educating high school students.

**Can you help me reach my goal of getting a copy of _The Law_ into your hands, friend? Click below to send your gift and claim your copy! All donations of $250 or more will receive a signed version by FEE's President.**
[Donate $10 and get a copy of _The Law_ >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv5eqjuvtlj9rva86f6isq8febtfub7nmidih5s8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)

[Donate $25 and get a copy of _The Law_ >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zro0nbp9q6qkt6ghenmv6besh7hvr2kn9qeqhs8g_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)

[Donate $50 and get a copy of _The Law_ >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrnq78ntrp61f1eo7f8r6h8595etrq7blo9d3vf8_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)

[Donate $100 and get a copy of _The Law_ >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zguvd6r7solhja507oijlmial7b4eorbec2df0ig_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)

[Donate $250 and get a Signed Copy >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z96rrq339k6nv3voh9i161lrgoeonklnuhbt9u3o_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)

[Donate $500 and get a Signed Copy >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4e6ge2ampcp3u6olrd63l216ur8hj0a4nei86fo_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 and get a Signed Copy >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za956jalv3ocdh1ioqabk57qkpp121c2q8piosvg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4jik2fmtt5p44a0lt38ujno8ch235i7ja09oirg_rp22sh2s8i66p77c9ge1ob2c3h2bs)

In Liberty,

Lawrence Reed
President Emeritus

P.S. Even Ronald Reagan, who helped destroy the Soviet Union, was a big fan of FEE. Here he is reading our magazine, The Freeman.

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4a6487457eabcd8cc9c08652fecf49e53bbc52663e88fe9e32409b8c8df9a06219f4c812ec589cd075364722e96765a7a88583429cac0e2683421eebbd267717

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4a6487457eabcd8cc9c08652fecf49e53bbc52663e88fe9e32409b8c8df9a06219f4c812ec589cd075364722e96765a7a88583429cac0e2683421eebbd267717

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contribution rules

- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.

Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. **Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ec2bd7f73954cc1a47b02dc2caeb946&_e=FUCC3EH9uIDC92hktPt4RGb_GmR-uuAmG92tsNnH0Pjb5b4XUbOIF3y91BND90B2xwLv8UyWS1z8M3sM-3up40Qa-0fTUTdFkADEuXGvZkSFEH0nfH4ySVPRROgaoLak7rU2lEGyXzMCB0WYXAqsIspe92xsEZXORgmLyX5BTcg6-HjdXIjN7VHFb3iQL4-gvNccE9k9mIrf2kpxIaZSHR0uXhcgVWE90XiDS6Y0dAcfusvqlI_IN7gp0syBk6yp0lfrGwZcLRgISQf44rcKjU8NWt2gqNVqm3q2xbHYkJd0dzAzKolRZigkaj4Ut6ZDjWEpkWrsvxMXa1NHjKX9d3OEf-OcD4aOIfaTukL_AMrn4FN40m_kTaIfTr1P1ivv2NGJXudeO7hTRRfuBOR1DNcb24M1QnQGXIx_atTclfK_GMZpY8FH2KunfUQnlvAX5COdRYS23BZXINCs95Lku6UafIVA83Aa2bwn_g1kfRA%3D)
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ec2bd7f73954cc1a47b02dc2caeb946&_e=FUCC3EH9uIDC92hktPt4RGb_GmR-uuAmG92tsNnH0Pjb5b4XUbOIF3y91BND90B2xwLv8UyWS1z8M3sM-3up40Qa-0fTUTdFkADEuXGvZkSFEH0nfH4ySVPRROgaoLak7rU2lEGyXzMCB0WYXAqsIspe92xsEZXORgmLyX5BTcg6-HjdXIjN7VHFb3iQL4-gvNccE9k9mIrf2kpxIaZSHR0uXhcgVWE90XiDS6Y0dAcfusvqlI_IN7gp0syBk6yp0lfrGwZcLRgISQf44rcKjU8NWt2gqNVqm3q2xbHYkJd0dzAzKolRZigkaj4Ut6ZDjWEpkWrsvxMXa1NHjKX9d7NUZ9A7LYWOiePXPQAaj1UdbhCtFoK8wFGDi-Il2I3ijWyfel3HyXmcqSVBR9sNcKohD5FmwGVX4DPzgFspCUmfI8mTJujXJeMfMQKs2BRif-mn5zl0-T4Gh0pZSd_ERC25sZ7q92VIHChhSxuMWVY%3D)
What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

clean_body: This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's called Horizon by hear.com. And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It's no wonder Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023 , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes Horizon so special? It's one of the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing. With Horizon, they can. Imagine effortless hearing in every situation --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to understand every word clearly with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it. This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. "It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize." In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. Get started today. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

---
[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efdd3bb99d08454a9ce6057c8c59d56a&_e=ihrNpT0jCQs6r67xZR-S62wFnGsmSFYtCvuwdwKyyASNmuVy0uRSeo1fbrXqG9Z-tTTYkiVSMSOTFc0nFT5tAvrOYn5pMGjry6fgjXZxSVrPCiyvV-5qO0mTbqnDfpahAFkWGaLzbuAXYN5sLdO_n3K17Uh8Wiq53GdoCvdqHK_2WLk6loIZ8Trm14HhImCSw0gZDOlrJJWfrvIFNanjC6FqmGmzaKmFH5DMbNOMaz4W_VH9R5R51UdCwZhZ3zIV34qY3svHfPgTslzTLz2wWCpHah8vySu6gDAz8s0QR_Coi7DVyj5vsH1K1WhkuhlsljOe50i_6hoDlxV2Zk2mKuXGBP5g0JaqZxreA272aFNQ_p8rRPYt-8S7nhtSygc0Q5DY1ZO_ZbZPbxdk8VDSnuphDHT4d2naR1gV2EiLroEpsE_kdgvUd3bAnZ-f8QmjNC7CYK6Nt01TI2T1IbCNkkU3KJlFF_nrEUCzGqpVKIM%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efdd3bb99d08454a9ce6057c8c59d56a&_e=ihrNpT0jCQs6r67xZR-S62wFnGsmSFYtCvuwdwKyyASNmuVy0uRSeo1fbrXqG9Z-tTTYkiVSMSOTFc0nFT5tAvrOYn5pMGjry6fgjXZxSVrPCiyvV-5qO0mTbqnDfpahAFkWGaLzbuAXYN5sLdO_n3K17Uh8Wiq53GdoCvdqHK_2WLk6loIZ8Trm14HhImCSw0gZDOlrJJWfrvIFNanjC6FqmGmzaKmFH5DMbNOMaz4W_VH9R5R51UdCwZhZ3zIV34qY3svHfPgTslzTLz2wWCpHah8vySu6gDAz8s0QR_Coi7DVyj5vsH1K1WhkuhlsljOe50i_6hoDlxV2Zk2mKgVFMMzoKN8k-dB0U2Zv9SmKAVwDFW0b8x49kuw8NYXIuxsSIBv8_EtEsRZAi67BGJ6hYLpIIXXQIHwkHnuBvvAMfq-3lkL7BKaa9eXONPtSmrgEwLck1yCuPstrdpmpICYNY-C23NqwTm6HeWLByWc%3D)
[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efdd3bb99d08454a9ce6057c8c59d56a&_e=ihrNpT0jCQs6r67xZR-S62wFnGsmSFYtCvuwdwKyyASNmuVy0uRSeo1fbrXqG9Z-tTTYkiVSMSOTFc0nFT5tAvrOYn5pMGjry6fgjXZxSVrPCiyvV-5qO0mTbqnDfpahAFkWGaLzbuAXYN5sLdO_n3K17Uh8Wiq53GdoCvdqHK_2WLk6loIZ8Trm14HhImCSw0gZDOlrJJWfrvIFNanjC6FqmGmzaKmFH5DMbNOMaz4W_VH9R5R51UdCwZhZ3zIV34qY3svHfPgTslzTLz2wWCpHah8vySu6gDAz8s0QR_Coi7DVyj5vsH1K1WhkuhlsljOe50i_6hoDlxV2Zk2mKg9Zj5UzQ61sfFdWkSvK5ZVeiUWLe3aVCZK3IW6unfjyRInj5n-M12h4_tE2G075Ll0dQkSSbq0-xBqrlM98qKkSItPzJFu40P8Y6jSbRjBavbQWw7LVNNUA6KcpkHnoOZFgdjZwLDw6itxvvW0PVPQ%3D)
What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=efdd3bb99d08454a9ce6057c8c59d56a&_e=ihrNpT0jCQs6r67xZR-S62wFnGsmSFYtCvuwdwKyyASNmuVy0uRSeo1fbrXqG9Z-tTTYkiVSMSOTFc0nFT5tAvrOYn5pMGjry6fgjXZxSVrPCiyvV-5qO0mTbqnDfpahAFkWGaLzbuAXYN5sLdO_n3K17Uh8Wiq53GdoCvdqHK_2WLk6loIZ8Trm14HhImCSw0gZDOlrJJWfrvIFNanjC6FqmGmzaKmFH5DMbNOMaz4W_VH9R5R51UdCwZhZ3zIV34qY3svHfPgTslzTLz2wWCpHah8vySu6gDAz8s0QR_Coi7DVyj5vsH1K1WhkuhlsljOe50i_6hoDlxV2Zk2mKuUkCn7jZyZvJ6j1PvRvA7lvu-LPOrrYwXc_--CoazounNiVgC15peWY2TZ4oNIoqUv1dRE-6H65c8oahOH7YbKcccdgUQWRYDlqzAGphKoPqto2Bsepc_v7Sbya32ugsgmt0V5hK9itEvUYIM0RSCw%3D)
