Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8460ca540a5a9a485c4e71c57fe684cf338bab1d649aa3d0ef4e6a454280753e0bbcb1f54dea942d66928f098fc9af2cb43b6504fb7f6bf15c052389d9ee2253

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Climate apocalypse
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2050523?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell the U.S. Treasury to STOP supporting fossil fuel disasters abroad! ** The Earth is baking, Friend. This summer was the _**hottest ever recorded.**_ We saw unprecedented wildfires, we’ve seen catastrophic floods. Greedy fossil fuel companies are **driving us toward apocalypse** – but they’re not doing it alone. Just days after being sworn into office President Biden directed the Department of Treasury to “promote ending international financing of carbon-intensive fossil fuel-based energy.” Translation: _stop funding fossil fuels abroad._ But the **Treasury has voted to support nearly $400 MILLION in financing for gas projects at the World Bank Group** **since then, contradicting its own policies.[_Please, Friend, sign the petition demanding the U.S. Treasury END support for fossil gas projects that are DESTROYING our planet!_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2050524?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2050525?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The U.S. is the largest shareholder at the World Bank Group. That means the **decisions our Treasury makes can have cascading impacts** , for good or for worse. Continuing to support fossil fuel projects gives the signal to other shareholders to do so as well. Opposing them could start a global shift. That’s why this is so important.
Friends of the Earth has just released a report detailing the U.S. Treasury’s violations of their own guidance on supporting fossil fuels. They’re nervous, Friend. They know we’ve caught them, which means **RIGHT NOW** is the time where pressure from environmentalists like you can make the biggest difference. **We need 1,289 more signatures by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to hit our goal.** [_**Send your message to U.S. Treasury right now and help STOP fossil fuel projects around the globe!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2050526?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2050525?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Luisa Abbot Galvao
Senior International Policy Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth **
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D264850&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

Leader Steve Scalise, dropped out of the race.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8d27e39b519457497efd8e0d639260c&_e=_6F5QASSBCffw8d6FDmQCQSnSG5gWoKi3uMwGscfc2cpggjRL3m_0emFfJjblItOTvpQOW48zxuNcI0uPzmMXskhXjDyBqyqVaTpAJCu91G2bYtGcylHvfn8Y7kPFZEGpBjwTGBz_ll-fG26DZFvAc-Xy_2OhUYnvQIlDf2eDRaGDCqwxS21t63fmL0UDfbdai2VAiO3U72JdJq18mZkh1-A5T5mghWew64OvbfYbEX25WskV0eN9U6r0eqhIxOzl9BUqusOY1c72PGp5bH8Cr96Ud6K1SvDIgvMG8z6wXIHb1Euana0i-bXQo_-I1GMCxgre6mV_LwXncjs_zsMkaiwye_8RSaTwHq8c-0j1CdazjapA2pqV4YCj4mOPrRU4mLG3qYJojyHZUcjdrZSSZfW_kYB0bqiOq_JmUQs1Ms%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8d27e39b519457497efd8e0d639260c&_e=_6F5QASSBCffw8d6FDmQCQSnSG5gWoKi3uMwGscfc2cpggjRL3m_0emFfJjblItOTvpQOW48zxuNcI0uPzmMXskhXjDyBqyqVaTpAJCu91G2bYtGcylHvfn8Y7kPFZEGpBjwTGBz_ll-fG26DZFvAc-Xy_2OhUYnvQIlDf2eDRaGDCqwxS21t63fmL0UDfbdai2VAiO3U72JdJq18mZkh1-A5T5mghWew64OvbfYbEX25WskV0eN9U6r0eqhIxOzl9BUqusOY1c72PGp5bH8Cjfhc8r-oI0SHH3lHTXW7JrOccyhqsP83JIlRv8PpRgaUxInS0VRKdOBx0o3MmEUPsjIn4_t4dg6G7SMf06tGxD6I71w6-bjsiRESWkZFe4MWt4gWxVSTM-WDqa8UtPN03EhnjO25h3aY3t0gnupsvQ%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8d27e39b519457497efd8e0d639260c&_e=_6F5QASSBCffw8d6FDmQCQSnSG5gWoKi3uMwGscfc2cpggjRL3m_0emFfJjblItOTvpQOW48zxuNcI0uPzmMXskhXjDyBqyqVaTpAJCu91G2bYtGcylHvfn8Y7kPFZEGpBjwTGBz_ll-fG26DZFvAc-Xy_2OhUYnvQIlDf2eDRaGDCqwxS21t63fmL0UDfbdai2VAiO3U72JdJq18mZkh1-A5T5mghWew64OvbfYbEX25WskV0eN9U6r0eqhIxOzl9BUqusOY1c72PGp5bH8CkLPCCm9QvDisquORDrXPTlqtYcd7zlbyVPZBYtuLe2PPNqbYfgukOqA-yNWFf0uwEHKsNPY3vn5UX6v_3nWdxXOjaj4QpAWiIQ4Nj5iBGhOgt3zVlZC3RN7UM_zud4ShptVOvZQxhXGNifEnwdSJCU%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8d27e39b519457497efd8e0d639260c&_e=_6F5QASSBCffw8d6FDmQCQSnSG5gWoKi3uMwGscfc2cpggjRL3m_0emFfJjblItOTvpQOW48zxuNcI0uPzmMXskhXjDyBqyqVaTpAJCu91G2bYtGcylHvfn8Y7kPFZEGpBjwTGBz_ll-fG26DZFvAc-Xy_2OhUYnvQIlDf2eDRaGDCqwxS21t63fmL0UDfbdai2VAiO3U72JdJq18mZkh1-A5T5mghWew64OvbfYbEX25WskV0eN9U6r0eqhIxOzl9BUqusOY1c72PGp5bH8CppW2bxbg3tH8nbEzl92ZdsAtwj-Ar7wTuHQZ3E7OWvBURIKRGD52n4d0Ygl7axu80sCvVMV9atcL35yQfjRlxH2npit6DNDGSbrj4_DtB2VSXEThg2jKPZSo4zNnSs4MtdGeWSlpSKhnnh8rkRltKw%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: David Horowitz
subject: the enemy within
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. _What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I'm asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f3aff1f06e9348cd8a066cb13093d7eb&_e=LyY_vu7BDUsZshC8Kb-2RpnYZ0VWYUeLwaobAoMXemwk-7N_G2mGvb0RyejMwnAx72KKU-YJQiz2BPGYstdGxGtXkI6lPGpNXj5dtKNcklrHCybBQvCsinqHLx0FfVXe8P2Gj7epVOMVYIEmKOMjhKuUxGo4JHX3OUrfL0o79ZYhrTA3nc1LfS43Ln6jG5stQ2oMjo3QMlubH4CDMrbR5I0wg8lnvke-gT0Zchh4wh3zDhuqGfMvzBCPMYSwyKiqDggsbakpCaOLVqbwdctLbeIm7QUsQDtQz4p3ODsOAKIjHPJBiw6qACQJt_lvsJWTipT-8id_2mlxABIT-MKCbzQstPuSr-3MTe5IX6OqOpDwUSKqITBdllqoH7whafeiSoIL-8H9QRj_1YD9tOwaHg%3D%3D)** When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Having an outsized impact across our state – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571228?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**The Mississippi Center for Public Policy has been busy in 2023, **helping secure a number of clear wins for our state.

**1\. Mississippi’s budget: **Our _Responsible Budget for Mississippi_ , published at the start of this year, proposed keeping spending under control and not squandering the surplus. **I was delighted that the budget passed by the legislature was largely in line with our recommendations.**

**2\. Protecting women’s rights:** We helped mobilise support to protect women’s rights against radical activists. We had the idea of inviting Riley Gaines, the champion swimmer, to come to Mississippi to highlight the need for a change back in the spring. **There seems to be growing support for Riley’s campaign!**
---
|
---
_Riley Gaines speaking in Jackson_
| **3\. Providing the “antidote” to woke: **Concerned about what young people are taught at college, we launched the Mississippi Leadership Academy to teach young Mississippians about the morality of the free market and the US Constitution, as well as providing practical lessons on how to defend liberty on campus. The Academy is now in its second year.
---
|
---
_Mississippi Leadership Academy_
| **So far, so good – but Mississippi is still too often ranked 50 th out of 50 states.** Too many young people in our state are moving to other states.

**We need bold changes in public policy that will improve the lives of Mississippians.** That is why we have been hard at work on plans to promote key innovations in public policy:

* **Education freedom:** Mississippi is now surrounded on three sides by states that have either implemented education freedom (Arkansas), or are moving towards it (Alabama, Louisiana). Why aren’t we?

To kick start a campaign for Arkansas-type education freedom in this state, we are holding a public meeting on November 15th with Corey DeAngelis, families who have benefited from education freedom, as well as some of the key architects of change in Arkansas.

Find out more about this event by clicking on the image below.
---
| [ ](http:///www.eventbrite.com/e/lunch-with-corey-a-deangelis-tickets-668248317707?aff=oddtdtcreator)
---
_Click on the image above for more information!_
|
* **More affordable healthcare:** Too many people in Mississippi struggle to find affordable healthcare. Medicaid expansion will not solve this problem. We would like to see the removal of those restrictive laws know as Certificate of Need (CON) laws, which restrict the range of healthcare providers.

Our legal division, the Mississippi Justice Institute is spearheading the fight against CON laws, with a case before the US Federal 5th circuit court.

* **Full income tax elimination:** To make Mississippi more competitive, we need to reduce the tax burden. In 2022, our Governor signed into law the Mississippi Tax Freedom Act, which gave over a million Mississippi workers a tax break.

Mississippi continues to have a healthy budget surplus, and we believe that full elimination of the state income tax is achievable, with tax revenue threshold triggers to ensure it is affordable as well.

I am delighted that we have been supported in recent months by some key national conservatives:

* **Betsy DeVos** , former Secretary for Education, talking about education freedom.
* **Riley Gaines** , top US athlete talking about protecting women’s rights.
* **Alex Epstein** , author, on the case for oil and gas.
* **Rafael Mangual** from the Manhattan Institute on the dangers of the anti-police / anti-prison agenda.

---
|
---
_Betsy DeVos in Jackson_
| In the past three months, I have spoken at meetings from DeSoto county to the Coast, and from the Delta to Meridian. **Plenty of great things are happening around our state **– and if we get public policy right, I am 100 percent certain we will see Mississippi prosper.

**As an immigrant to America and recent arrival to this great state, there is not a day that goes by when I don’t feel fortunate to be here. **

If you have any thoughts or ideas on what else we ought to be doing to elevate our state, please do let me know.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1243cb1fa8&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=413a476b3f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=413a476b3f).

_Copyright © 2023 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

Biden Admin Shelled Out Thousands To Support Terror-Linked Palestinian
Org Just Weeks Before Hamas Attack

The Biden administration granted over $90,000 dollars to a
terrorist-linked Palestinian organization in the weeks before Hamas
attacked, according to NGO Monitor. The State Department approved two
grants to the Phoenix Center for Research and Field Studies,
established in 2021 under Gaza University, valued at $30,088 for an
August 2023-July 2024 project and $60,000 for a September 2023-August
2024 project.

# Saturday, October 14, 2023

**Welcome to the weekend! **On this day in 1947, Chuck Yeager strapped himself inside the Bell X-1 _Glamorous Glennis _and [broke the sound barrier](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LHSmzAMwPGnERucLRscBoZccmzp0qEj59gC1BLM2Q5tlj77dyHrN-n3X3Qn_boNN8sLr9MP-6Auj2GwLvNOgxSl1CWqQRe-G4mQVEGdbFqDrdGNLOYOtayd0aicsrV2jrwTNWljxdi2WviCOxSopJBaotb1qfKN9saNd29OratRghbkOYdY_Q685pnG5RV2ipULj2Lp5py3BOoM2AP2lqNdfdqsoypxRf4J2KccIlMC7D-L2C6A_T2S_cPrVKbwXH15tzEyxdLUeQZUoM7_QZ0z_cugrj9ppzW_AGu8jrzTG-JFNqZDdgrveTkirICXjeIRc3h-AHi6WTcflpVoANuqiJ3f_vKycGoMaDE9LC_HWfn7L38FAAD__2dpeQc). The airplane was built specifically for the task, and Yeager named it after his wife. Hopefully you're doing something more relaxing this weekend than going Mach 1.06 in an experimental aircraft! (If not, we want to hear about it if you have a good story).

[Drop us a line](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover) if you enjoy today's edition, have a suggestion, or just want to tell us about any death-defying feats you pulled off this weekend. ## Jim Jordan Wins GOP Nomination
In a closed-door session on Friday, Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) [secured his party's nomination](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFv8yAUAH8NbETwAGMGhm_xlm_taBHzHL8UQ2RorP77qpm7nXTSDfdxna-RMpX7_7hj6Gud49LphbOSQhkBejY8hRURUHMMavAOvDOD4ltwWkmnVmuHJYJOPurR36xLYPyopB05BZCglVRGgTF2vKTBJLest-RGv1hQzEhM1OtxeVQqfcM1f9cXHpel7jyHrfdnY_ofg4nB1DfcKOdfx2Da6o4Fz_bGr4YMJgPWeK3Eg3bxqEeKRZxUmmhPjJ94iFJ3KrFTLQwmfoT0PClnaoNjRt73SO82739v-AkAAP__405dlw) for Speaker of the House. However, in a secret ballot taken after the nomination, 55 Republicans said they would not vote for Jordan on the House floor. If he loses more than five, he will not become the Speaker. The vote is expected to [take place on Tuesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3ojgIFw8MHTJlq4drQscMRE2FpBE-fsqnTs-veXp_VzmC6Wctts3rex6LDP5np48KymUEaBnMwYXmYH1yE7ZCWFCY9W4uIms1ZM0miP7IANErZHlSQaMSlkakwMJWkllFBhzPB2CNQF9vAY8Tf4IajCSQ-qlHu4lbX3hmN_lyfXgyzpmt_S-t0F_DXAe4Ez7xq_2UR-oPfnMA5yX8mgsKu-Pa06etiaap5wai3upgTaxek-1L2_R62PdhecgFTKqwJNFQtaA_krIRwkTWBqrC_sr5ZyaxcHI20op_wX1___8BgAA___G2WcA), but Jordan says he doesn't want to proceed with the vote until the Republicans have another chance to huddle.
## Israeli Embassy Worker Assaulted
A 50-year-old Israeli man was treated for stab wounds after [being assaulted](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9ugzAQgPGngc3ofLb5M3jowpauHdFhH-EqgyNsJcrbV-3c-Rs-6fd1W24kSc77Jx3s65YXClWevGhQ2io0i22j35iRTcte99OA02B73e5-dGjsyL0DYGMjOLOthDo4GByQMa14BDQatNVorRu72Ns4hG2NwzgFh7qxwFFqvrrvLGfdeUvv_OSrC_lok99rfZTGfDQ4Nzif_Crdm_acf3OD8yYnnYEbnKM8Uj6oKikXcSqKj5VKeauwy0mqVFpXjgomAwDO6W6vR2ovHx8vSUlKPzQW7gdJ-jvX_yF-AgAA___wxl6L) in front of a supermarket in China yesterday. The man, who works for the Israeli Embassy in China, was seen grappling with the assailant in a video circulating through social media. Beijing police say that the attacker [is related](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtu6zAQBb9G6mhoV3yYBYvbuPNtUworcmltQj0gEjby94FTpzxnmsF83Kc7SZHt8Z9WDi3vE8UmT55gUKAVjpPuU8jMyGPPAax36J220C_BMFoAnfNIdqCEIwzW80gM7DxeTS8Bh_cLGlBrc70kq5OLeU7u6qNB6PTASdp-Xj532drCuXzvTz4vcV_7EpbWjtqN_zq8dXijY-NXfaP3OJvEwh3epJ7ERR1UuDbZhLaqFlqpqhedKi6ykaLWKH6pZByyButTclkbiDPOCN6Zwc7R6difIR0vKUWqdZ0eHitJ-XVpf6f5CQAA__8HO2Pk) to the Embassy worker. The stabbing occurred as many Muslims across the world took to the streets in protest over the emerging conflict between Hamas and Israel. Former Hamas leader Khaled Mashal [called for a day of "Jihad"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOozAQgOGnMZ0RHhwDBcVJOaS7iGuuyHZoYo_DRCaObCuIt1_t1lv_za_vOi8zcuDn_R9uNBYfF7SF37SoRiotoV105UZPBNRWNCozdDB02qhqHW-NabHrgbrhBFYZ7zW1ugfXN4M1FioeoYFWNUor0PrU185o11l_c10_2BMooRtyXGKqH5GfZSUfjvimVNu4VWFcS3ll0f4SMAmY9n2vy0oP-1UFTE_as4CJc0IKAiYf00ZJrrhhloHQUZIWQ8jSxyQfvKKTaFPMWWLCm9xjCk6WlbP0iR0e0vz5KL__z8dx5r_D5az163qZ5iqN7rVzCJxNJ3Rz35DD92H5GewzAAD__8ibbbc) around the Muslim world on Friday.
## "Rings of Fire" Solar Eclipse Happening Today
A [rare solar eclipse](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1utDAQAJ8GOp-8a_PjwsXXXHdfmxIZe_fYxGAE1qG8fXSpU46mGc3HY3oEybI9_4eVfOUyhVjlRRNoBVahmWybPBMhmZY89G5AN9ge2sWzHp1xkQgNdA57RgTCcQjaxNgxtuJRowENFtDabryl3qYh8pyG0cUOobGaktRy3D6LbHUhzt_lRcctlrXNfql1Pxvzr8F7g_ewb3Sdb_WGo0rM1OD9kO2pCiuWgxTFLPtJ6lpCVbWor61cKjHOycyQejd21iIwWpjZzdZFBjTt4dN-Sc5y9kNj9XMNkn8T6t9HfgIAAP__Rn9gUQ) will be visible in the U.S. today. The moon will blot out all but the edges of the sun--thus the name "rings of fire"--and it will be visible in Oregon around 8 AM local time. The eclipse will then make its way through eight western states (in slivers--[check the path here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71u6yAUAOCngS2IcyB2GBju4i137Wjxc3CosEEGOe3bV-rcF_ik7-O5Pl0u-dj-u53sSHV1YeSLVpA30DdUq-bRJiIkxcnCZGY0s56AvywYY7QPMpD0ynkJSUpSjgD8_ZG059miRAUSNKDW94eIk45zSD7ODxPuCExLinnUU3zWfIwXpfJdLzpFqDsv9jVG60z9Y7gwXPrVxdZTEIfrTmz1Yri8ybvWOsOFQsmt042-WqknnQwXftrY3rmU3KeZabntLpdfevw9_QkAAP__0ONVPw)) and then make its way into Mexico. If you're going to check out today's prelude to the [total solar eclipse](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3ojujjPYA0OXbOna0SJwxFQkWAYl6t9X6dzx6S1P7-uyXnwu-XH79HdxPdXVh56fsiIoZEV65TG6JEKiR3FoFkuLZYPj5oSsNmmmSUuKaHkOemKxnCwEgHQdsyMgjYCMxDzNp2g42pCu0c5LmAgHBom51-P0XfOjb5LKT33KcQr1Pha39b63QX8MdB7o7PeHvNpbveHoORQZ6Pza5BDVq2oiioBY9dp9Ua0WfygJJe9NFKIGgx7maLRMdglmmQGtRkpWxMN4uLi_cim5GTsw3O4-l7-M_v-V3wAAAP__iJNgig) coming in six months, be sure to wear [proper eye protection](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskT-vnTAMxT9N2ILyjz93YECvQurwunToiEJiLq4CQYn7KEs_ewXvduvi87NsH8k6P97Hd4sBt-c3u0JHcxytI_yAUQouDVd6NIXvZgAFuoBO1o9GPRpTy2LptJOVnxqrWmMliEZro7UA1061dBaqAjsllJZCGqmMqdrS18Y3bp580z5cpSQzAjxSTOXPiBstMIczfkAqXVyL0C1Ee2a6Z2pgajiOo3RT3uDI15yp4UKmhiUenCLfUyRwxM_4K3E4IfOE25PHmc-YgOcYbOLgAu4ZbkfNdP-H6Z7gNzH95euWCaxnqlJvVxG0QIKb7EvzDg5t-OTLj6m36fy3fGu_QkJnt88mU4pbXNG9jr5Hh0BnWaTO7weGgLlumBHP1WK4v6b_h_A3AAD__-AThh0).

([Watch](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79ugzAQgPGnsbcg39n48OAhC1u6dkTGf4IrAxFcE-XtK7Vr50_6pN_nbbqF2up2_whr9lz2KUSuzzyBuoC5oJ6MTL7kjFnL7ME6QkfGglw8Qd9HdLbEUmYHZQ7JQBkUJXRakZXVo0INCgygMf3QJWsSxTInGlzsEYRROVXej-5rrxsvubT3_sxHF_dVNr8wP06hrwJHgSO_KvNfEzhe43sTOJ4c-PsUOAIBOoNWWwIL5Bxaefj0eNXW6mlJGHVfQ22_a_5f-hMAAP__4VVRsA)) ➤ **President Biden **stumbled on stairs again yesterday--this time before a speech in Philadelphia. From political upheavals to economic downturns, the world stage is in constant flux. On this day in 1947, Chuck Yeager strapped himself inside the Bell X-1 Glamorous Glennis and . The airplane was built specifically for the task, and Yeager named it after his wife. Hopefully you're doing something more relaxing this weekend than going Mach 1.06 in an experimental aircraft! Jim Jordan (R-OH) for Speaker of the House. However, in a secret ballot taken after the nomination, 55 Republicans said they would not vote for Jordan on the House floor. If he loses more than five, he will not become the Speaker. The vote is expected to , but Jordan says he doesn't want to proceed with the vote until the Republicans have another chance to huddle. Israeli Embassy Worker Assaulted A 50-year-old Israeli man was treated for stab wounds after in front of a supermarket in China yesterday. The man, who works for the Israeli Embassy in China, was seen grappling with the assailant in a video circulating through social media. Beijing police say that the attacker to the Embassy worker. The stabbing occurred as many Muslims across the world took to the streets in protest over the emerging conflict between Hamas and Israel. Former Hamas leader Khaled Mashal around the Muslim world on Friday. "Rings of Fire" Solar Eclipse Happening Today A will be visible in the U.S. today. The moon will blot out all but the edges of the sun--thus the name "rings of fire"--and it will be visible in Oregon around 8 AM local time. The eclipse will then make its way through eight western states (in slivers--) and then make its way into Mexico. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d37f507c71514d43a70de9bd4de4fbb2&_e=NHLPgMeKSKaof5ylscPnk1pHMrPHuNpIB1DpUl7cwtrvX1RFG0CndNxJO0o9O9x6C7hR2-N96vt_OGlCoe6Ugf9Dbowc0N-FtpQ_s3WcqHiNNeHRY1W3CdHcH5nzqUlu_yfbgyaA4MT70UE1sxHNWS-bpiyVTl5c5SCgSe_WTcnZ1TySBsL3w9XznP2CB-DK3p6Nkbo56f-EwUHB8KxEDPr-fDtbmnM2LjPAvvw5-7rBRnNnEi0_1SyFwTh4KZnlqFEIlNkdMf5bVeD7S8uAEUP0_REO44GlEswrEAu0ywdBTOwnZHEDsAqb6rs3WjWrBobEZK06_71t1tYvqaL3uI0dgzdynfbRoSabGUguXF00Zbx8iUAGE1pINgeTvj8Gu_jGNPDjU4Dqy3cJRo0CMZd0piZ9_q1pm6DGs_eq3m0%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d37f507c71514d43a70de9bd4de4fbb2&_e=NHLPgMeKSKaof5ylscPnk1pHMrPHuNpIB1DpUl7cwtrvX1RFG0CndNxJO0o9O9x6C7hR2-N96vt_OGlCoe6Ugf9Dbowc0N-FtpQ_s3WcqHiNNeHRY1W3CdHcH5nzqUlu_yfbgyaA4MT70UE1sxHNWS-bpiyVTl5c5SCgSe_WTcnZ1TySBsL3w9XznP2CB-DK3p6Nkbo56f-EwUHB8KxEDPr-fDtbmnM2LjPAvvw5-7rBRnNnEi0_1SyFwTh4KZnlqFEIlNkdMf5bVeD7S8uAEZ8_wH_JD_L3HDZJKlQ0FPuMk07CeztSjKV1ocTUIa0x3crttKjQLjuyCEiFmCRbdCfTxCLOWTkltgA-YZTRdvPyRc4xnLpbSmOMYVHkA_lJjny5R5oZceCv1_CqoYL06Kgi6tBvkon2J2gi7eC4CN0%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d37f507c71514d43a70de9bd4de4fbb2&_e=NHLPgMeKSKaof5ylscPnk1pHMrPHuNpIB1DpUl7cwtrvX1RFG0CndNxJO0o9O9x6C7hR2-N96vt_OGlCoe6Ugf9Dbowc0N-FtpQ_s3WcqHiNNeHRY1W3CdHcH5nzqUlu_yfbgyaA4MT70UE1sxHNWS-bpiyVTl5c5SCgSe_WTcnZ1TySBsL3w9XznP2CB-DK3p6Nkbo56f-EwUHB8KxEDPr-fDtbmnM2LjPAvvw5-7rBRnNnEi0_1SyFwTh4KZnlqFEIlNkdMf5bVeD7S8uAEUGsug5Lr73duvMTYmAKBDrO9QCGh4vqWpjAoEvJ-vwEFiR04gyJMo9DfjTylVTwBZxG6n8-SsmyvaeGUFQvuVO4jJOnk3SQRLPWnQlKUHgiyTU2A5EUHwca0bcQZoCadq_jJMJURxE44iCEV2L6lb8%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d37f507c71514d43a70de9bd4de4fbb2&_e=NHLPgMeKSKaof5ylscPnk1pHMrPHuNpIB1DpUl7cwtrvX1RFG0CndNxJO0o9O9x6C7hR2-N96vt_OGlCoe6Ugf9Dbowc0N-FtpQ_s3WcqHiNNeHRY1W3CdHcH5nzqUlu_yfbgyaA4MT70UE1sxHNWS-bpiyVTl5c5SCgSe_WTcnZ1TySBsL3w9XznP2CB-DK3p6Nkbo56f-EwUHB8KxEDPr-fDtbmnM2LjPAvvw5-7rBRnNnEi0_1SyFwTh4KZnlqFEIlNkdMf5bVeD7S8uAEcHxfWacKKyCAATgRja-8IzvN8wD8R5Sc5eQ_DU0YgdEkar6O_Oc8XG5yjPiemplExihlzmSqK2iHzH98yVVXYvpzMmE134Y44ZBbg8tjIvBF016bEy1TCgKxMhiFOefjXlur8zC4MO3wuf9YcZOtMA%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e43b108f888d439382480f34519d3c01&_e=XkCvic4hWPLXvCBuK0lA1Aq6tqBSDUcacj4zVVapPkSinMajtsph40DNZsH9X_0NPJt1gnPWt8WuaqdH_NmfQOOmWNQpgCxrKAuXooIrEtW-Z06ypShab33i0IRQI7R4BHJL6dOkF9RfDUppCWZroonjyDmFvPEeawDGM1SzVOZhEBMZpNYKUkdvy1aZlSxD-rttm6pj0bo12jY-ZtpcXPoHud9nQIOysdLonPMLDE3zA6x7-gtXAwVsHuPnbTISkykB3E6l7oLGo01SLJI8Wqd-fiO2vi5Mz7ORW6tfg5hsk4n2rpyWzXBdAwtJrD_fmIoi8xPHtYy_Y-lNvunLBiZgFS-kq59jPTev36rx7deuFvWoRbtWRZN5YKXOEAMJ0EA34YmsKyUWpUbPazxiVvZYAMlepjhnLTVUVfwqXRmNkibdAHAOfPf1RgSNnCuQ7-KFlz1_sfd_svll23S-DnzIrqdOOGa4ffjIhzOG1nDZPeM0XmsU8Kvhm30hwbnP0PRX5iXkHaeIpcMZ9Jgx3RPT4W11EArctEc8NMNCKXOFrGWMPa-QAY9d3sbMllgvhvglyjaty2BcM0l4Yok9Phauq3iCu_hICDs8DU8RXDMsJIR20C63a8Utrj4oc4-f "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

body:

Since I first started working at the pulga with my family, there are a few things that I wholeheartedly believe, and fair wages is one of them. I firmly believe in fair wages for those who work hard to provide for themselves and the people around them. **[Working families should be paid justly for their hard labor and be able to afford childcare for their children, food on the table, a roof over their heads, and clothes on their backs. If you believe that too, will you pitch in whatever you can afford right now so I can get to Washington and fight for fair wages for South Texas?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_7NhKld6MuMfSVorqlWVT0bObL0gtZ0XrMpVXEWGh24jVmsITsowbnjE4P80otq3KGhCpz7Z0q__vpXFFyK6gAI6nC8OHJsnA1PqXtTYalIvajwjcftLKFn3nqAbaiNQ0za5OphQONToiuvGjIA3TwOEMm1_UbMqh3NaaKBAScYT91f1aVmIC2aZaTSxkkldmGlnu5OqjLkWU6PkO1QOsFlTgDH7JYM00uyuG3Al_NEWXX5BkhUoYZ-XRu6F5GTeE8qXrFtuLDouELaIuA8yjORFurpNBynqX6TDva4JP9Ek9Be_GeTQtSdoiG5GULuJij1Jve8CoCgm43-Qby0f7ObX9tAFhOUNM1nzL6uYEsSaylYTTk5WYsl5rlY2pTIb5/40f/Cz9AWzGPSTudFYUyCFO1Eg/h1/4tpIAk_lHP1287LULejmJBeCkb-BH-TZU1cqKQjmu9Y)**

Peter, fair wages for South Texans — and all Americans — is not a radical stance. It shouldn’t be a point of contention.
Yet, for my opponent and her camp, it is.
**Her main focus isn’t you, your family, or the people of South Texas—it’s the special interests and corporations that she continuously sides with and unapologetically accepts thousands and thousands of dollars from.**
TX-15 deserves better than that.
South Texas needs leaders who are on their team, who know the hard work it takes to earn an honest living and provide for their families, and who will fight in Washington so that hard-working families can get fair wages.
**[It’s exactly what I plan on doing when I get into office. But I can’t do it without your help. Will you pitch in right now to help elect a leader who will fight for fair wages in South Texas?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_7NhKld6MuMfSVorqlWVT0bObL0gtZ0XrMpVXEWGh24gtBwl_nkCIogbrQS0ytNkZIWVXLYRuWDDdY3u8TZFJbVp65GrLQpE4xSmz0wofLZSFcKGh6Vi3kZqG9V7KmMRPU3nkM6UuWZVkcoLeigV3gcZ2knFGLZObp6hxID3NGziqLJIpaZUbH-NMUzyqsV-YPQ-N6Vozpoyz67XZeql5stZEE-MngUmzHJwx7Ueh3zoHW2sR6AaaJ8Lt_UETh33BK1vRzGS3zVXlOmiBNzDHS0K2HJDpOlRi2W89Zb8FbYxih08k_lahZ_sU5_tizAxs6MmzNqOmR7P9t-Fk1pgnn6qpoulwoe0y5ItgwCDrjTQRXGLtaBd2I3JWazZ0_VEW/40f/Cz9AWzGPSTudFYUyCFO1Eg/h8/yHkkPgLqoxqMI_90Dx86NLZj7muQATOflxAFltfbe5Y) **

clean_body: Working families deserve fair wages for their labor | | | Since I first started working at the pulga with my family, there are a few things that I wholeheartedly believe, and fair wages is one of them. I firmly believe in fair wages for those who work hard to provide for themselves and the people around them. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | Peter, fair wages for South Texans — and all Americans — is not a radical stance. It shouldn’t be a point of contention. Yet, for my opponent and her camp, it is. Her main focus isn’t you, your family, or the people of South Texas—it’s the special interests and corporations that she continuously sides with and unapologetically accepts thousands and thousands of dollars from. TX-15 deserves better than that. South Texas needs leaders who are on their team, who know the hard work it takes to earn an honest living and provide for their families, and who will fight in Washington so that hard-working families can get fair wages. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Michelle Vallejo | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Ramona Morales
subject: Embrace your role as a catalyst for change!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Hey team,
As we navigate the everchanging redistricting landscape, your steadfast commitment remains our North Star. [**Your participation in our upcoming National Volunteer Call on October 16th, 2023, at 8:00 PM EST is crucial to staying informed and strategically advancing our mission.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71545396/432481703/684926256?utm_campaign=20231014_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite&refcode=20231014_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwMDRkNDk1LTkxNmEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QZrAX02q5ybrYEm4xVgkkYKwzfUERGfXeJUZ7php-9o=&emci=0cc55ce1-de69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=6004d495-916a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)
[RSVP](https://www.mobilize.us/allontheline/event/271054/?utm_campaign=20231014_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite?refcode=20231014_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite)
---
[**Here's a glimpse of what to expect:**](https://www.mobilize.us/allontheline/event/271054/?utm_campaign=20231014_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite?refcode=20231014_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite)
* **Alabama's Congressional Map Redraw:** We'll delve into the implications of Alabama's new congressional map, examining how it impacts fair representation in the state.
* **Nationwide Congressional Map Redraws:** Understand the ongoing efforts across the country to redraw congressional maps and explore advocacy strategies to ensure inclusivity and representation.
* **Current Court Cases:** We’ll discuss the current redistricting court cases being heard across the country, including a major case in the US Supreme Court.

---
This call is not just an update -- it's a strategic discussion on the urgent redistricting fight and advocacy efforts that will shape our democracy in the months ahead.
[**RSVP to join us in this important conversation! ➡️**](https://www.mobilize.us/allontheline/event/271054/?utm_campaign=20231014_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite?refcode=20231014_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite)
[](https://www.mobilize.us/allontheline/event/271054/?utm_campaign=20231014_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite?refcode=20231014_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite)
---
Your dedication to the fair maps movement is the compass that guides us. Let's chart a course toward a fairer democracy where every voice matters.
\-- Ramona Morales
Organizing Manager

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

name: Team Andy Kim
subject: [PETITION] Expel Sen. Menendez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
|

**Today, Senator Menendez was indicted for acting as an unregistered agent of a foreign government.**
Before I came to Congress, I worked in national security. I swore an oath to defend our constitution at all costs. So when I read the new indictment against Senator Bob Menendez, I had no doubt what needed to happen.
**Today, because of the severity of the charges against him, I think the US Senate should vote to expel Senator Menendez.**

I am hopeful that the judicial system will work thoroughly and quickly to bring the truth to light. _This is my Senator._ _He represents me, my family, and our state._
New Jerseyans need a Senator in this seat that we can trust beyond a shadow of a doubt to put the interests of our people, our state, and our country first.
[**I'm running against Senator Menendez to restore integrity in our politics. name: Dr. Cornel West
subject: We must demand peace
body:
This is a fight for justice.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231012all_demandpeace&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, How is it that our nation’s dysfunctional government can only seem to arrive at bipartisanship for funding wars and increasing military budgets at the expense of poor and working-class people struggling to make ends meet and pull themselves out of poverty? The answer is greed. I call on world leaders, especially those from Western colonial nations, to be conscious of their rhetoric and actions to not add fuel to a violent fire that has been raging for decades. President Biden’s baleful, one-sided comments to the nation and the world on the terrible violence in Palestine and Israel were the direct antithesis of the requisite leadership to engender an immediate cessation of crimes against humanity and a pathway to lasting peace. After ordering a naval battle group into a region already trapped in a cauldron of war and senseless suffering, President Biden upped the ante by committing the United States and the people’s hard-earned money to another war of attrition. Worse yet, Congress, still without a Speaker of the House, is working to pass a resolution that will send even more military aid to Israel for operations that will result in greater bloodshed. And Joe Biden’s Defense Secretary just confirmed that more of your hard-earned money will be sent to increase military operations in Israel and Ukraine. **The war machine of the deadly duopoly must be stopped, defunded, and deracinated before we find ourselves in a calamitous third world war.**
---
That’s why, as part of my Pillars for Truth, Justice, and Love, I committed to slashing the U.S. military budget and ceasing military spending in the Eastern European and Middle Eastern theaters. But the truth is, we can’t wait until I become president to stop the duopoly’s bellicose initiatives – we must act now and prevent more slaughter of innocent people, many of them children and elders. “Ordering” one million people living in an open-air prison to simply move somewhere else is unacceptable.

**I urge you to[call, write, tweet, and otherwise message President Biden and your elected lawmakers by clicking here and demand they stop paving the road to war and start building bridges to peace.](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=4zPoMjcQ6pg4TRhHiuVjVQcwYJh_obFbrhshVYeKR5myEXo5EY9CsAX3ROxwM4JK&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231012all_demandpeace&n=2)**

This is no time for placing party loyalty over people and the planet. We need independent voices speaking out and coming together for a collective call for immediate and lasting peace. The truth is until we achieve justice for the precious Palestinian people, there will never be peace for precious Jewish people, nor the opportunity for both to live together with love through truth, reconciliation, and deep healing. **We need fewer weapons, less vindictive rhetoric, and more truth, more love, and more justice. Together, we can send our lawmakers and the world a message that we not only choose peace, we demand it.**
---
May all those suffering find immediate solace and safety, **Dr. Cornel West**
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231012all_demandpeace&n=3 "JOIN US") [JOIN US](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231012all_demandpeace&n=3)
---
Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20231012all_demandpeace&n=4)
---

clean_body: And we need to be prepared for what comes next. Today’s the day, Peter! I can’t tell you how fired up I am about this primary — we are closer than EVER to making our vision for a safer, smarter, healthier, and wealthier Louisiana a reality! But first things first: We have to hit the ground running once we emerge from the primary tonight, as pundits have predicted. That’s because MAGA frontrunner Jeff Landry has already received substantial out-of-state support from national Republicans, and it’s only going to skyrocket once he becomes the official GOP nominee. We need to be READY for what comes next, and since this campaign has always been one of, by, and for working Louisianans, I’m counting on you to help us take this campaign to the next level after tonight! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = It’s our time, Louisiana. Thank you so much for all your support thus far — let’s go! \- Shawn Wilson = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Political pundits will tell you that Republicans in Tennessee, including my opponent, have an iron grip on our state. But then I talk to voters, hearing about your concerns and discussing solutions to the problems facing our state. **It’s beyond clear that folks are sick and tired of Marsha Blackburn and the Tennessee GOP.** And this campaign (that YOU are building alongside me!) is giving them a run for their money. Marsha Blackburn knows that she has a real fight ahead of her. That’s why she hasn’t hesitated to attack our campaign. But it just goes to show that she knows that our dedicated grassroots resistance can overcome her entrenched power. I have something Marsha doesn’t: _you._ **_[I firmly believe that a grassroots, people-powered movement _can_ defeat Marsha Blackburn and the GOP — but it won’t be easy. Right now, we’re looking for 3,000 grassroots donors to chip in before we reach the halfway mark of the month on Monday. | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

[There’s a movement afoot for change — join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71550069/432494703/-849459103?refcode=ea.0c0c06c2-956a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0c0c06c2-956a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzBjMDZjMi05NTZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmcNSznLSZGUcSOu9B4u3sTeFjjNnv42i_1n5ChF4QE=&emci=dbfa792b-186a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=0c0c06c2-956a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71550070/432494704/209297649?amount=25&refcode=ea.0c0c06c2-956a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0c0c06c2-956a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzBjMDZjMi05NTZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmcNSznLSZGUcSOu9B4u3sTeFjjNnv42i_1n5ChF4QE=)

clean_body: Defeating Marsha Blackburn won’t be cheap or easy. | Political pundits will tell you that Republicans in Tennessee, including my opponent, have an iron grip on our state. But then I talk to voters, hearing about your concerns and discussing solutions to the problems facing our state. It’s beyond clear that folks are sick and tired of Marsha Blackburn and the Tennessee GOP. And this campaign (that YOU are building alongside me!) is giving them a run for their money. Marsha Blackburn knows that she has a real fight ahead of her. That’s why she hasn’t hesitated to attack our campaign. But it just goes to show that she knows that our dedicated grassroots resistance can overcome her entrenched power. I have something Marsha doesn’t: you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I knew I could count on you, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. | | Patriot,

---
All election forecasts show that Wisconsin will be “the tipping point” state of the 2024 election.
---
It’s the quickest path to officially crossing 270 electoral votes — and you know what that means: _winning back the White House_.

---
_So, it’s my great honor to tell you that a new poll with an “A rating” shows us winning Wisconsin!
_
---
**While other candidates in the primary are struggling to break into the double digits, our campaign is already leading in swing states against Crooked Joe in the general election.**

---
We are in a league of our own. We’re up so big Republicans should train our fire on Biden.

---
_But I also know perfectly well that Disloyal Republicans have a burning passion for trying to stab me in the back, so I’m not writing the primary off just yet._
---
They will try and pull any trick they can to try and rob us of the nomination. They’ve admitted both out in the open and behind closed doors that they are plotting different ways to try and take us down in the primary.
---

clean_body: But there’s one caveat... | | | | | Patriot, All election forecasts show that Wisconsin will be “the tipping point” state of the 2024 election. It’s the quickest path to officially crossing 270 electoral votes — and you know what that means: winning back the White House. So, it’s my great honor to tell you that a new poll with an “A rating” shows us winning Wisconsin! While other candidates in the primary are struggling to break into the double digits, our campaign is already leading in swing states against Crooked Joe in the general election. We are in a league of our own. We’re up so big Republicans should train our fire on Biden. But I also know perfectly well that Disloyal Republicans have a burning passion for trying to stab me in the back, so I’m not writing the primary off just yet. They will try and pull any trick they can to try and rob us of the nomination. They’ve admitted both out in the open and behind closed doors that they are plotting different ways to try and take us down in the primary. So, it comes down to something very simple: if it’s not close, they can’t cheat! That’s why we need to keep surging even higher until our lead is so unbelievably massive, the RINOS cower in fear and drop to their knees in surrender — just as they are so accustomed to doing! Today, I’m asking you to make a contribution to our Primary Victory Fund so that we can keep surging ahead in every primary and caucus in the nation and wrap up the primary ASAP. Of course, let me once again say that if you are doing poorly due to the Crook in the White House who is setting the world on fire, then just hit the back button and go about your day. I simply wanted to share this good news with you at a time when there is so much bad news consuming our days. (And that will change as soon as I return to the White House!) | | Thank you, Donald J. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, this is URGENT. Right now, we’re on track to MISS our mid-month goal as the Democrats are closing in on this district. With this being one of the most vulnerable districts in Florida, we can’t afford to miss a single goal. Right now, our House majority is razor-thin, and we can’t risk losing any seats. If we lose this district, the Democrats will have a wide open path to take the rest of Florida. With a strong grassroots team, I know we can defend this seat, but meeting this goal could be the difference between defending or losing Florida. We’ve taken on the Left before, and I know we can win again - but only with the support of grassroots conservatives like you. | | Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

name: KilbaneWins
subject: Personal note from Mark
body:
Good afternoon,

My campaign is finally underway! I'm meeting with several veterans'
groups next week, which is one of my key policy areas. The modest
cost-of-living increases aren't even close to covering real inflation,
and VA healthcare remains a disaster. I stand firm in my commitment to
protecting families and reducing runaway inflation.

At this critical stage, I want to personally reach out to ask for a
donation. Contributions now are far more impactful than they will be in
6 months. We must have a good initial showing to signal viability and
fund the campaign's basic infrastructure, which is exceedingly
expensive.

I'd be grateful for your immediate help endorsing conservative values
and adding sanity to the House.

DONATE HERE:
https://secure.winred.com/kilbane-the-right-way-2024/donate-today

Regards,

Mark

[Although we prefer online donations through the link above to the
WinRed platform, paper donation checks are welcome. Checks must be made
out to "Kilbane - The Right Way 2024" and returned to our processor at
7715 Mary Cassatt Drive #101, Potomac, MD 20854. Please include a note
with your check with your name, mailing address, occupation [which can
be "retired"], and name of employer, which are required under federal
law. Checks received without this information will be returned to you.]

--
Mark J. Kilbane

Republican Candidate, U.S. House of Representatives, NH-02

1-833-WEWIN24 (1 833 939-4624)

KILBANEWINS.COM

-------------------------

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report
the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of persons
who contribute more than $200 in an election cycle. Contributions to the
organization are not deductible for federal income tax purposes as
charitable contributions.
-------------------------

_CONFIDENTIALITY NOTICE:_ This email and files attached to it are
confidential. If you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby
notified that using, copying, distributing or taking any action in
reliance on the contents of this information is strictly prohibited. If
you have received this email in error, please notify the sender and
delete this email.

clean_body: We have an incredible update: = | Hi fellow activist, Last weekend, the affiliated non-partisan organization, New PA Project Education Fund, hosted a voter registration blitz at Penn State University in state college to register students to vote on campus and we have an incredible update: The New PA Project Education Fund aimed to register 407 Penn State Students to vote and exceeded that goal, collecting a whopping 420 voter registration forms! = Once again, great conversations were had with students about when, where, and how they can vote on November 7. By targeting specific groups – like college students – the canvassers were able to provide civic education to ensure these students will vote in 2023 and beyond. But here’s the thing: there are critical elections happening in just a few weeks, so we cannot afford to slow down. And we need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. **= = = = Here we GO, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. **=** ****PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023**** Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 **** ** || || || ** New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Respectfully.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

I’m at a bit of a loss, Peter.
Kari Lake announced her campaign on Tuesday, October 10th.
We saw a huge swing of support — endorsements, media coverage, and most importantly to our ultimate chances at winning this race, donations.
It was incredible, honestly.
But starting yesterday, things started to taper off a bit. Sorry to be so honest here, but to beat Kari Lake and Kyrsten Sinema, we can’t have bad days.
Now, I know there’s a lot going on in the world right now. I know there are a lot of people asking you to donate. And I know it can seem really overwhelming. Really, I do.
And I never thought I’d have to ask so many people I’ve never met to support me, to back this campaign, to help me defend our Senate majority. But that is what I have to do. I have to ask you for your help.
So please. I am respectfully asking:
[**Make your first donation to this campaign today. $3 to help us get back on track and win this race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231014-1&t=1&akid=1330%2E734936%2EcXvXBw)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-oct23.sGe5d1&refcode=em231014-1&t=21&akid=1330%2E734936%2EcXvXBw)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-oct23.w_T1Qs&refcode=em231014-1&t=22&akid=1330%2E734936%2EcXvXBw)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-oct23.GsFzby&refcode=em231014-1&t=23&akid=1330%2E734936%2EcXvXBw)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-oct23.T1UQyl&refcode=em231014-1&t=24&akid=1330%2E734936%2EcXvXBw)**

****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-oct23.Ns39yQ&refcode=em231014-1&t=25&akid=1330%2E734936%2EcXvXBw)**

****
That’s what these emails are for — to raise the money we need to take back this seat from Kyrsten Sinema. To defend it from the likes of Kari Lake and anyone else who lines up against us.
I hope you’re with me.
-Ruben

subject: Huizenga Supports Jordan for House Speaker.

# We don’t need more insurrectionist in office.
|
---

Dear West Michigan Community,
We hope this newsletter finds you well and informed about the latest developments in our vibrant region. There are a few important topics we'd like to discuss with you today.
1\. Jim Jordan's Support: Bad for West Michigan. We believe it's vital to stay informed about our local representatives and their actions. Recently, Jim Jordan had Bill Huizenga's support, which, in our view, is not in the best interest of our community. It's crucial that we hold our elected officials accountable and ensure they represent our values and aspirations.
2\. Joseph Alfonso: A Defender of the ConstitutionOn a more positive note, we'd like to recognize Joseph Alfonso, a U.S. Marine combat veteran who took an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. Joseph's commitment to our nation's fundamental principles is a shining example of public service, and we applaud his dedication to the values that make our country strong.
3\. Community Events: Stay engaged with our community by participating in local events, from farmer's markets to charity drives. These gatherings are an excellent opportunity to connect with fellow West Michiganders and support the vibrant culture of our region. Keep an eye on our social media and website for event updates.
4\. Upcoming Elections: As elections approach, we encourage all residents to exercise their civic duty and participate in the democratic process. Make your voice heard by casting your vote and ensuring that the future of West Michigan is shaped by the people's will.
We appreciate your engagement in our wonderful community. Stay informed, stay involved, and together, we can make West Michigan an even better place to live.
Best regards,
Alfonso for Congress Team
| [LEARN MORE](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=279f4a867e&e=16d812e81c)

# EVERY DOLLAR
# COUNTS!

---
Thank you for considering our cause and its potential impact on workers within our district.
Let's collaborate in building a future where fairness thrives and workers' potential knows no bounds.
Visit alfonsoforcongress.com and click "Give Today" to contribute securely.
Every donation, big or small, makes a difference.
Thank you for believing in our cause.
Together, we'll build a Michigan that works for everyone, reflecting the spirit of democracy.
With heartfelt gratitude,
Alfonso For Congress Team

# [Tell Judge Chutkan to reject Trump's ridiculous request to have his federal charges thrown out](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1061f2f1-f435-4b4b-8b85-04698df7168a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te50ec8a6-170b-428f-8343-007d3b979780/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump's lawyers are trying just about anything to help Trump avoid being held accountable for his many crimes. Here's their latest ridiculous attempt: _Lawyers for former President Donald J. Trump asked a judge on Thursday to _[_throw out_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T113d84b5-611d-4177-bab7-c2594d5f46f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _ a federal indictment accusing him of conspiring to overturn the 2020 election and claimed that because the charges relate to actions he took as president, he should be "absolutely immune from prosecution."_ Trump tried to overthrow our democracy, and because he was president, these lawyers say he shouldn't be held accountable for anything he did while in office. This is absurd – Trump and everyone involved in the attempt to steal the 2020 election should have the book thrown at them. Tanya Chutkan, the judge overseeing the case, should absolutely reject this ridiculous request. We want her to know she has our support. [**Add your name: Tell Judge Chutkan to reject Trump's ridiculous request to have his federal charges thrown out >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c7fd89f-ac33-4920-b201-4f9fb512ed54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Donald Trump's lawyers are trying just about anything to help Trump avoid being held accountable for his many crimes. Here's their latest ridiculous attempt: Lawyers for former President Donald J. Trump asked a judge on Thursday to a federal indictment accusing him of conspiring to overturn the 2020 election and claimed that because the charges relate to actions he took as president, he should be "absolutely immune from prosecution." Trump tried to overthrow our democracy, and because he was president, these lawyers say he shouldn't be held accountable for anything he did while in office. This is absurd – Trump and everyone involved in the attempt to steal the 2020 election should have the book thrown at them. Tanya Chutkan, the judge overseeing the case, should absolutely reject this ridiculous request. We want her to know she has our support. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action [P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below] | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

Fellow American,

**My race will be one of the most competitive races in the entire country next year.**

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

name: Juanita at United We Dream Action
subject: DACA is likely headed to the Supreme Court
body:
DACA’s future is still in limbo. | | | One month ago, we got the decision from Judge Hanen that we’d been anticipating for months — **and it was about as bad as we expected, Peter.** Judge Hanen ruled against DACA and doubled down on his decision to halt new applications — leaving hundreds of thousands of immigrant youth in limbo. The case will likely head to the Supreme Court next, and the only thing we know for certain is we’ll need to fight like hell to keep DACA protections in place. But DACA was never enough. It left out millions of undocumented folks who weren’t eligible for DACA, and the protections afforded never went far enough **(proven by the fact that they are vulnerable to attacks from right-wing politicians and judges!)** **That’s why there’s now a greater urgency for a true and expansive pathway to citizenship.** Years of Congressional inaction and broken promises have led to this moment. Biden and Congress cannot wait any longer and must act NOW to permanently protect millions of people, not just DACA recipients or immigrant youth, facing the threat of deportation. **Donate now to help UWDA prepare for the DACA fight ahead and win permanent protections for DACA recipients and all 11 million undocumented people.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8CyraxqLLfAsc7Mu4MEH22nEZGSLCSm9HgCsMIZhMTf7yiCvFmjMDwGzto7CpQhGLYBPJLkw20hqcI8hKo0XcqLGzkOvC2HaiJHNKIWwYkqN48wa3bFfaeITG2rS1dWb9d549KVkfWbxyvN2QiJnaU_Sp2Zo6J0Ue8vigoybpxwqU9XxYwYpkSlWQQI24diXl0XK6V1DH9ueSp-RUSCZjdAd8cnFUepsX1aAk696ASFyjFyA0gfyQU-zfAZnMHqmSD_uzwhDd-aTXCjnPXJO7ZViDWhs7cKUSIikCf66NTj94hZxqr2IhWBkb5n5irvjuhH0_c8h3UxND50mRxhV_LE82zKjkn1Vr6GT0pdy3IbZePVDhwYtZx1ea8uhyiD54SMDScXbQsfsau4VWRDsfdjSkKpQnM-1DDyF8avjGFMbtlyWO0sipSBBsFEZYz_9reS-I0OY4ZMzqoMz73RGIwg/40f/9b-WXmf7RKqQQWwBP2TSzg/h0/0OXP-FFoZ_2norNVkGbBzsackPGeQXtlnlP0zpwwKKI)

clean_body: DACA’s future is still in limbo. | | | One month ago, we got the decision from Judge Hanen that we’d been anticipating for months — and it was about as bad as we expected, Peter. Judge Hanen ruled against DACA and doubled down on his decision to halt new applications — leaving hundreds of thousands of immigrant youth in limbo. The case will likely head to the Supreme Court next, and the only thing we know for certain is we’ll need to fight like hell to keep DACA protections in place. But DACA was never enough. It left out millions of undocumented folks who weren’t eligible for DACA, and the protections afforded never went far enough (proven by the fact that they are vulnerable to attacks from right-wing politicians and judges!) That’s why there’s now a greater urgency for a true and expansive pathway to citizenship. Years of Congressional inaction and broken promises have led to this moment. Biden and Congress cannot wait any longer and must act NOW to permanently protect millions of people, not just DACA recipients or immigrant youth, facing the threat of deportation. Donate now to help UWDA prepare for the DACA fight ahead and win permanent protections for DACA recipients and all 11 million undocumented people. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We know DACA is right and legal, and this fight is far from over. Thank you for standing with us, Juanita, United We Dream Action | If you’ve been on the fence about starting a recurring donation, now’s the time to maximize your impact. Help us win permanent protections for all 11 million by starting a monthly donation: | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Teichert on the Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2b24aee903ce/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6669950?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
**Teichert on the Trail** October 14, 2023
Welcome to Teichert on the Trail, a weekly email highlighting the latest news and events from the campaign as retired Air Force General John Teichert earns the hearts and votes of Marylanders in the race to be their next U.S. Senator.
|
---
# In The News....
John joined a number of television programs and radio shows to talk about his newly announced bid for the U.S. Senate and then lend his expertise as a General in the United States Air Force to talk about the terrorist attack on Israel at the hands of Hamas and the subsequent conflict in the Middle East.
As a U.S. Senator, Teichert said he’ll focus on issues that matter to Marylanders like education, where he argues **“we need to equip our young people to be skilled in those areas that will give them success and opportunities in life.”**
Check out his interviews below:
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=138a0839dc&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John joined [NewsNation](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=eec845f924&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to talk about the war in Israel where he called on the U.S. to show “capability and resolve that indicates that America is standing by its long-term friend in Israel. That includes, practically, what steps we have or will take like replenishing supplies or providing help in deterrence or evacuating non-combatants that are U.S. citizens.”
| | | | | | | | | | [Listen Here](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ce5fa6afdf&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| [Listen Here](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=7e1743c9df&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| John also joined [Todd Starnes](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=072f9eda8c&e=1b1fb1ad9f) (1:39:47 - 1:50:24) to talk about his candidacy and the war in Israel.
---
John also joined [Andrew Wilkow](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=50b819fa77&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to talk about his race for the U.S. Senate.
John has also been vocal in our defense and support of Israel and what this war means for our country and the world. **“We, as the United States, need to continue our unwavering support of Israel in the days, weeks, and months ahead.”**
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=2a729933bd&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=a06bf5ff77&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
|
---
# On the Trail...
It’s also been a busy few weeks on the campaign trail, with John traveling around the state to talk with voters and share his message of leadership, not politics, with folks across Maryland. Here are just a few places he’s been in recent weeks!
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=7ea664ee0f&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e129cf0329&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=46a511f319&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e664377f4d&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=cd27398919&e=1b1fb1ad9f)| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=3968428a34&e=1b1fb1ad9f)| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e9c1759758&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---|---|---
| [TEICHERTFORMARYLAND.COM](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=434ae83e1d&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
|
---
# Thoughts...
**“The dysfunction in Washington, D.C. makes the world a more dangerous place.”**
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=73f8022ff0&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
|
---
| [DONATE](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=990ea707cd&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

name: Team Lucas
subject: The first deadline of our last fundraising quarter of 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — here are three reasons why you should donate $3 or more toward our mid-month goal of raising 5,000 individual donations to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce before 11:59PM on Monday:
**[CHIP IN $3 NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38557?refcode=em20231014-3984&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3984%2E614464%2Ez0Zf4P)**
1. **Josh Hawley is the most vulnerable GOP Senator running for re-election in 2024 — and now, he’s neck-and-neck with Lucas Kunce.** A recent report from _Morning Consult_ found Hawley’s approvals _even lower_ than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida. And last month, a new poll found that he’s in a dead heat with Lucas in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race.
2. **GOP insiders + corporate elites are already dumping money into our race.** After it became clear that Lucas is a real threat to their corrupt status quo, they launched a new Super PAC with more than $1 million that’s ready to fund whatever desperate attacks about Lucas they can come up with.
3. **Lucas is building this campaign to replace Josh Hawley the right way,** without a cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil + Big Pharma executives. He’s relying on everyday people like you to fuel this movement — and now that we’re in our final fundraising quarter of 2023, we need your help to start this thing off strong.

**[So Peter, can you rush a donation of $3 or more to our campaign today so we can take advantage of this opportunity to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and hit our goal before 11:59PM on Monday?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38557?refcode=em20231014-3984&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3984%2E614464%2Ez0Zf4P)**
**[CHIP IN $3 NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38557?refcode=em20231014-3984&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3984%2E614464%2Ez0Zf4P)**
We couldn’t do this without you.
Thanks for everything,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231014-3984-footer&t=4&refcode2=3984_614464_z0Zf4P&akid=3984%2E614464%2Ez0Zf4P)**
