body:
Sharing an important step on how I plan to win. Hey Peter - Wesley here.

A few days ago, I had a meeting with my campaign team, where I outlined my three-step plan to FIRE Josh Hawley. While the details of the meeting will remain a secret for now, I've decided to share with you the most important step on how I plan to win here in Missouri.

As one of the only candidates who has taken on a seven-term incumbent, I know what it means to go against a goliath in the political world. It takes conviction, determination, and a willingness to step outside of one's comfort.

To win, we've centered our strategy on organizing all throughout Missouri. But reaching the voters we need to win won't be easy – or cheap. That's why we're counting on this grassroots team to help propel us forward to victory.

That means **ORGANIZING** from the ground up, **MEETING** people where they are, and **SPEAKING** to them directly about the issues that matter the most.

But for my campaign to scale up to this challenge of organizing all throughout Missouri, from St. Louis County all the way to Kansas City, Jackson County, and beyond, I **need** your grassroots support. And that's why my campaign has set up a mid-month goal to raise $15,0000 by Sunday night to jump-start our organizing efforts.

clean_body: The amount of cash my opponent has to spend this early in the race is astonishing. | | Fellow Conservative, We’re a little more than a year out from the election and already Jon Tester is breaking fundraising records. Jon Tester is a lot of things: A DC career politician, #1 recipient of lobbyist cash, a liberal hypocrite, and a footsoldier for Biden and progressive Democrats. One thing he is not is a weak fundraiser. Tester raised $5 million in the 1st quarter. Tester raised $5 million in the 2nd quarter. Tester raised $5 million in the 3rd quarter. Tester now has more than $13 million cash-on-hand to spend on his re-election campaign. Given that more than $170,000,000 was spent on the 2020 Montana Senate race, there is going to be plenty more coming in from Tester’s biggest fans - elitists on the liberal coasts - to ensure they keep a strong liberal vote in office. Fellow Conservative, the Senate majority runs through Montana. – anything – right now because we need to take back our country from the Democrats and career politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Jon Tester. clean_body: | | | = Team: This is despicable. We learned earlier this week that Gov. Youngkin’s Spirit of Virginia PAC is dropping $1.4 million on a massive ad blitz in key battleground districts. = | | | = Youngkin is blanketing the airwaves with these ads to 1) give his right-wing allies the upper hand, and 2) mislead voters about his true stance on abortion. However, the evidence speaks for itself. Youngkin: Lied about his stance on abortion during his 2021 campaign Was caught on tape admitting he lied about his abortion stance saying that “as a campaign topic, sadly, that in fact won’t win my independent votes that I have to get.” Promised to go “on the offensive” against abortion rights in Virginia Said publicly that he’ll sign any abortion ban that reaches his desk “with a smile” Voters don’t need to be bombarded with lies and spin. They need the truth about what’s really at stake in this election. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Together, Elaine Luria | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. According to the latest fundraising reports, it’s clear Brian is the front-runner in the race for TX-32. His history of service and commitment to ending the gun violence epidemic, protecting reproductive freedom, and improving our broken healthcare system is resonating with the people of Texas. As a trauma surgeon, veteran, and Texan, Dr. Brian Williams has the frontline experience to deliver results and save lives.

But if we’re going to send him to Washington in 2024, we need to make sure our fundraising stays on track.

**[Rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can right now to help this campaign reach our fundraising goal before tomorrow’s deadline.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brian-williams-october-2023?refcode=em23_231014_MM3DS_fnd_gq_act___ABTW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231014_MM3DS_fnd_gq_act___ABTW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=f3d86959-a26a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73

Anna Brichacek

ATTN: Friend,
President Donald J. Trump authorized **“****THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST****”** to defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts.
The President is _eternally grateful_ for all of his many trusted supporters who accepted their invitations to become Founding Members of the Trust.

Friend, have you heard what Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) is trying to do to our Social Security benefits?
**After overseeing the largest Medicare fraud in HISTORY, Scott is trying to use his power in Washington to END Social Security!**
Unlike Rick Scott, most Americans aren’t worth up to a quarter of a billion dollars. Millions of us rely on Social Security benefits to make ends meet and retire in dignity. We’ve spent decades paying into these crucial programs, and now, Rick Scott thinks he can take those benefits away.
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell knows that we need to _protect_ and _expand_ Social Security, not destroy it. **That’s why she’s running to defeat Scott and ensure that Americans can count on Social Security for generations to come.**
But we need to know where Americans like you stand. **Please, respond before midnight tonight to tell Rick Scott whether you support Social Security:**
**D o you support Social Security?**

clean_body: we chose you but never heard back... Friend, we specifically chose you to participate in our new Social Security poll, but we're still missing your response! Rick Scott has spent years attacking Social Security — he even wrote the plan to END it! Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is 100% committed to defending our benefits in Washington, but she has to know if grassroots activists are going to have her back on this critical issue. That's why these survey results are SO important to our team. We need another 19 responses from 34223 before midnight tonight to reach statistical significance in our dataset, so we're really counting on you to step up. Please, will you tell us where you stand? D o you support Social Security? | | | | \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Blue Florida 2024 Date: Tue, Oct 3, 2023 Subject: Do you support Social Security? | | | | | : YOU HAVE BEEN SELECTED TO PARTICIPATE IN A NEW ONLINE POLL. PLEASE RESPOND IMMEDIATELY: Do you support Social Security? | | | | Survey closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight Friend, have you heard what Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) is trying to do to our Social Security benefits? After overseeing the largest Medicare fraud in HISTORY, Scott is trying to use his power in Washington to END Social Security! Unlike Rick Scott, most Americans aren’t worth up to a quarter of a billion dollars. Millions of us rely on Social Security benefits to make ends meet and retire in dignity. We’ve spent decades paying into these crucial programs, and now, Rick Scott thinks he can take those benefits away. Debbie Mucarsel-Powell knows that we need to protect and expand Social Security, not destroy it. That’s why she’s running to defeat Scott and ensure that Americans can count on Social Security for generations to come. But we need to know where Americans like you stand. Please, respond before midnight tonight to tell Rick Scott whether you support Social Security: D o you support Social Security? | | | | Thank you, Team DMP | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

We are proud to support Laurel in her efforts to reshape the RNC in the image of the Grassroots and America First movements. | == | == | == | | | | == | Enjoy live music from Lee & Co, featuring special guest performances on the CADA patio from Princess Wallace, and Weston Imer & the 45's. If you are interested in joining the Campaign Kickoff Host Committee for this event please email mailto:info@prodigyconsultinggroupllc.org with the Subject "10/21 Host Committee" for more information. name: Team DeSantis
subject: We find this insulting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=488be0eac44b134fbad5d4e741db7d19178c21f2e278ff21163abe1ad56b4f004225808563ad864c5ae54571340b9e70b569620bdaa06cde79cc310f56fe13a6682112c94bef0d224abe8f28df5fb957

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1709f7f079ad0aeb92cbc6e7e14f556571c1bd4e36e4d5a925d078d8e114fc67ddafe7b20031c4c1541425942f6b8812702250dfcc42cd92085fa683af30476b

Friend,

Here's what we know:

-
There are candidates in this race who are criticizing Israel during their darkest hour.
-
There are candidates in this race praising the terror groups that have waged atrocious brutality against our greatest ally in the Middle East.
-
There are candidates in this race flip-flopping on their positions to conform to whatever stance is most trendy.
- There is one candidate in this race who has taken decisive action to rescue Americans, cut off the funding of state sponsors of terrorism, and looked directly into the cameras of news channels to declare unwavering support for the Israelis.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1709f7f079ad0aeb92cbc6e7e14f556571c1bd4e36e4d5a925d078d8e114fc67ddafe7b20031c4c1541425942f6b8812702250dfcc42cd92085fa683af30476b

Ron DeSantis would be a President who will take action in times of dire crisis. He served in Iraq, friend. He knows the stakes; he's seen the bloodshed. He knows what it takes to stand on the side of freedom. For Governor DeSantis, this is personal.

Right now, the United States needs a leader with the focus, discipline, and determination to handle the dangerous world we live in. Joe Biden is asleep at the wheel, and it's clear he is not fit for the job if he can't take a 2 AM phone call.

The system today is broken. We want your help to elect the only leader in this race who will fix it. If you'd like to support Ron DeSantis today to be the United States' next leader, we'd love to have your support. You can chip in below to help him out.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1709f7f079ad0aeb92cbc6e7e14f556571c1bd4e36e4d5a925d078d8e114fc67ddafe7b20031c4c1541425942f6b8812702250dfcc42cd92085fa683af30476b
Donate to Ron DeSantis for President

If you cannot donate, know that your support is appreciated nonetheless.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1709f7f079ad0aeb646946778dbf0e3fd68b8f323d299022088b8207ebf6ad14202805c5f4e1f453afffa2989593dc8c28e7ee1f089bac90eace7973565aac8f

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1709f7f079ad0aeb4eab0d496d423035b3e101ad54a2005828534758bac653c0195f7daa96eac111dd4ec4e244f2c1efa35bc2092f41000380efc5326e18aac4
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1709f7f079ad0aeb361423dec1a40f0cb4895ab25cc0b7403a67f893a14bcf236deb286b425255f988d3c4deccbb49942dfdb920baf33d32fddc58227fa816d8
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1709f7f079ad0aeb92cbc6e7e14f556571c1bd4e36e4d5a925d078d8e114fc67ddafe7b20031c4c1541425942f6b8812702250dfcc42cd92085fa683af30476b

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1709f7f079ad0aeb92cbc6e7e14f556571c1bd4e36e4d5a925d078d8e114fc67ddafe7b20031c4c1541425942f6b8812702250dfcc42cd92085fa683af30476b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Friend, Here's what we know: - There are candidates in this race who are criticizing Israel during their darkest hour. - There are candidates in this race praising the terror groups that have waged atrocious brutality against our greatest ally in the Middle East. - There are candidates in this race flip-flopping on their positions to conform to whatever stance is most trendy. - There is one candidate in this race who has taken decisive action to rescue Americans, cut off the funding of state sponsors of terrorism, and looked directly into the cameras of news channels to declare unwavering support for the Israelis. Ron DeSantis would be a President who will take action in times of dire crisis. He served in Iraq, friend. He knows the stakes; he's seen the bloodshed. He knows what it takes to stand on the side of freedom. For Governor DeSantis, this is personal. Right now, the United States needs a leader with the focus, discipline, and determination to handle the dangerous world we live in. Joe Biden is asleep at the wheel, and it's clear he is not fit for the job if he can't take a 2 AM phone call. The system today is broken. We want your help to elect the only leader in this race who will fix it. If you'd like to support Ron DeSantis today to be the United States' next leader, we'd love to have your support. You can chip in below to help him out. Donate to Ron DeSantis for President If you cannot donate, know that your support is appreciated nonetheless. In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. clean_body: Republicans have the spending advantage | | | Bad news, Derek. AdImpact recently released a concerning report on General Assembly election ad reservations and spending. It turns out that Republicans have outspent Democrats $8.5 million to $7.4 million. The GOP has spent over 1 million dollars more than we have to make sure their ads get in front of Virginians. We don’t even want to think about how many Virginia voters might have been swayed to vote Republican after seeing their ads. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = If we want our ads to reach as many voters as they conceivably can before Election Day, we need to fight back and make up lost ground. Thank you, Team Warner **=** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Lacey (Katie Porter's Campaign Manager)
subject: 13x more expensive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie and I were just discussing our TV strategy.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31439%2E3422442%2Eh1eKUH)
Derek,
As primary day gets closer, Katie and the team are beginning to talk about our very first TV ad.
But running TV ads in California is particularly expensive. California holds two of the country’s six most expensive media markets, meaning **it can be 13x more expensive to run TV ads in California than it is in Midwest swing states.**
[**We need to raise serious funds (and fast!) if we’re going to be able to compete on the airwaves. Can you chip in today to help us introduce Katie to voters across California?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231014-1?refcode=EMAM14_1_TVT_20231014_V1_F&refcode2=31439_3422442_h1eKUH&akid=31439%2E3422442%2Eh1eKUH)
TV ads allow us to reach a broad audience across the state, **including people who might not be super tuned into politics.** They’re one of the main ways we’ll introduce Katie to voters and show them why she’s the best candidate for the job.
There’s also a real advantage to booking our TV ads sooner rather than later. **When you book early, you can secure the best spots at lower rates.** Katie likes to compare it to buying plane tickets—buying last minute can really cost you and you’ll probably have fewer options.
[**So if you’d like to help us secure TV ad time and prepare for the tough campaign ahead, please pitch in today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231014-1?refcode=EMAM14_1_TVT_20231014_V1_F&refcode2=31439_3422442_h1eKUH&akid=31439%2E3422442%2Eh1eKUH)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231014-1?refcode=EMAM14_1_TVT_20231014_V1_F&refcode2=31439_3422442_h1eKUH&akid=31439%2E3422442%2Eh1eKUH)
Thanks, Derek!
Lacey
Campaign Manager
Katie Porter for Senate

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM14_1_TVT_20231014_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=31439_3422442_h1eKUH&akid=31439%2E3422442%2Eh1eKUH)**

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: No fake deadlines
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
If you're anything like us, you’ve been getting a lot of emails this week talking about a “mid-month fundraising deadline.”
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=732%2E135344%2EuckGB-)

Friends --
If you're anything like us, you’ve been getting a lot of emails this week talking about a “mid-month fundraising deadline.” So, we wanted to take a second to break this idea down and explain what’s really happening.
First off, “mid-month” deadlines aren’t official deadlines of any kind. It’s just a tactic some campaigns use to generate a sense of urgency to convince people to give. We don’t do that.
So rather than giving you a completely made-up number we have to meet or our campaign will be doomed, we’ll simply explain exactly why your support matters right now:
The end of this week marks the halfway point of October.
While we don’t have an official reporting deadline, this is a moment where we like to check in and see how we are pacing towards our overall (very real) fundraising goals.
**You see, your contribution a year from now, in the home-stretch, is important. Your contribution now helps us plan out exactly what we can accomplish in the coming months and year -- when we can hire field staff, when we air our first TV ad, and so much more.** So ensuring that we’re keeping up with what we’ve mapped out we need to win is important.
And maintaining that steady drumbeat of support is especially important now that we have Republican opponents raising and spending money of their own.
So yes: we are going to be emailing more than usual this week, because any strong campaign has to work towards their goals.
But no, we won’t be telling you it’s because of a fake deadline. We hope you’ll see this as a refreshing, but still compelling reason to support Elissa today.
[**Can you contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can to our campaign? It will go a long way toward helping us meet our goals for the month.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231014-1-30&t=2&akid=732%2E135344%2EuckGB-)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-oct23.s_Ko7f&refcode=em231014-1-30&t=21&akid=732%2E135344%2EuckGB-)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-oct23.1KsVSv&refcode=em231014-1-30&t=22&akid=732%2E135344%2EuckGB-)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-oct23.bbeHIu&refcode=em231014-1-30&t=23&akid=732%2E135344%2EuckGB-)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-oct23.fqQJeL&refcode=em231014-1-30&t=24&akid=732%2E135344%2EuckGB-)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-oct23.oc0oAM&refcode=em231014-1-30&t=25&akid=732%2E135344%2EuckGB-)**

---
****
Thank you,
Elissa Slotkin for Senate

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=732%2E135344%2EuckGB-).

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Let us explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Please give us a chance to explain why your contribution to GIFFORDS PAC—especially today—is so important
#

Hi there -
Please give us a chance to explain why your contribution to GIFFORDS PAC--especially today--is so important.
It’s hard to believe, but now that we’ve entered the last quarter of the year, we don’t have much time left to reach our yearly fundraising goals. We know that December 31st may seem far away, but it’ll be here before we know it.
The fundraising goals we set are crucial to our ability to do our urgent work. Every dollar we raise goes towards our work to elect gun safety champions and pass lifesaving legislation at every level of government. The amount that we raise this year will directly determine our success in the 2024 elections.
We know we ask a lot of you--no doubt about it. But today’s ask is particularly important because tomorrow is our first mid-month fundraising deadline of the new quarter.
[**If you have the ability to give today, your donation will be incredibly impactful as we work to reach our goals for the rest of the year. So please, if you can, will you contribute $5 to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231014-1-30&amount=5&t=1&akid=6726%2E3935704%2EGvgait)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-oct23.j_Pk1L&amount=5&refcode=em231014-1-30&t=2&akid=6726%2E3935704%2EGvgait)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-oct23.j_Pk1L&refcode=em231014-1-30&t=3&akid=6726%2E3935704%2EGvgait)**
---
****
Thanks for taking the time to hear us out today.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=6726%2E3935704%2EGvgait) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: BREAKING: House Republicans in chaos.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
The Republican party is not fit to govern.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71561899/432536964/-329851188?refcode=BLU-VFC-20231014-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzBjMjNiYi1hYTZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hI_Yu0xw8GtVDcm9Wla0l43VyaLRofPV6cvAYc_QOCw=)
---
| Last week, I voted to oust Kevin McCarthy as speaker.

Peter, this is unprecedented. Not once in US history has a speaker been ousted.

Earlier this year, this same party elected its speaker after a historic five days and 15 votes later. **Their track record since then has been nothing short of a failure for the American people.**

This proves what Democrats have been saying all along. _The Republican party is not fit to govern._ Their failures to lead have propped up hateful and discriminatory legislation and done little to aid American workers and families.

**The path forward has never been clearer:** we need to take back the House majority, restore the integrity of the House, and get Congress back to making progress for American families. Extremist Beth Van Duyne only cares about playing political games and scoring political points instead of actually helping folks in our community.

If the stopgap bill didn’t pass, the government would have shut down. This would’ve affected millions of people – from federal employees who wouldn’t receive a paycheck to all of the people who rely on important federal benefits. But all extremists like Beth Van Duyne are concerned about is pushing their politically motivated agenda.

I’m running to flip this district and defeat Beth Van Duyne next year, but I can’t do it alone.

subject: A full-circle moment for EMILYs List:

body:
Gov. Newsom has made an extraordinary choice. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71562354/432538108/2084576589?sourceid=1052133&refcode=20231014_ERMonLBRS&refcode2=WTEFE1028&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzBjMjNiYi1hYTZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCF9JFr0U2GeBA9naIjfsUjvoJykNAxOArAE-8NEMuQ=) Peter, EMILYs List began in 1985 with a mission to raise money in support of Democratic pro-choice women running for office. It was (and still is) a pretty simple idea. **As it turns out, a lot of revolutions start with pretty simple ideas.**

The other EMILYs List foremothers and I founded this organization because the political establishment at the time did not believe women could win elections. This became a self-fulfilling prophecy when they refused to support women candidates. **We knew it was time for a change. We were determined to open doors so women had a fair chance to compete — and to win.** | [HELP WOMEN WIN](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71562355/432538109/2084576589?sourceid=1052133&refcode=20231014_ERMonLBRS&refcode2=WTEFE1028&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzBjMjNiYi1hYTZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JCF9JFr0U2GeBA9naIjfsUjvoJykNAxOArAE-8NEMuQ=)
---
Last Tuesday was a very special day for me. I cried tears of joy as I sat in the gallery of the U.S. Senate and watched our very own Laphonza Butler be sworn in by Vice President Kamala Harris. And I reflected on the fact that, back in 1985, I could not possibly have imagined what was in store for the future of this organization, its candidates, and now, its leader.

**It is a full-circle moment for EMILYs List that one of our own, our former president, was called upon to serve as a U.S. senator. **Laphonza brings to the Senate a career's worth of leadership and expertise, and Gov. Newsom made an extraordinary choice in appointing her to fill the late Sen. Dianne Feinstein's seat.

**The bottom line is: Sen. Butler knows exactly what happens when a committed community of activists decides it's time for women to lead._That perspective is invaluable, and is uniquely informed by having been part of the EMILYs List community._**

[**Peter, whether you're new to EMILYs List or you've been with us since 1985, you are part of a movement that has changed the face of power in American politics forever. This work is only possible because of you. clean_body: Gov. Newsom has made an extraordinary choice. | | | = Peter, EMILYs List began in 1985 with a mission to raise money in support of Democratic pro-choice women running for office. It was (and still is) a pretty simple idea. As it turns out, a lot of revolutions start with pretty simple ideas. The other EMILYs List foremothers and I founded this organization because the political establishment at the time did not believe women could win elections. This became a self-fulfilling prophecy when they refused to support women candidates. We knew it was time for a change. We were determined to open doors so women had a fair chance to compete — and to win. | = Last Tuesday was a very special day for me. I cried tears of joy as I sat in the gallery of the U.S. Senate and watched our very own Laphonza Butler be sworn in by Vice President Kamala Harris. And I reflected on the fact that, back in 1985, I could not possibly have imagined what was in store for the future of this organization, its candidates, and now, its leader. It is a full-circle moment for EMILYs List that one of our own, our former president, was called upon to serve as a U.S. senator. Laphonza brings to the Senate a career's worth of leadership and expertise, and Gov. Newsom made an extraordinary choice in appointing her to fill the late Sen. Dianne Feinstein's seat. The bottom line is: Sen. Butler knows exactly what happens when a committed community of activists decides it's time for women to lead.That perspective is invaluable, and is uniquely informed by having been part of the EMILYs List community. = If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for being part of this movement and this moment, Ellen R. Malcolm Founder and Chair Emerita, EMILYs List = = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Walsh=2C=20WAGOP?=
subject: Initiative 2113
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Restoring reasonable police pursuit for law enforcement is a common-sense approach that all voters can get behind. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b96e23d2af&e=6a281f566d)
---
| Dear Peter,

Thanks for taking the time to watch our latest YouTube video below and to read our release on the WAGOP's policy plan to **Fight Crime** in Washington.

One thing I want to make sure to highlight in our **Plan to Fight Crime** is** Initiative 2113 - Reasonable Police Pursuit**. By allowing police to pursue criminals, I-2113 can help fix a broken system handcuffing our law enforcement. It’s common-sense policy: **If someone commits a crime, police should be able to pursue** and make an arrest**.** This is a policy that **all voters can unite behind** , because people care about restoring safe neighborhoods and protecting their families. It’s that simple.

I-2113 is one of six initiatives being sponsored by** _Let's Go Washington._** Each initiative needs to reach **400,000 signatures by the end of 2023 **in order to proceed. Use the link below to find a location where you can **sign all six****initiatives****...if you haven't already!**

If the initiatives qualify, they will proceed to the state legislature for consideration. If the Democrat-majority in Olympia refuses to pass these policies into law, **they will go to the November 2024 ballot** to be approved by the voters. In that case, we will use the Democrats’ lack of action to get more Republicans elected to the legislature in Olympia.

The **WAGOP is proud to have already endorsed all six initiatives** earlier this year. These six policies are common-sense approaches that protect the safety and pocketbooks of WA citizens. **Listed below are all of the initiatives:**
**_For more information on the initiatives and how to sign them visit: [letsgowashington.com](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f865b14309&e=6a281f566d)_**
**Public Safety**
1-2113 - Reasonable Police Pursuit

**Cost of Living**
I-2117 - Stop the hidden gas tax
I-2124 - Opt out of state-run long term care coverage tax
I-2109 - Repeal the capital gains tax
I-2111 - No state income tax

**Parental Rights**
I-2081 - Parental Notification

These initiatives are a common-sense approach to fixing what's broken in our state. Thank you for your support to get them qualified in the next two months. And thank you for your support of the **WAGOP's Plan to Fight Crime**.

Sincerely,

Jim Walsh
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---
| |
---
| From: Chairman Jim Walsh <jim@wsrp.org>
Date: Thursday, Oct. 12
Time: 9:15 AM
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
| Following the successful launch of the WAGOP Plan to Save Basic Education, we are excited to share with you the release of our next policy plan.

**WAGOP's Plan to Fight Crime** Below is a video from Chairman Walsh highlighting the key principles of our plan to fight crime. Our full written release of the plan is copied below.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6b8046f99e&e=6a281f566d)
---
WAGOP Chairman Jim Walsh's weekly video (10/11/2023)
Highlighting WAGOP's Plan to Fight Crime
| **WAGOP’s Plan to Fight Crime**
WAGOP HQ - This week, Chairman Jim Walsh unveiled Republicans’ plan to fight crime in Washington. “The citizens of Washington state should always feel safe in their homes, their communities, and at work,” said Chairman Walsh. “Olympia and D.C. have failed the people of Washington on public safety.”

The WAGOP principles to fighting crime in Washington State:
* Protect Citizens
* Get Back to Prosecuting Criminals
* Support Practical Rehabilitation
* Champion Law Enforcement
* Restore Safe Neighborhoods

The top priority of government is to protect its citizens. From Seattle to Spokane, Washington citizens are less safe in their communities, at work, and even at home. The headlines on violent crime in our state have become part of our daily lives. Here are some of the facts.
* According to a report from Washington Association of Sheriffs and Police Chiefs (WASPC), murders in Washington increased by 96% between 2019 and 2022.
* Washington has the fewest police officers and deputies per capita of any state in the country.
* Washington is ranked third highest for total car thefts—and that number is rising.
* Between 2015 and 2021, rape increased by 51%—and that number is also rising.

The data points go on and on and on....

“Soft on crime” and “defunding the police” rhetoric and policies promoted by Democrat lawmakers and liberal judges are to blame. Our criminal justice system is empowering criminals, not protecting citizens.

As Republican state legislator Rep. Dan Griffey stated recently: “People that would do harm to society know the rules now, and they’re playing by it.”

In Olympia, GOP lawmakers were able to help restore some measure of common sense by making fixes to recent anti-cop and drug-possession laws. They are committed to protecting WA citizens and fighting crime to make our neighborhoods safe again. But there’s more work to do.

WAGOP’s Plan to Fight Crime includes the following policy proposals:
* **Hire more law enforcement officers** —not community safety officers, not social workers. And provide those officers ample support. The anti-police rhetoric needs to stop. According to _War on Cops_ author [Heather Mac Donald](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=9474cce183&e=6a281f566d), there is **_no_** epidemic of fatal police shootings against unarmed Americans. And yet, that’s all we hear from the media and Democrat politicians.
* **Allow police officers to pursue criminals and defend themselves**. WAGOP has endorsed [I-2113](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=12a3f78a23&e=6a281f566d), which would allow reasonable vehicular police pursuits. Having more police officers establishes a visible community presence to create positive relationships. This prevents crimes from occurring.
* **Celebrate law enforcement professionals** , don’t denigrate them. For the past several legislative terms, Democrats in Olympia and D.C. have disparaged sheriff’s deputies and police. This affects how the media—and even some impressionable young people—treat law enforcement officers. And it isn’t good. We need to restore positive interactions between the public and police.
* **Get back to prosecuting criminals.** We need to fix our criminal justice system. Too many local prosecutors have become politicians first. Their focus needs to be on protecting their communities. We cannot afford criminals roaming free in our streets creating more crime and chaos. We need to prosecute crime and get criminals off the street.
* **Enforce strong bail** **and parole processes.** When felons are released without bail and/or strong parole accountability, they quickly re-offend. It is critical to call out bail funds, like [Northwest Community Bail Fund](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d1ab7b2f05&e=6a281f566d). Michael Sendejo, 51, was found guilty by a jury in a King County court of second-degree murder with a deadly weapon— after NCBF bailed him out of jail, following his arraignment in 2021.

Left-wing policies that started in Seattle have spread across Washington through radicalized city councils, activist legislators in Olympia, and prosecutors who refuse to prosecute. The WAGOP and Republican lawmakers in Olympia are committed to restoring safety in our streets and stopping repeat offenders.

Victims of violent crime do not have peace of mind that their attackers will be brought to justice. Police officers are now the ones “handcuffed” as radical lawmakers curtail their ability to pursue criminals. At the same time, the prospects for our youth decline as they fall into drugs, gangs, and homelessness.

“The time for cheap rhetoric is over,” concludes Chairman Walsh. “These problems can be fixed. Troubles caused by bad policies can be cured by better policies. All it takes is telling the truth about crime and being courageous enough to enforce our laws. We’ve been timid for too long. Now we need to be brave.”
###

clean_body: Restoring reasonable police pursuit for law enforcement is a common-sense approach that all voters can get behind. | | | | | | Dear Peter, Thanks for taking the time to watch our latest YouTube video below and to read our release on the WAGOP's policy plan to Fight Crime in Washington. One thing I want to make sure to highlight in our Plan to Fight Crime is Initiative 2113 - Reasonable Police Pursuit. By allowing police to pursue criminals, I-2113 can help fix a broken system handcuffing our law enforcement. It’s common-sense policy: If someone commits a crime, police should be able to pursue and make an arrest. This is a policy that all voters can unite behind , because people care about restoring safe neighborhoods and protecting their families. It’s that simple. I-2113 is one of six initiatives being sponsored by Let's Go Washington. Each initiative needs to reach 400,000 signatures by the end of 2023 in order to proceed. Use the link below to find a location where you can sign all sixinitiatives...if you haven't already! If the initiatives qualify, they will proceed to the state legislature for consideration. If the Democrat-majority in Olympia refuses to pass these policies into law, they will go to the November 2024 ballot to be approved by the voters. In that case, we will use the Democrats’ lack of action to get more Republicans elected to the legislature in Olympia. The WAGOP is proud to have already endorsed all six initiatives earlier this year. These six policies are common-sense approaches that protect the safety and pocketbooks of WA citizens. Listed below are all of the initiatives: For more information on the initiatives and how to sign them visit: Public Safety 1-2113 - Reasonable Police Pursuit Cost of Living I-2117 - Stop the hidden gas tax I-2124 - Opt out of state-run long term care coverage tax I-2109 - Repeal the capital gains tax I-2111 - No state income tax Parental Rights I-2081 - Parental Notification These initiatives are a common-sense approach to fixing what's broken in our state. Thank you for your support to get them qualified in the next two months. And thank you for your support of the WAGOP's Plan to Fight Crime. Sincerely, Jim Walsh Chairman Washington State Republican Party | | | From: Chairman Jim Walsh <jim@wsrp.org> Date: Thursday, Oct. 12 Time: 9:15 AM To: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Following the successful launch of the WAGOP Plan to Save Basic Education, we are excited to share with you the release of our next policy plan. Here are some of the facts. According to a report from Washington Association of Sheriffs and Police Chiefs (WASPC), murders in Washington increased by 96% between 2019 and 2022. Washington has the fewest police officers and deputies per capita of any state in the country. Washington is ranked third highest for total car thefts—and that number is rising. Between 2015 and 2021, rape increased by 51%—and that number is also rising. The data points go on and on and on.... “Soft on crime” and “defunding the police” rhetoric and policies promoted by Democrat lawmakers and liberal judges are to blame. They are committed to protecting WA citizens and fighting crime to make our neighborhoods safe again. But there’s more work to do. WAGOP’s Plan to Fight Crime includes the following policy proposals: Hire more law enforcement officers —not community safety officers, not social workers. And provide those officers ample support. The anti-police rhetoric needs to stop. According to War on Cops author , there is no epidemic of fatal police shootings against unarmed Americans. And yet, that’s all we hear from the media and Democrat politicians. Allow police officers to pursue criminals and defend themselves. WAGOP has endorsed , which would allow reasonable vehicular police pursuits. Having more police officers establishes a visible community presence to create positive relationships. This prevents crimes from occurring. Celebrate law enforcement professionals , don’t denigrate them. _But of course, this MAGA reception wouldn’t be complete without the most important part of our team in attendance: grassroots patriots like** _YOU_**._

body:

| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20293%2E4449941%2Eml5Lyt)
---
**Pete Buttigieg sounded the alarm about the the Electoral College:** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/31870?t=7&akid=20293%2E4449941%2Eml5Lyt) Republicans have only won the popular vote **ONCE** since 1988.

Political experts predict that Trump could lose the popular vote and still win the presidency because of the Electoral College...just like in 2016. _NO!!!_

[**That’s why it’s crucial that we raise $10,000 by midnight on Monday to make our next payment and keep our ads live. Please, chip in $7 now to support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/31870?t=8&akid=20293%2E4449941%2Eml5Lyt) | [Listen to Pete Buttigieg! The Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

The Electoral College subverts the will of the people! It handed Republicans the presidency THREE times since 1988.

The Electoral College is a scam that makes YOUR vote worth less – _it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

That’s why we’re rushing to raise $10,000 to make our next ad payment by midnight on Monday and keep our ads running!

name: Team Schiff
subject: 7 California Republicans were just ranked as some of the most vulnerable House seats in 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Team Schiff is working to build the largest grassroots coalition in our state’s history, and we’re ready to work to turn out voters and help Democrats win up and down the ballot.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4238%2E5257348%2ETuE22a)
Derek, here’s the deal:
If we want to make transformative change in our nation, it’s not enough to just win one or two seats. We need to win up and down the ballot.
Holding the White House. Growing our Senate majority. Taking back the House from MAGA Republicans.
**We have a plan to make that happen.[Donate now to help >>](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231014_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4238%2E5257348%2ETuE22a)**
Daily Kos just released their analysis on the most vulnerable House seats in 2024 — _and seven California Republicans are on it._
That means if Democrats can flip just these seven House seats in California, we take back the House majority.
But winning a House race is expensive. Just take it from Adam — who at the time ran in the most expensive House election _ever_ during his first campaign.
And with California as the epicenter for the 2024 elections, there’s no doubt special interest groups will flood millions of dollars into the state.
Team Schiff is working to build the largest grassroots coalition in our state’s history, and we’re ready to work to turn out voters and help Democrats win up and down the ballot.
Investing in this campaign means more than just electing Adam to the Senate.
It means building a coalition to help boost Democratic turnout across the state.
It means reserving more TV and digital ads calling out GOP extremism.
It means ramping up our organizing efforts in pivotal counties.
It means delivering President Biden a majority in both chambers of Congress.
Now with less than 150 days until Californians start receiving their primary ballot, we need your help to power our work.
**[Will you pitch in $10 to help grow our get-out-to-vote efforts and help Democrats win in California up and down the ballot?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JYMaWc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231014_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4238%2E5257348%2ETuE22a)**

name: Ohio Democrats
subject: Urgent: Stand Up for Reproductive Freedom in Ohio Tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Ohio’s GOP Senate candidates are about to take the stage...
|
Team, TONIGHT is a pivotal moment in the fight for reproductive rights in Ohio and across the country. The Ohio GOP primary Senate debate is set to take place in just a few hours, and **[we need your support more than ever](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71567092/432549803/-238112118?refcode=odp_em_231014_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGUyN2QxOC1iMzZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7IBJbj5Ab-dnrDoXsi-qwKQHqW2CoPTxa6t4NiDYTck=) **to ensure that our state remains a stronghold for reproductive freedom. | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71567095/432549804/-238112118?refcode=odp_em_231014_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGUyN2QxOC1iMzZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7IBJbj5Ab-dnrDoXsi-qwKQHqW2CoPTxa6t4NiDYTck=) **
---
In the race for Ohio's Senate seat, we’re up against candidates whose positions on reproductive rights are deeply troubling. Bernie Moreno, Frank LaRose, and Matt Dolan all support dangerous abortion bans that could strip away a woman's right to make choices about her own body.
Bernie Moreno has made it clear that he is "unequivocally pro-life" and supports a national abortion ban without exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. Not to mention that he called for a government shutdown, despite the significant impact a shutdown would have on Ohioans – including forcing nearly 53,000 Ohioans to either be furloughed or work without pay.
Frank LaRose also (no surprise here) supports a national abortion ban and opposes crucial exceptions for victims of rape or incest. Furthermore, he rewrote the November ballot language to confuse and trick Ohioans.
And then there’s Matt Dolan who _literally_ celebrated the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , labeling it "exciting.”On top of that, just last month Dolan was exposed for using his own PAC to funnel money to his campaign consultants, instead of supporting other Republican candidates.
**If any of these three are elected, they would have a detrimental effect on our country. And they could very well be the deciding vote in the Senate to ban abortion nationwide – we cannot let this happen.**
****[Can you pitch in anything you can afford before our last mid-month fundraising deadline before the election to help us defeat the Ohio GOP’s candidates and ensure we can protect reproductive rights across the state and the nation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71567100/432549806/-238112118?refcode=odp_em_231014_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGUyN2QxOC1iMzZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7IBJbj5Ab-dnrDoXsi-qwKQHqW2CoPTxa6t4NiDYTck=)****
Thank you for standing with us,
Ohio Democrats
** **
****A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to protect reproductive rights in our state constitution? →**** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71567103/432549808/-238112118?refcode=odp_em_231014_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGUyN2QxOC1iMzZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7IBJbj5Ab-dnrDoXsi-qwKQHqW2CoPTxa6t4NiDYTck=) **
---

| 697 East Broad Street
Suite 101
Columbus, Ohio 43215
---

[https://ohiodems.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71567106/432549811/-1561749739?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGUyN2QxOC1iMzZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7IBJbj5Ab-dnrDoXsi-qwKQHqW2CoPTxa6t4NiDYTck=&emci=49dbd65a-fe69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=58e27d18-b36a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=25291327)

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Kevin McCarthy’s gone, but the chaos is there to stay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Democrats are ready to deliver results, not inaction and chaos.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71567099/432549805/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmUyN2QxOC1iMzZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9INxD1Y-WLnK4FWh7Lf0wZmf8CpCLY09d9rKgI76_k=&emci=38141d9c-006a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=5be27d18-b36a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | It's been a chaotic few weeks in the House of Representatives. Everyone in the country has been following along with the Republican-made mess in the House. So, let's recap the chaos: **First:** Republicans reneged on the budget deal they agreed to just a few months ago, threatening to shut down the government at the behest of a few MAGA Republicans. **Then:** Those same MAGA Republicans successfully called a vote and unseated Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House. **Now:** We have NO Speaker of the House. We have another looming funding deadline in less than 40 days, and, once again, we're sure to be delayed until the last minute by MAGA Republicans' antics. Our country is being held hostage because the entire Republican party is controlled by a few far-far-right MAGA Republicans, and the American people are suffering because of GOP chaos and inaction. [**We have a chance to win back the House in 2024, but it'll require all of us pitching in to win important races. clean_body: Democrats are ready to deliver results, not inaction and chaos. | | | | It's been a chaotic few weeks in the House of Representatives. Everyone in the country has been following along with the Republican-made mess in the House. So, let's recap the chaos: First: Republicans reneged on the budget deal they agreed to just a few months ago, threatening to shut down the government at the behest of a few MAGA Republicans. Then: Those same MAGA Republicans successfully called a vote and unseated Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House. Now: We have NO Speaker of the House. We have another looming funding deadline in less than 40 days, and, once again, we're sure to be delayed until the last minute by MAGA Republicans' antics. Our country is being held hostage because the entire Republican party is controlled by a few far-far-right MAGA Republicans, and the American people are suffering because of GOP chaos and inaction. = ** Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to the Oregon Blue Victory Fund instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Republicans are already targeting Democrats in OR-4 and OR-6, and they need our help to defeat the MAGA forces coming for them. And to top it off, we need to flip OR-5 from red to blue if Democrats have any hope of winning the House in 2024. The path to a Democratic majority runs through Oregon. There's no time to waste. We can restore common sense to the House, but we have to invest in the statewide campaign for a Democratic House in 2024—and we need to invest today. = Onward! name: Mark Gonzalez
subject: Progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Gonzalez for Senate
body:
markagonzalez.com [markagonzalez.com]
Hi friends,
We are moving and making progress each day in our campaign to take on Ted Cruz. This week alone I was working the phones, dropping in on the Bexar County Democratic Party CEC, and participating in the Texas Young Democrats board meeting.
Actually, I sang Taylor Swift at the last event. The internet is forever, I hear!
As much progress as we are making, it’s time to bring this campaign to the next level. Can you help us turn this moment into a movement by making a contribution to my campaign today? [actblue.com/donate/markfortexas]
Like I said in my announcement video, it's time Texas had a Senator who will fight for justice, even on the cold and dark days. Throughout my life, I've shown that I will be that leader -- but I need your help to win.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q_JeAUNybBk [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q_JeAUNybBk]
Click here to donate to Mark Gonzalez [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/MarkForTexas]
I made my career out of helping people earn a second chance, but I can tell you right now: Ted doesn't deserve one. If you’re on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DAMarkGonzalez/status/1699039438720954678?s=20] or Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=3563051767244466] , don’t forget to share my launch video with #Adelante and a message of support — thanks for having my back, and let’s win this thing.
Best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105874/images/Mark%20signature%20file.png]
https://www.facebook.com/MarkGonzalezTX/ [https://www.facebook.com/MarkGonzalezTX/] https://twitter.com/DAMarkGonzalez [https://twitter.com/DAMarkGonzalez] https://instagram.com/MarkForTexas [https://instagram.com/MarkForTexas]
Paid for by Mark Gonzalez for Senate
Mark Gonzalez for Senate
P.O. Box 3
Corpus Christi, TX, 78403
United States

It’s no joke, team: The path to flipping the House **blue** in 2024 really does run through the South.

**FIRST:** Over the summer, the Supreme Court’s decision in _Allen v. Milligan_ struck down Alabama’s discriminatory congressional map and ordered the legislature to draw a new, fair map before the next election.

**BUT:** Instead of following the Court’s clear instructions to enact a new, fair map, Alabama Republicans defied the Court’s order by voting to enact _another_ manipulated map.

**THANKFULLY:** The Supreme Court unanimously rejected this attempt by Alabama to continue illegally discriminating against Black voters.

**SO NOW:** Not only will Alabama be required to implement a fair map before the next election, but other states like Louisiana and Georgia could be required to redraw their maps as well.
[**_The fight for fair maps happening across the South right now will determine the landscape for the fight for the House majority in 2024. Will you rush an urgent donation to support the NDRC’s fight for fairness?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71571128/432554997/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231014_FR_10M_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1ZjY2MDM1LWI1NmEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MjHyAxgtuRJV2CUwM3PBFK6JKNferDnWh-MtGV5zlqc=)

clean_body: | | = = It’s no joke, team: The path to flipping the House blue in 2024 really does run through the South. FIRST: Over the summer, the Supreme Court’s decision in Allen v. Milligan struck down Alabama’s discriminatory congressional map and ordered the legislature to draw a new, fair map before the next election. BUT: Instead of following the Court’s clear instructions to enact a new, fair map, Alabama Republicans defied the Court’s order by voting to enact another manipulated map. THANKFULLY: The Supreme Court unanimously rejected this attempt by Alabama to continue illegally discriminating against Black voters. SO NOW: Not only will Alabama be required to implement a fair map before the next election, but other states like Louisiana and Georgia could be required to redraw their maps as well. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = “These shameful, odious efforts to diminish the rightful voting power of Black Alabamians have finally been defeated. As a result, we will see more representative maps in places that were once thought to be unreachable in the fight for fairness: Alabama, Louisiana, and Georgia.” – Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr. Team, our grassroots movement is making real progress across the country – but now is not the time to let up. It’s clear that Republicans will do anything to protect their manipulated maps, so we must keep fighting until we’ve secured fair districts in every single state. = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. name: Michael Bennet
subject: Colorado hikes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_101423_CORE_act_FWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_101423_CORE_act_FWD]
Friend,
It’s impossible to walk through the wilderness of Colorado and not feel awe. This summer, I made it a point to get out and hike as much as possible to enjoy the beauty of our state. On my hikes, I brought along public officials, conservationists, and outdoor recreationists to discuss the importance of our public lands.
Earlier this week, my team sent along some of the pictures I took on my adventures. You can see them for yourself below!
Our public lands are a gift. It’s on us to protect them for generations to come. That’s why I’m fighting to pass the CORE Act to Congress.
This law would protect 400,000 acres of land across Colorado. It would preserve critical wilderness areas, make outdoor recreation more accessible, and strengthen our local economy.
I’m fighting hard to pass this through the Senate. Will you support my work to protect public lands by signing on now? Become a citizen co-sponsor of the CORE Act >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_100423_core_act-1]
Thank you so much,
Michael
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Bennet <info@michaelbennet.com>
Date: Tue, Oct 10, 2023 at 1:01 PM
Subject: hiking pictures
Hi friend,
Colorado is the most beautiful state in the country. And there’s no better way to see everything our home has to offer than long hikes in the summer.
When Michael was home, he did just that — bringing together mayors, advocates, and sportsmen on these hikes to talk about why these public lands are so critical to Colorado. Check out some of his pictures below!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_101423_CORE_act_FWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_101423_CORE_act_FWD]
Summiting Quandary Peak with his daughter Halina
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_101423_CORE_act_FWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_101423_CORE_act_FWD]
Hiking the Mayflower Gulch trail
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_101423_CORE_act_FWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_101423_CORE_act_FWD]
On the trail around Loch Lake
One of Michael’s top priorities in the Senate has been protecting public lands across Colorado.
In 2022, he helped establish the Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument, which protected more than 50,000 acres of public land. The Tenmile Range — which includes Quandary Peak, one of the 14’ers Michael climbed this summer — is part of this protected land.
Michael has also been working hard to pass the Colorado Outdoor Recreation & Economy (CORE) Act, which would protect 400,000 acres of public lands. To draft this bill, Michael brought together local government, businesses, recreation groups, sportsmen, and conservationists. The end result is a win-win for our economy, our culture of outdoor recreation, and Colorado’s ecosystems.
Will you join a coalition of Coloradans showing their support for the CORE Act? Sign on now to help Michael protect our public lands >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_100423_core_act-1]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_100423_core_act-1]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_100423_core_act-1]
Happy hiking!
Thanks,
Team Bennet

name: Adam Schiff
subject: my new opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
We just got some breaking news, folks:
A multimillionaire Republican celebrity just jumped into our top-two “jungle primary” in the U.S. Senate race.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/garvey.jpg]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Steve Garvey was a first baseman for the Dodgers and Padres, and apparently he’s ready to take up the fight for everyone born on third base thinking they hit a triple. Go figure.
If that’s all you need to hear, I’m personally asking you to split a donation of any amount between Seth Moulton and my Senate campaign to help us respond. Our new Republican opponent is sure to have big money behind him, and we need to be ready for the inevitable wave of attacks — because that’s not the only recent twist in this Senate race. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Garvey appears to be taking a cue from another celebrity Republican with no political experience, Donald Trump. And given Trump’s determination to make sure I don’t become California’s Senator next year, I wouldn’t be surprised to see Trump and MAGA world get solidly behind Garvey. I will need your help to ensure Garvey and Trump feel the sting of losing on March 5, 2024.
And there’s one more wrinkle in this race: I’m now running in two concurrent elections — a special election for the remainder of the late Sen. Dianne Feinstein’s term, and a general election for a full Senate term. Two elections happening on the same ballot, on the same day . Twice.
With millions of Californians preparing to see my name on their ballot for the very first time, we’re going to have to invest a tremendous amount of resources to educate voters and meet them across the state.
And it’s even more urgent with today’s news. Can you rush in a split donation of any amount between Seth Moulton and my Senate campaign to respond to the entry of our new opponent and help ensure we win this race? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
There’s nothing Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party would like more than to see a celebrity Republican put another Senate seat in play. So let’s stop him, Trump and Steve Garvey in their tracks — today.
Thanks for your support,
Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/r_WYy1BSbkmUjvconTI5TQ2?unsubscribedata=U3dvDTLTUkZQ%2FepUwX2vqJDykJoGOzDfqY8uKCn2R38AeS0UTtM23Bxg2eopmcdRb6MRzfBhKpreiyVMsKe32sUl2vyE3J8kS6lV%2FsmDite9Xd9LEhYfp9dgtOJ99vP752zZZdCfp9BlvLiCtx%2BKZUegqf%2BplM7SDB6zR1uMbEveG%2FZDW6eNX%2FOx1njUoSf8hpx9XbiTrm%2FNgBU19dItuAwrRR%2B3rB8ZvBKaJlwsqxhsfOpoWbmiIJwFO%2BfDNgsj3ZuYlvj4ztxDPA%2BpNh8dmrnl5lKTTkdUxWNrd18R4OLMX4JCFRgBK6WxDdguNic%2Fw1kGplqZ8bXzDUSfYTa1yR9p3lTWREk%2B8eRkmnlML3921OoCXSInfpbzIw1KkwyQso9wuBlz0%2BBQi8hLFaSTkWwOB%2FLUlcPUl92iDYIardk%3D .

Hi, it’s Roland Gutierrez, the Democratic TX State Senator running for U.S. Senate against Ted Cruz.
My opponent has made no secret of the fact that he wants to ban books in Texas.
Whether they’re written by people of color, members of the LGBTQ+ community, or simply don’t conform to his twisted worldview, Cruz has made it clear he wants a say in what books can appear in our libraries.
In Cruz’s universe, schools would become right-wing indoctrination factories that whitewash American history.
Look, as the State Senator who represents Uvalde, I’m committed to protecting kids – not only by banning guns but also by restoring diversity of thought to our schools, libraries, and, most importantly, the U.S. Senate.
I know Ted Cruz is beatable – he almost lost in 2018. And this year, I plan to finish the job. Will you pitch in $10 or more to help me send Cruz packing? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

name: Padora HQ
subject: We need to send an adult to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=4845f318699a4945bfac1588ef8847ef&_e=horET93wQdwgBh3Ou90LnB65HBOeg_w1sCuCcaEdk8DSYbtEMT8aTVkRk8OPB63pOYsrZ46LKn5j_3pouFhpg3KffOIA0sNKNV2GwtNXAPzcewu2XdKyvrX7Y3WZxhD17mgR2CDd8nfWyjReXc_y1-7Hy0fqJSmYD2RK73_tO9dabiCfJ6AEAdHC6H9oyf_G2PA2LQSskFHAkha8_ZHioLSqHYYWLN_VHe6jzZATaVq76HNZ0n0UFyQ8rfvATF1YhpQaKiVsgzWLikWyM7rav4u-SQn8O7qIn7m9zVnxNcd-l7xK_4Vb6QfC-DWZjdgpWMfIxWnqJlhY5anXoQNLoEBrFawoGZkS3JgYQcR_89NB8IDnaw3zVyLDXGP2W7WhSPGPeqXGhqTa2AB-GwpAxzcsdyhqASHUyzYlmGrRY_Q%3D) Team – We need adults leading our country. We need adults in the House, adults in the Senate, and adults in the White House. We need all three of these to function as a country. **Unfortunately, it doesn’t seem like we have adults in the House willing to do what is necessary to run an effective government.** House Republicans brought us to the brink of a government shutdown – and many of them were disappointed when we avoided it. That’s why they voted Kevin McCarthy out of the Speakership. Simply put, this is stupid behavior from representatives more interested in going viral than governing. That’s why we need a change. **[John is running to bring that change and real leadership to Washington and Colorado’s 4th District. But he needs your help to get there. **My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families.
I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. House Republicans brought us to the brink of a government shutdown – and many of them were disappointed when we avoided it. That’s why they voted Kevin McCarthy out of the Speakership. Good morning, Peter.

It’s already been a busy month on the trail, and we’re only halfway through October.

Earlier this week, my team shared the incredible news that our campaign was among the top fundraisers in the country for both first-time and women candidates for public office.

We also announced a slate of major endorsements from **Lt. Governor Eleni Kounalakis** , **Anaheim Mayor Ashleigh Aitken** , and the **Democratic Club of Seal Beach!**

I’m so proud of growing momentum, and I know it’s only possible thanks to your ongoing support, Peter.

**[Midnight marks our mid-month fundraising deadline, and we could use some help meeting our target. I know I’ve asked a lot, but this a true grassroots effort powered by individuals and without a cent from corporate PACs. Will you chip in $3 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71574398/432557511/1436736915?refcode=em-10.14.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzQ5ZWFjNGQtYjc2YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ibf-1Ivn1kr6xMMMQaUnARtKNatuhgU2FNydD7TCMdo=)**

This campaign is about giving Orange County a voice in Congress that will continue to uphold our shared values. It's the same mission we started when I founded Women for American Values and Ethics and helped flip four House seats in our community.

We’ve come a long way together, Peter, and the truth is we’ll need to keep standing shoulder to shoulder for the tough work ahead.

This race is on track to become one of the most competitive (and expensive) in the entire country. I’m more confident than ever that we can win, _but we can’t stop now:_

clean_body: | = Good morning, Peter. It’s already been a busy month on the trail, and we’re only halfway through October. Earlier this week, my team shared the incredible news that our campaign was among the top fundraisers in the country for both first-time and women candidates for public office. We also announced a slate of major endorsements from Lt. Governor Eleni Kounalakis , Anaheim Mayor Ashleigh Aitken , and the Democratic Club of Seal Beach! I’m so proud of growing momentum, and I know it’s only possible thanks to your ongoing support, Peter. = | **= This campaign is about giving Orange County a voice in Congress that will continue to uphold our shared values. It's the same mission we started when I founded Women for American Values and Ethics and helped flip four House seats in our community. We’ve come a long way together, Peter, and the truth is we’ll need to keep standing shoulder to shoulder for the tough work ahead. This race is on track to become one of the most competitive (and expensive) in the entire country. I’m more confident than ever that we can win, but we can’t stop now: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** In unity, Joanna | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Joanna's campaign = To learn more about Joanna, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to .
