**URGENT/ URGENT/URGENT URGENT/ URGENT/URGENT**
**Re: Biden Must be Legally and Peacefully Removed Now Before a Worldwide Holocaust Results!**
Dear Fellow Patriot:
**Joe Biden must be legally removed as so-called president now!**
We have, just in the last few days, witnessed just how worthless, braindead and criminal he is! After Hamas’ attack on Israel, it took White House staff over 5 hours to even get him out of bed during a crisis.
The risk of leaving Biden in office has thus become even more evident and urgent with the massacre of thousands and counting including women and children by Hamas in Israel, which is the direct result of Biden’s appeasement of Iran, the mastermind behind this horrific Holocaust-like event, where even the heads of babies were chopped off by these less than human barbarians.
Having been bribed by Communist China, Ukraine and Russia, for which your Freedom Watch has convicted and sentenced Biden through a citizens grand jury and citizens court to 20 years in prison, as well as for his negligent homicide in Afghanistan, we have now called upon law enforcement to have him arrested! **To the contrary, the Republicans in Congress have just been playing political games, while appearing on Fox News to raise more money.**
[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=041e3b264a&e=8edd2b8f7d)
**As just one example, the Republicans just complain about our open border, which is allowing terrorists to run across now threatening our nation, particularly now that there is war in the Middle East. The risk to our citizens is now acute and dangerous!**
**THERE IS THE RISK OF ANOTHER 9/11 AND EVEN WORSE!**
Ask yourself this fellow patriot: why have the Republicans not impeached Biden or sought other means to get rid of him? They could, themselves, send the Capitol Police to arrest him for his crimes, as the right of citizens arrest exists in the District of Columbia when there is probable cause that a felony crime is being or has been committed.
But the Republicans want to leave him in office to have a weak, braindead and criminal moron to run against in 2024. Their own political interests trump We the People’s interests to a safe and secure country!
Biden has not just been bribed by Communist China, Ukraine and Russia, he has undoubtedly been bribed in one manner shape or form by Iran.
It is time to remove him legally and peacefully before this nation experiences what Israel has just experienced, but even worse!
[**Please donate to Freedom Watch with tax deductible contributions to support having Biden legally incarcerated and removed NOW before it is too late.**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=21c33c8934&e=8edd2b8f7d)
Please listen to the embedded podcast of today about removing Biden and provide your generous support and prayers that this braindead criminal will be peacefully and legally removed from power before the same fate that Israeli citizens have experienced happens to your loves ones by leaving this dishonest and corrupt bribed loser in power to rule over this nation and the world.
**If you care about your children, grandchildren and loved ones and do not want to see them suffer the same fate at what just happened in Israel, please step up to the plate and support your Freedom Watch, the People’s Justice Department!**
[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=6dfa672736&e=8edd2b8f7d) Yours in Freedom and Liberty, Larry Klayman, Esq.Chairman and General Counsel Freedom Watch, Inc.[www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=d9bf6c82bb&e=8edd2b8f7d)[leklayman@gmail.com](mailto:leklayman@gmail.com) OR asher.andersonfw@gmail.com**P.S. name: Robert Garcia
subject: Not the news I wanted to share today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71578986/432560654/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjliYjc3YS1iYjZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL1a_38vAosM74BRAB6lOkcV0qLwyRHgfnyFScxWZ3E=)
Team -
My team just shared our latest fundraising numbers with me. Unfortunately, we are pacing significantly behind our October fundraising goal and have a lot of ground left to cover.
This is not the news I wanted to share with you today.
The truth is that we are quickly approaching the one-year mark from the 2024 election, and the stakes are rising. With so much on the line in 2024 — the presidency, the House, the Senate — we cannot afford to leave anything on the table.
And our fundraising goals are not arbitrary. Every dollar you donate will not only help to continue funding our movement for California families but will help us support Democrats across the country to take back the House majority — Democrats that are right here in our Golden State.
**[So I am asking: Will you please make a contribution, of $3 or anything you can afford, to my reelection campaign today? Your support will help me and other Democrats.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71578987/432560657/871887458?refcode2=8b9bb77a-bb6a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&refcode=em231014-1-t3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjliYjc3YS1iYjZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL1a_38vAosM74BRAB6lOkcV0qLwyRHgfnyFScxWZ3E=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71578988/432560658/871887458?refcode2=8b9bb77a-bb6a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&refcode=em231014-1-t3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjliYjc3YS1iYjZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CL1a_38vAosM74BRAB6lOkcV0qLwyRHgfnyFScxWZ3E=)**
Thank you. Your involvement in our movement is what keeps us going.
Robert

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: RE: We need to elect more leaders who will speak out for the human rights of all people, including Palestinians.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Any member of Congress who remains silent or beats the drums of war after
the Israeli government has called for the forced displacement of 1.1
million Palestinians in less than 24 hours is condoning the ethnic
cleansing of Palestinians in Gaza.

Blood is on the hands of the Biden administration and Congress if they
don't stop the Israeli government’s call for genocide.

→ Our incumbents in Congress are the only ones who are speaking out and
calling for a ceasefire to prevent further violence.

We need to elect more leaders who will speak out for the human rights of
all people, including Palestinians.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138951?refcode=em20231014-31320&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=31320%2E1203867%2EIh7A62 ]Peter, will
you donate right now to help us recruit and elect more Justice Democrats
like AOC and Ilhan who will speak out against human rights abuses — even
when politically unpopular.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138951?refcode=em20231014-31320&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31320%2E1203867%2EIh7A62 ]Contribute $3

Thank you for your solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=31320%2E1203867%2EIh7A62 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=31320%2E1203867%2EIh7A62 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231014-31320-footer&t=1023&refcode2=31320_1203867_Ih7A62&akid=31320%2E1203867%2EIh7A62

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=31320%2E1203867%2EIh7A62

Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

subject: If you knew...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#

Peter,

With a little over a year until the 2024 election, our campaign to elect George in CA-27 has never been busier. Here are three timely updates you need to know:
* **George is officially the Democratic frontrunner in this race.** His primary opponent has decided to conclude his campaign and endorsed our campaign. We’re in a head-to-head matchup against GOP Rep. Mike Garcia.

* **We have seen a surge of endorsements in the past several weeks.** Congressional leaders including former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Rep. Adam Schiff, and Rep. Eric Swalwell joined our movement. Local labor, environmental, and civic organizations are also standing with George.

* **But, we have also seen a surge of Republican attacks.** Kevin McCarthy’s super PAC has invested millions of dollars in toss-up districts like ours in California, not to mention the hit pieces published by Fox News.

**[With our momentum building, it’s critical that George knows he has hundreds of supporters (like you!) behind him. Here are three timely updates you need to know: George is officially the Democratic frontrunner in this race. His primary opponent has decided to conclude his campaign and endorsed our campaign. We’re in a head-to-head matchup against GOP Rep. Mike Garcia. We have seen a surge of endorsements in the past several weeks. Congressional leaders including former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Rep. Adam Schiff, and Rep. Eric Swalwell joined our movement. Local labor, environmental, and civic organizations are also standing with George. But, we have also seen a surge of Republican attacks. Kevin McCarthy’s super PAC has invested millions of dollars in toss-up districts like ours in California, not to mention the hit pieces published by Fox News. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Team George Whitesides =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

body:
We took at look at our records to find your personalized and updated supporter record for Q4, and here’s what we found:
#
Peter, these last few months have been a whirlwind for our progressive movement.
Pramila has spoken up against GOP bad actors who would rather revel in chaos than show up for their constituents. And she’s continued the fight for our progressive values through bold legislation and dedication to our vision of a stronger democracy for all.
**But Pramila’s work is far from over.** As we move into October, our team is closely looking to our finances, our supporters, and our movement’s plan for the future.
**We took at look at our records to find your personalized and updated supporter record for Q4, and here’s what we found:**
**_Peter's Q4 2023 Supporter Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2023 Donor?:** No — not yet! **2023 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $3** **[Donate »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46252?refcode=em20231014-3036&t=1&akid=3036%2E420207%2EwoKZuH)** _Our data isn’t perfect. If you’ve contributed using a different email address or via check, you may not see that amount reflected here. But please know that Pramila and our team are grateful for your support!_

**“The 2021 redraw brought Palm Springs' sizable LGBTQ population into Calvert’s safe Republican seat.** Democrats are excited about Will Rollins, the 2022 nominee who lost to Calvert by under 5 points last year, running again this year.”

**“The district is trending in Democrats' favor:** Trump won by a point under the current lines, and Rollins has posted impressive fundraising hauls so far.”

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Chaos in the House 🙄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hey Derek,
Have you seen the chaos going on in the House of Representatives!?
**[We'll explain everything, but first, if you're ready to chip in + power John's work in the Senate, you can click this link.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231014-1?refcode=em20231014-1-8619&refcode2=8619_434096_sOz4kB&akid=8619%2E434096%2EsOz4kB)**
First, the GOP kicked out the Speaker of the House -- but now, more than a week later, they still can't get their sh*t together and pick a new one...
Without a Speaker, they can't pass a budget to stop the government from shutting down (which we're on track to do in weeks), send Israel vital aid, or do pretty much *anything* 🙄
But do you know what John is doing while the House is in complete chaos? **He's still standing with workers.** He joined striking UAW workers on the picket line in PA earlier this week:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231014-1?refcode=em20231014-8619&refcode2=8619_434096_sOz4kB&akid=8619%2E434096%2EsOz4kB)
**While the GOP is fighting for attention among themselves, John is fighting for workers + people like us.** That's thanks to our people-powered movement that got him to the Senate in the first place.
**[Folks like you power the work that John does in DC-- so please, chip in whatever you can today to keep it up. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231014-1?refcode=em20231014-1-8619&refcode2=8619_434096_sOz4kB&akid=8619%2E434096%2EsOz4kB)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231014-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231014-8619&refcode2=8619_434096_sOz4kB&akid=8619%2E434096%2EsOz4kB)**
Thank you for everything, team.
💛 Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231014-8619-footer&t=1&refcode2=8619_434096_sOz4kB&akid=8619%2E434096%2EsOz4kB)**

subject: Handed $235 million to Palestine

body:
End Biden’s terror payouts
| Joe Biden handed $235 million to the Palestinians...
He handed $6 BILLION to the murderous regime in Iran...
And you know what happened next.
_**Israel is under brutal assault, and the Biden Administration is only to blame.**_

Peter,
Fall is one of the best times to get out in Arizona’s parks and enjoy all that our incredible state has to offer.
As a break from campaigning, I’ve been going for trail runs on the weekend with my husband. You can see pictures from a race in the beautiful Catalina State Park below!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_101423_PublicLands_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_101423_PublicLands_act] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_101423_PublicLands_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_101423_PublicLands_act]
When I was in Arizona’s legislature, I brought together folks from all backgrounds to work on water security and land issues.
In Congress, I’ll do the same. Arizona’s public lands are critical culturally, ecologically, and economically — and we must work together to preserve them for generations to come.
This race is one the best shots Democrats have at flipping a red seat blue. By donating now, you’ll be giving my campaign the resources we need to win next November. Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_101423_PublicLands_act]

‘He’s An Animal’: George Santos Gets Into Screaming Match With Jewish
Man Reportedly Critical Of Israel

Republican Rep. George Santos of New York got in a screaming match
with a man who criticized Israel in a congressional office building
Friday. Santos was in the Longworth House Office Building when he had
the exchange over Israel, according to NBC News reporter Sahil Kapur.
The man was taken into custody by Capitol Police, Semafor political
reporter Kadia Goba posted on X, formerly Twitter.

Peter Willis —

Abortion is on the ballot in Ohio, and early voting started this week.

Our Revolution has been organizing for months to make sure this measure passes, and abortion is constitutionally protected in the Buckeye State moving forward. We are in the homestretch and cannot afford to come up short. Can you chip in a few dollars to make sure we have the resources we need to make sure that our voters turn out? We all know the drill — after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, a small but loud group of deep-pocketed extremists took to the states, determined to gut abortion laws and women’s access to safe, affordable healthcare.

But the resistance has been real. Thanks to grassroots funding, armies of volunteers, and organizations like Our Revolution, we have a real shot at enshrining a woman’s right to abortion access in the Ohio constitution. Our staff and volunteers are having crucial one-on-one conversations with voters to make sure they understand what’s at stake and have a plan to vote, but voter outreach costs money.

Please rush a donation of $10 today to ensure that we are doing everything we can ahead of Election Day to make sure that Ohio women don’t have to face this fight again. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10252?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231014_fr_oh_0_2MO_ourrevolution_na_na_ohturnout&t=1018&akid=4792%2E5885482%2EhzkMJ2)

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Adam Schiff
subject: We just got a new Republican opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| We just got some breaking news, folks:

**A multimillionaire Republican celebrity just jumped into our top-two “jungle primary” in the U.S. Senate race.** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55077?t=6&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS) Steve Garvey was a first baseman for the Dodgers and Padres, and apparently he’s ready to take up the fight for everyone born on third base thinking they hit a triple. Go figure.

[If that’s all you need to hear, I’m personally asking you to split a donation of any amount between the Voter Protection Project and my Senate campaign to help us respond. Our new Republican opponent is sure to have big money behind him, and we need to be ready for the inevitable wave of attacks — because that’s not the only recent twist in this Senate race.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55077?t=7&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS)

Garvey appears to be taking a cue from another celebrity Republican with no political experience, Donald Trump. And given Trump’s determination to make sure I don’t become California’s Senator next year, I wouldn’t be surprised to see Trump and MAGA world get solidly behind Garvey. I will need your help to ensure Garvey and Trump feel the sting of losing on March 5, 2024.

And there’s one more wrinkle in this race: **I’m now running in _two_ concurrent elections — a special election for the remainder of the late Sen. Dianne Feinstein’s term, and a general election for a full Senate term.** Two elections happening on the _same ballot,_ on the _same day._ Twice.

With millions of Californians preparing to see my name on their ballot for the very first time, we’re going to have to invest a tremendous amount of resources to educate voters and meet them across the state.

[And it’s even more urgent with this news. Can you rush in a split donation of any amount between the Voter Protection Project and my Senate campaign to respond to the entry of our new opponent and help ensure we win this race?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55078?t=8&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55079?t=9&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55080?t=10&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55081?t=11&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55082?t=12&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/55077?t=13&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS)
There’s nothing Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party would like more than to see a celebrity Republican put another Senate seat in play. So let’s stop him, Trump and Steve Garvey in their tracks — today.

Thanks for your support,

Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=11227%2E878179%2Ep7LTzS)

name: Will Rollins
subject: anti-LGBTQ bigotry from Ken Calvert.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| Peter,

In case you missed this news, Ken Calvert voted to strike down over $3 million in earmarks for projects that would provide services to the LGBTQ+ community.

The projects Calvert voted against included funding for food assistance and housing for seniors.

This is just the latest example of Calvert’s pattern of bigotry towards the LGBTQ+ community. I had the chance to tell the Washington Blade about his fundamental misunderstanding of LGBTQ+ Americans, and why it’s more important than ever to expand our representation in Congress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71582338/432572521/1013293294?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20231014_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGIxNWMxMS1jODZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P9PjbVzeFxvu1MbRFOpj9wUmFiKxdjSxysFfZO8Hsgk=) With anti-LGBTQ+ sentiment rising across the country, Calvert and his far-right allies are now pulling the appropriations process into their culture war for cheap political points. It’s shameful, especially when you consider that our district includes Palm Springs.

The good news is that we don't just have a great chance to send Calvert packing, winning in CA-41 could flip the House and put extremists like him back into the minority.

clean_body: | Peter, In case you missed this news, Ken Calvert voted to strike down over $3 million in earmarks for projects that would provide services to the LGBTQ+ community. The projects Calvert voted against included funding for food assistance and housing for seniors. This is just the latest example of Calvert’s pattern of bigotry towards the LGBTQ+ community. I had the chance to tell the Washington Blade about his fundamental misunderstanding of LGBTQ+ Americans, and why it’s more important than ever to expand our representation in Congress. = With anti-LGBTQ+ sentiment rising across the country, Calvert and his far-right allies are now pulling the appropriations process into their culture war for cheap political points. It’s shameful, especially when you consider that our district includes Palm Springs. The good news is that we don't just have a great chance to send Calvert packing, winning in CA-41 could flip the House and put extremists like him back into the minority. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you for your support, Will Rollins | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/KD%20logo.jpg]
Help Save Pennridge PA's School System
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/106220/images/Screenshot%202023-10-12%20at%204.02.09%20PM.png]
Dear friend,
Pennridge's school system is at risk. Over the past year, Pennridge's school board has paid a consultant tens of thousands of dollars to craft an ultra-conservative curriculum. This curriculum throws objectivity away and pushes a culture war onto the children of Pennridge.
If this curriculum goes through, and this school board remains conservative, the education of thousands of children will be tainted. Furthermore, Pennridge's conservative school board nominees are being supported by the most extreme elements of the GOP.
With just a small donation here, you can help us support Pennridge's sensible and moderate school board candidates who place our children first and value quality education above all. Help us keep the culture war outside of Pennridge.
Best,
Kennedy Democrats

Why Chris Christie:
---
---
Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

body:

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71582564/432573357/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzM2Y2IyMi1jYTZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzVv9lwHb0LYG5SwoorvhEVzOQoei0uhgR_ixy6XJUU=&emci=bcd4599b-c96a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1c36cb22-ca6a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

If you’ve been paying any attention to Georgia politics over the last three years, you know just how important Georgia has become to national politics. [**_If you know just how important keeping Georgia blue next year will be, rush a donation right now._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71582565/432573358/710125701?refcode=20231014.1_KGB_10P&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzM2Y2IyMi1jYTZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzVv9lwHb0LYG5SwoorvhEVzOQoei0uhgR_ixy6XJUU=)

Georgia was a deciding factor in the 2020 presidential election, and even more importantly, when we elected Senators Rev. Warnock and Jon Ossoff in January 2021, we ensured Democrats would control both houses of Congress as well as the Presidency.

Because of Georgia, Joe Biden was able to appoint Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court. Because of Georgia, we passed the Inflation Reduction Act, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, the Respect for Marriage Act, and so much more!

**But our work is far from over.**

Next year, Georgia will be THE most important swing state in the country.

In 2024, Donald Trump will most likely be the GOP nominee again, and right now, polls show him neck-and-neck with Joe Biden. It’s very likely that the 2024 election will come down to a handful of states yet again: Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Michigan, Nevada, Arizona, and... _**Georgia.**_

[**_We need your help to keep Georgia blue in 2024. That’s why we’re launching a two-day donor drive, one year out from our Get Out the Vote effort. We need to keep Georgia blue, and that means talking with voters all across Georgia. Will you help fund our work and help us keep Georgia blue in 2024?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71582566/432573359/710125701?refcode=20231014.1_KGB_10P&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzM2Y2IyMi1jYTZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZzVv9lwHb0LYG5SwoorvhEVzOQoei0uhgR_ixy6XJUU=)

We have a LOT of work to do, and every day that goes by, we get closer and closer to a make-or-break election.

– GA Dems

name: Mississippi Conservatives
subject: We need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mississippi Republican Party
body:
| | | [](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=edc958bb72db4f7eaf603887a3f318af&_e=3Sj42Fvh-LScB4JX-nmsWufvnxm8hJaZT6iYft-8bLquwdKYkM35WSOcBTYYdK8Aw6R_iD5gpbZB6LQrYsD4bQA3X_DV2EdiuQfcLoOZpae94FfXALsj2hTt-zIZ5OP6y4PYWt2jJljfDWtRfHrykr4YomKQK6E4WwG2LAj-ksg3IlvrQhj62oIMFcURSgJBujO4GcvNBVsQ4M9ZYTLaZ_lb83v1pEsMYQRqYnlowncEyYWYgX6njzRJKm1XepIeWjKh5kxF5csxga5dLG71pFca82OeHVEFL2vHTadf73ApgI9vch-v7VPr_JR1EU7qLIPYP8XvpG41WvOZ8zGg3g%3D%3D)
---
**⚠️ URGENT MESSAGE ⚠️** Fellow conservative, The state of Mississippi has been a safe haven for conservative values for centuries but that could all change.

**We have gotten word that the Democrats are targeting Mississippi and think they have a real chance of turning it blue.**

They are dumping millions of dollars into our elections because they feel they have a chance.

Our number one goal has to be to outraise them every month, otherwise, they won’t stop coming after our state.

**Our mid-month fundraising deadline is right around the corner and we need every patriot in Mississippi to pitch in to defend our state.**

We wouldn’t be asking you unless it was absolutely necessary.

Hi, friend, it's Emily from Team Gillibrand. Did you see our email from the other day?

This is going to be a tough fight, so Kirsten needs to know where Americans stand — and _that's why our team specifically selected you to represent 43614 in our live poll._ But I took a look at our data this morning, and we never heard from you!

**NEW YORK TIMES:
_"Democrats Try a Novel Tactic to Revive the Equal Rights Amendment"_**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71583120/432575423/1608909574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4490-su-nd&refcode=jtk4490-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWQ1NjZmNS1jYzZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KDDZkBdRBTvzyHk43tOGiu0Dopo7NfbQ_He0hlKNrII=&emci=1e5fbec7-4265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=41d566f5-cc6a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
Friend, Kirsten Gillibrand is boldly leading the fight to finally enshrine equal rights in our Constitution and END gender-based discrimination. **But she needs to know whether you support this fight — _[_please respond before midnight:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71583121/432575424/1608909574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4490-su-nd&refcode=jtk4490-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWQ1NjZmNS1jYzZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KDDZkBdRBTvzyHk43tOGiu0Dopo7NfbQ_He0hlKNrII=&emci=1e5fbec7-4265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=41d566f5-cc6a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)_**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71583122/432575452/1608909574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4490-su-nd&refcode=jtk4490-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWQ1NjZmNS1jYzZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KDDZkBdRBTvzyHk43tOGiu0Dopo7NfbQ_He0hlKNrII=&emci=1e5fbec7-4265-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=41d566f5-cc6a-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
Friend, Kirsten has been on the front lines of the toughest fights in Washington since DAY ONE. She's been a fierce leader for gender equality, a tireless advocate for survivors of sexual harassment and a relentless fighter for family rights.
Now Kirsten is leading the fight for progress yet again: **She's announced a bold new strategy to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment after 100 years of tireless advocacy from some monumental female leaders!**
Right now, a single arbitrary deadline is the ONLY THING stopping the Equal Rights Amendment from being added to our Constitution. Kirsten's resolution would allow us to circumvent that deadline. And once the ERA is certified, it gives us a constitutional basis to accomplish so much of what we've spent decades fighting for:_ ending the __gender __pay gap, protecting marriage equality and even restoring reproductive rights nationwide._
**Like Kirsten said, we need the Equal Rights Amendment now more than ever. But Republicans are already scheming to block her resolution!** As Kirsten takes on this hugely important fight, she needs to know if grassroots people like you will have her back. **Please, will you respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to show Kirsten where YOU stand?**

While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: Did you see our email from the other day? Hi, friend, it's Emily from Team Gillibrand. Did you see our email from the other day? Kirsten is proudly leading the fight to codify the Equal Rights Amendment and enshrine gender equity in our Constitution. Her work on this issue is so critical, but GOP extremists are scheming to block her resolution! This is going to be a tough fight, so Kirsten needs to know where Americans stand — and that's why our team specifically selected you to represent 43614 in our live poll. But I took a look at our data this morning, and we never heard from you! I was able to get our data team to extend this survey deadline until midnight tonight to give you one final chance to participate — Do you support the Equal Rights Amendment? | | | | Thanks so much, Emily Graham Team Gillibrand \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Team Gillibrand Date: Wed, Oct 4, 2023 Subject: now more than ever | | | NEW YORK TIMES: "Democrats Try a Novel Tactic to Revive the Equal Rights Amendment" Friend, Kirsten Gillibrand is boldly leading the fight to finally enshrine equal rights in our Constitution and END gender-based discrimination. But she needs to know whether you support this fight — Friend, Kirsten has been on the front lines of the toughest fights in Washington since DAY ONE. She's been a fierce leader for gender equality, a tireless advocate for survivors of sexual harassment and a relentless fighter for family rights. Now Kirsten is leading the fight for progress yet again: She's announced a bold new strategy to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment after 100 years of tireless advocacy from some monumental female leaders! Right now, a single arbitrary deadline is the ONLY THING stopping the Equal Rights Amendment from being added to our Constitution. Kirsten's resolution would allow us to circumvent that deadline. And once the ERA is certified, it gives us a constitutional basis to accomplish so much of what we've spent decades fighting for: ending the gender pay gap, protecting marriage equality and even restoring reproductive rights nationwide. Like Kirsten said, we need the Equal Rights Amendment now more than ever. But Republicans are already scheming to block her resolution! As Kirsten takes on this hugely important fight, she needs to know if grassroots people like you will have her back. Please, will you respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to show Kirsten where YOU stand? Do you support the Equal Rights Amendment? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

body:

---

| | We build power at the local level because, for every horrendous headline like this, there's a candidate we're recruiting to run and change it.
[****](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71583287/432576033/-327605227?refcode=2023-10-14-split-chinua&amount=8&amounts=10%2C30%2C50%2C100%2C200&refcode2=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDAwMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAtMDAwMC0wMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImpvcmRhbkBtYW5kYXRlbWVkaWEuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yvjr0VdvCjh9UuFovjEoeG4ltPyjnjq26MppdDH3eBw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjAyYTAwOC1kMDZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-lRP4N2SgJ5awQfnyVEanAcdOuq8h2uUcguehgiwVo=) It's no fluke that far-right extremists are targeting school boards and public libraries – they have a radical agenda they're determined to push on the rest of us. But, Movement Labs is stepping up because we only end this madness by kicking them out of office and electing good people in their place. My job here at Movement Labs is ensuring we have the resources we need to recruit, fund, and support candidates fighting the good fight. We're spotlighting impactful leaders up and down the ballot to make sure they have everything they need to win. **Today, I'd like to introduce (or reintroduce!) Chinua Rhodes.** Chinua ran for Trustee of his local school district in 2020 and serves as President of the Sacramento City Unified School District Board of Education. **Because he stepped up to run and give a voice to his community, he now leads the same public schools he attended as a kid**. clean_body: Supporting leaders like Chinua can help save our public schools from fascism. | | | | We build power at the local level because, for every horrendous headline like this, there's a candidate we're recruiting to run and change it. = It's no fluke that far-right extremists are targeting school boards and public libraries – they have a radical agenda they're determined to push on the rest of us. But, Movement Labs is stepping up because we only end this madness by kicking them out of office and electing good people in their place. My job here at Movement Labs is ensuring we have the resources we need to recruit, fund, and support candidates fighting the good fight. We're spotlighting impactful leaders up and down the ballot to make sure they have everything they need to win. Today, I'd like to introduce (or reintroduce!) Chinua Rhodes. Chinua ran for Trustee of his local school district in 2020 and serves as President of the Sacramento City Unified School District Board of Education. Because he stepped up to run and give a voice to his community, he now leads the same public schools he attended as a kid. And he's part of the team developing budgets, shaping curriculum, and making sure kids from low-wage and housing-insecure families are supported and uplifted. = Chinua is running for Trustee again next year so he can keep fighting for students and young people in his hometown.= Students deserve the right to read and think freely – and we need leaders like Chinua serving on school boards to fight radical curriculum overhauls and keep library shelves stocked. With your help, we'll send him back to his seat on the Board of Education and elect many more candidates just like him to local office from Sacramento to Central Florida and everywhere in between. = Onward, Sarah Sarah Long Director of Development Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. clean_body: I’m coming up on my mid-month deadline in 1 day, and we’re still $3,592 short. | = | Peter, Do you have 10 seconds to spare? I’m coming up on my mid-month deadline in 1 day, and we’re still $3,592 short. My team and I are working overtime to defend this toss-up seat again, but Republicans are preparing to spend big to defeat me. They know flipping this seat is their only opportunity to maintain their narrow House majority. That’s why it’s absolutely imperative that we defend this seat from whatever MAGA puppet they want to replace me. = | = | = Thanks, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. | | | Peter,

Black women in politics are under attack.

Across the country, lawmakers, prosecutors, and judges are being burdened with an onslaught of racist and misogynistic attacks.

Right now, we’re seeing extremists like Trump, DeSantis, and Jim Jordan go after Black women like Fani Willis and Monique Worrell for _doing their job_ and going after those who break the law.

And in North Carolina, a state judicial commission is attempting to restrict the First Amendment rights of Supreme Court Justice Anita Earls for daring to point out the clear racial bias in the state judiciary.

| What sets us apart.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1319%2E35263%2ECMolJS)
Hi Peter, I wanted to touch base about where our fundraising stands now that we’ve officially entered the final quarter of the year. The average online donation to our campaign last month was $19.11. **That’s a number to be proud of, Peter.** Our average contribution tells a lot about the type of campaign Tammy’s running. It’s one built on the foundation of thousands of grassroots supporters, not on the backs of right-wing megamillionaire donors. Up against GOP self-funders who can outspend us through their own personal wealth alone, $19.11 might not seem like much. But every donation of $5, $10, or $19.11 makes an impact on our work to keep Wisconsin blue and hold onto the Democratic Senate majority. **[So, will you pitch in $19.11 to reelect Tammy and defend the Senate? | | Patriot,

---
Disloyal Republicans set a hard deadline to take me down in the GOP primary and install their own nominee who will be controlled like a puppet by the Deep State and globalist RINO special interest donors.

---
**That infamous deadline is now ONLY 10 DAYS FROM TODAY.**

---
While we are certainly stronger than ever before in the Republican primary, I will NEVER let my guard down during these final 10 days and be prepared for any attack the RINOs bring our way._
_
---
...And let’s also not forget that the Biden Administration has requested a court hearing to impose a GAG ORDER upon me this Monday.

---
In other words, I’m fighting a battle on TWO FRONTS.

---
But do not fear – as President, I handled multiple crises at a time every single day.
---
I was fending off threats from abroad, negotiating FAIR trade deals, maintaining world peace (such a beautiful thing), and cracking down on illegal immigration – all while I was keeping our economy free of inflation.
---
But the true secret to my success was none other than the support I received from the American people.
---
No matter what attack I faced as president or as a candidate for president, I always knew that millions and millions of patriots loyally had my back.
---
That’s why – during the 10 remaining days of the RINO plot against us – I’m turning to the people who have helped us withstand every attack so far: my grassroots donors like YOU.
---
While we may not be lined with special interest Super PAC money, we do have MILLIONS of grassroots donors giving even just $1 to SAVE AMERICA!
---
And when you add it all up, we have even TRIPLED the amount raised by these RINO sell-outs.
---
Now, let’s do it again!
---

clean_body: The plot is coming to its end... but we cannot let our guard down yet...| | | | | Patriot, Disloyal Republicans set a hard deadline to take me down in the GOP primary and install their own nominee who will be controlled like a puppet by the Deep State and globalist RINO special interest donors. That infamous deadline is now ONLY 10 DAYS FROM TODAY. While we are certainly stronger than ever before in the Republican primary, I will NEVER let my guard down during these final 10 days and be prepared for any attack the RINOs bring our way. ...And let’s also not forget that the Biden Administration has requested a court hearing to impose a GAG ORDER upon me this Monday. In other words, I’m fighting a battle on TWO FRONTS. But do not fear – as President, I handled multiple crises at a time every single day. I was fending off threats from abroad, negotiating FAIR trade deals, maintaining world peace (such a beautiful thing), and cracking down on illegal immigration – all while I was keeping our economy free of inflation. But the true secret to my success was none other than the support I received from the American people. No matter what attack I faced as president or as a candidate for president, I always knew that millions and millions of patriots loyally had my back. That’s why – during the 10 remaining days of the RINO plot against us – I’m turning to the people who have helped us withstand every attack so far: my grassroots donors like YOU. While we may not be lined with special interest Super PAC money, we do have MILLIONS of grassroots donors giving even just $1 to SAVE AMERICA! And when you add it all up, we have even TRIPLED the amount raised by these RINO sell-outs. Now, let’s do it again! Thank you, Donald J. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: We cannot lose sight of the humanity in each other.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Our government must lead with compassion for all civilians. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvJajTZx0mJsYA07wl2N-m-cE-nvpsM8SZ5J8BeXscilLehgyrkmj_DHzR73u9PIzg9PJLz7kbwf4B-akSyDH_nI0mak2EA2wCgGolLRVaemzNPYMQbJin2uurWLyHBmQZQugrUkT1MX9aNp-FEL9zBuzWiSVQVQlm5xkJOlbqS3qKByLzWAD65eByXgtfixW2NHPKIQP5bckEtEF1yEncog/40f/Ykg3-MlCTGye0aP7bgdVMw/h0/b0jvpGC1pohalUT8W-QgVg3Ex9BnBPsbASS4-JmYWY4)
---
Friend, I am overwhelmed with grief and want to save as many lives as possible, no matter their faith or ethnicity. This is why I am calling for immediate de-escalation and ceasefire to save countless civilian lives. Our government must lead with compassion for all civilians. I believe in my heart that the majority of Americans want the killing and violence to stop. War crimes cannot be answered with war crimes. Being the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, my voice and lived experience is needed now more than ever. However, the political establishment and right-wing media are making false accusations that are painful. It is wrong to equate love and decency for Palestinians as being hateful or antisemitic. But I won't be silenced while millions of people in Gaza—half of them children—have been given an impossible 24-hour evacuation order, but have nowhere to go. They have been cut off from electricity, food, and water for days. Hospitals are running out of electricity to keep babies and the injured alive. These are violations of international law. The collective punishment of Palestinian civilians is a war crime, the confirmed use of white phosphorus bombs (which burn skin down to the bone) in Gaza is a war crime, yet there are no statements demanding these violations stop from the American political establishment. It is heartbreaking to witness the horrific blanket disregard for saving civilians—including Americans—in Gaza. Statements from American politicians—including the President—have ignored and dehumanized Palestinians and will have devastating consequences, as civilians face brutal air strikes and the imminent threat of a ground invasion of Gaza that would intensify this humanitarian crisis. American Muslims and Arab Americans do not feel represented by our government right now. Many families in the U.S. seeking help to get their loved ones out of Gaza feel that Secretary Blinken is not making their safety a priority. The Biden administration is failing in its duty to protect all civilian and American lives in Gaza. I cannot believe I have to beg my country to value every human life, no matter their faith or ethnicity. We cannot lose sight of the humanity in each other. I also wanted to share with you my statement from earlier this week, calling for an end to the cycle of violence and for us to recognize our shared humanity: I will keep pushing for a just future where Israelis and Palestinians can live in peace, without fear and with true freedom, equal rights, and human dignity. [**At this time of urgent need, I hope you’ll consider making a donation to the nonprofit organization Anera (American Near East Refugee Aid), which is on the ground right now in Gaza providing humanitarian aid, food, and resources to displaced people and families. Click here to donate now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTF2EU05UmrXqtK9UKWroy2wnP7yDnd3U8d5gNJcpGOfIoMt-Vj0cnzGTHhRI2tuuCjazA04617xIoLbWBAvz2lzieey3GnnVirWOYx02a4dVT9unjuLmbHC2hlr9EDivJdefSYREKGeE-1O6EKXlwp4C5UCV9UA4ZjL3a_lSdcECf1zRXl43DZ5wH9pp0C3e8uIUyX5BHcx4DONd6dtTdVjitFGpEwZCL_lagbhy25OtlufPv36WYLTko1duPlaRGduxKu7h8aXJ9RdaIUMNSc2FwLdQiw28tUUCDr1OtxlSgkikDTRpukCnYU5k582Gto_YTBvyAC9O3ntjUbGIfuhJsZDS_IzkJfWk5-gUVIHcMhgYYwIvrhRqTCk65M2gq1z4-BrMlhYqw0_hMWwArnnaD4LNr98DuY8dqt5goy-4oMv4fO_H9CrlGk6bpGScj774L1Eku__uy0EOh5XqXsR51wEwBIMOkrgh4uCbtrYE/40f/Ykg3-MlCTGye0aP7bgdVMw/h1/K2s-qGjnOltBUBAkJSE5rWhZNGarxg-EabsvlVku_gk) **** | [DONATE TO ANERA](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTF2EU05UmrXqtK9UKWroy2wnP7yDnd3U8d5gNJcpGOfIoMt-Vj0cnzGTHhRI2tuuCjazA04617xIoLbWBAvz2lzieey3GnnVirWOYx02a4dVT9unjuLmbHC2hlr9EDivJdefSYREKGeE-1O6EKXlwp4C5UCV9UA4ZjL3a_lSdcECf1zRXl43DZ5wH9pp0C3e8lAPx8U-kWLk8lHMAlH-8eLDXtCfe4f3ThtFn3CFJ-OL-fVw-kd-FFWs-cRCpjHML8yrnO18N9cKQIG3Wc_7SO_XOJGcJeT1z5inMLXXCuV6Cd_pxXlXwhcDp2a8-Fyn6tzwJeaWt4zL40nBoYE1DbD58cX9XgR9AOrJMlcMqKuGsxwX9Im6fIx5L0rd5LJeCmnLMzRYL21I7FTW894zBRqT0rz35qR8DysEBHTTMDV2FB4UdEFYMqFmJurJinPLkI7ZjNcZKOknnMyfC4ZuLHbGmbioFGGovbCtluQYB1vN/40f/Ykg3-MlCTGye0aP7bgdVMw/h2/PM3nkmvMmUvvxjkMOtDihVukSi2WlveUPVIOO_qKdlU)

Peter, we are reaching out to you, because we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $10,000 online by our mid-month deadline.

**[Here’s 3 reasons to give $3 to help us win in CO-08:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71584027/432578625/537837852?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2023.10.14_b1_chq_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWQxNGRiZC1kNjZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pGlZZkqBSDUvnBLy9rcoNw2kpq9YHFLgU4wlWKVBdi0=)**
1. Top pollsters are naming **Yadira Caraveo one of the most vulnerable Democrats** in the country. If we want to flip the House, we need to defend Yadira’s seat with everything we’ve got.

2. **Anti-abortion extremists have jumped in the race against Yadira.** Now that we have challengers in this race, we need to be on high alert to make sure we can expose their agenda and elevate Yadira’s good work in Congress.

3. **National Republicans are already running ads in Colorado because they think they can expand their House majority by flipping CO-08 red.** An onslaught of far-right money could completely change the dynamics of this race, so __we need an immediate infusion of funding!__

We defied the odds and won this race by just 1,632 votes, in 2022. We can win again in 2024, but we have to run the perfect campaign to stay competitive, reelect Yadira, and flip the House.

**That’s where you come in.** **[$3 may not seem like much](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71584028/432578626/537837852?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2023.10.14_b1_chq_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWQxNGRiZC1kNjZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pGlZZkqBSDUvnBLy9rcoNw2kpq9YHFLgU4wlWKVBdi0=)** , but there is strength in numbers, Peter. If we see a huge response from this email, we’ll be in a better position to meet our fundraising goals and win next November.

**[So Peter, can we count on you to pitch in just $3 or whatever makes sense to win reelection in 2024? We can’t beat these Republicans without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71584029/432578627/537837852?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2023.10.14_b1_chq_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWQxNGRiZC1kNjZhLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pGlZZkqBSDUvnBLy9rcoNw2kpq9YHFLgU4wlWKVBdi0=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, we are reaching out to you, because we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $10,000 online by our mid-month deadline. = 1. Top pollsters are naming Yadira Caraveo one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the country. If we want to flip the House, we need to defend Yadira’s seat with everything we’ve got. 2. Anti-abortion extremists have jumped in the race against Yadira. Now that we have challengers in this race, we need to be on high alert to make sure we can expose their agenda and elevate Yadira’s good work in Congress. 3. National Republicans are already running ads in Colorado because they think they can expand their House majority by flipping CO-08 red. An onslaught of far-right money could completely change the dynamics of this race, so we need an immediate infusion of funding! We defied the odds and won this race by just 1,632 votes, in 2022. We can win again in 2024, but we have to run the perfect campaign to stay competitive, reelect Yadira, and flip the House. That’s where you come in. = , but there is strength in numbers, Peter. If we see a huge response from this email, we’ll be in a better position to meet our fundraising goals and win next November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=******** Thank you, Caraveo HQ | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Thanks to supporters like you, the NDRC has achieved big things in the fight for fair maps.
✅ Ahead of the 2022 election, we helped secure the fairest congressional maps in a generation, according to the _New York Times_ and others.

✅ We worked to defeat dangerous election deniers in states like Arizona, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin.

✅ We helped elect hundreds of Democracy Defenders at the state level across the country. According to _FiveThirtyEight_ , “for the first time in years, more Americans will live in a state fully controlled by Democrats than in one fully controlled by Republicans.”
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71584056/432578658/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231014_FR_10N_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4ZDE0ZGJkLWQ2NmEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bGgcfHoiq8po8y9ME4kVQcfD3U9cYYLGIiDZixg7K-s=)

A.G. Holder is right. Across the country, there’s still much more to be done in the fight for fairness – and that means our work is as urgent as ever.
🚨 **In just a few short weeks** , Virginia will hold elections that will determine the future of abortion rights, voting rights, and more. The NDRC has endorsed 99 Democracy Defenders to help protect our progress and defeat the extreme MAGA agenda.

🚨 Before the next federal election, **over a dozen congressional districts** could be redrawn – more than enough to determine control of the House. The NDRC is fighting across the country to ensure a fair process.
[**_The NDRC’s work over the next few weeks and months will have a direct impact on the future of our democracy – and our success or failure depends on the support of our grassroots team. Can we count on you to pitch in now?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71584057/432578659/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231014_FR_10N_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4ZDE0ZGJkLWQ2NmEtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bGgcfHoiq8po8y9ME4kVQcfD3U9cYYLGIiDZixg7K-s=)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell (via RBG)
subject: you shouldn’t be able to buy your way to Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| [ ](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/117?t=1&akid=2030%2E564421%2ER9_hoH)
---
Friend,

Grassroots supporters like you are the lifeblood of this campaign. Your input guides our strategy, your support builds our momentum, and your donations make everything that we do possible.

**I 'm proud to run a truly people-powered campaign. But that's not the kind of campaign we're up against. **

I'm running against one of the richest Senators in Washington -- a guy who spent _$64 MILLION of his own fortune_ to buy this Senate seat last time around. That's not even counting all the millions that he raised from far-right megadonors.

You shouldn't be able to buy your way to Washington. **But that 's exactly what Rick Scott did -- and he's trying to pull the same stunt in 2024.** Last year, he gave his campaign $4 MILLION to boost his end-of-quarter fundraising.

At the end of the day, this isn't really about fundraising numbers or big checks. It's about Rick Scott absolutely failing the Floridians he swore to protect: He wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security, pushed Trump's election conspiracy theories, and advocated for a nationwide ban on abortions.

I'm running for Senate to give Floridians the leadership they deserve -- and putting up big fundraising numbers is how we're going to do it. **That 's why I've set a big $350,000 goal to make sure we have the resources we need to win this race.** [**Please, will you split $3 between my campaign and RonBeGone to invest in this grassroots movement and flip Florida blue? I’m counting on your help to compete with Scott’s massive fortune. »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/23056?t=8&akid=2030%2E564421%2ER9_hoH) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ron Be Gone and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/23062?t=14&akid=2030%2E564421%2ER9_hoH)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/23064?t=16&akid=2030%2E564421%2ER9_hoH)
Thank you so much,

Debbie

(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

subject: We’ll get right to the point.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We know you’re busy. We know you get a lot of emails.
#

Peter:
We know you’re busy.
We know you get a lot of emails.
So we will get right to the point.
Ruben Gallego’s mid-month deadline hits at midnight tomorrow. Kari Lake just announced her campaign this week. Besides our launch, that was the most important day of the campaign. That is the day this became a real race, a real campaign, with real, serious stakes.
[**And to win — to beat Kari Lake — we need you to chip in $3. This will be one of the most expensive, one of the hardest fought, and one of the closest races in the country. To win, we need you to have Ruben’s back. So please, make that donation today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231014-2&t=1&akid=1331%2E734936%2EVzwUeA)

Help us take this campaign all the way to victory, Peter.
Thank you.
Team Gallego

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: STOP corporate overfishing from wiping out Chinook salmon
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2050991?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: The last 75 Southern Resident orcas are in critical DANGER of going EXTINCT. [Sign the petition now >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2050992?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** **FIRST →** we lost the beloved matriarch,**__Marina_._** **SHORTLY AFTER →** her playful pod member,**__Cappuccino,__ was also presumed dead.** **AND THEN →** the deceased body of a juvenile male believed to be that of young __**Ripple**__ was found entangled in crab gear off the coast in Oregon. **NOW →** the remaining precious orcas in this pod are _**_struggling to survive_**_ due to climate change, ocean pollution, vessel disturbance, and lack of food. The **increase in commercial fishing** by large, profit-driven corporations has led to a drastic decline in Chinook salmon in the Pacific Northwest. Without this vital food source, Southern Resident orcas are suffering from _**major stress, malnutrition, and starvation.**_ Friend, unless we take steps to replenish the Chinook salmon population _**_immediately,_**_ these endangered whales won't stand a chance. We're demanding bold action from the National Marine Fisheries Service to STOP overfishing and bycatch from driving orcas to _**EXTINCTION.**_ [_**Will you step up right now to help SAVE these iconic orcas from being WIPED OUT forever?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2050993?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2050994?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The Pacific Northwest waters were once abundantly flowing with food supply for orcas. But industrial overfishing by greedy corporations has contributed to the extinction of **159** Chinook salmon populations -- that's almost HALF of the historic salmon runs!
Meanwhile, the Southern Resident killer whale population is at its _**LOWEST**_ point since the 1970s. The threats to orcas have gotten so severe that scientists predict that these iconic marine animals could be **_EXTINCT_ within the _next few decades._**
At this very moment, while you're reading this email, Southern Resident orcas are _**CLINGING TO SURVIVAL.**_ _**Hungry, weak, and desperate for food,**_ these iconic whales are counting on environmentalists like you to be their voice, Friend. [_**Please don't let these orcas down, Friend. Take action NOW before it's too late >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2050995?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2050996?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

body:
| Since launching this campaign for Senate, Adam has been crisscrossing California to share his message. There’s still a lot of ground to cover in these next few weeks, but that will take *even more* resources.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4239%2E5257348%2EKmx4kW)
Derek —
We are officially 14 days into the new FEC quarter — and just 1 day away from our first mid-month deadline.
Since launching this campaign for Senate, Adam has been crisscrossing California to share his message. There’s still a lot of ground to cover in these next few weeks, but that will take *even more* resources.
**[Will you pitch in $14 to help us kick off this new FEC quarter? Adam doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so your gift will power our work to send Adam to the Senate.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2905?c0=oct2023_abs_em.NXXjvz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231014_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4239%2E5257348%2EKmx4kW)**
| [DONATE $14](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2905?c0=oct2023_abs_em.NXXjvz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231014_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4239%2E5257348%2EKmx4kW)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2927?c0=oct2023_abs_em.0IpdPD&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231014_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4239%2E5257348%2EKmx4kW)
---
“Governing” by inaction is easy — just take a look at what’s happening with the GOP House majority right now.
It’s a lot harder to get things done.
Unlike other politicians, Adam isn’t afraid to take on the tough fights.
Adam brought together Democrats and Republicans to expand health care access for millions of Americans.
Adam fought to bring back millions to his district for affordable housing and to help get people off the street.
And when the President of the United States sought foreign interference in our elections, Adam exposed his efforts. And Adam successfully secured the first bipartisan vote ever to convict a sitting president — Donald Trump.
But there’s still more to be done.
Adam is ready to take these fights to the Senate. To defend our democracy. To build an economy that works for everyone. **To elect leaders who give a damn about the future we’re leaving to our children and grandchildren. Are you in, Derek?**
**[We’re working to earn every vote across California. Pitch in $14 or more now so we can share Adam’s message from today through Election Day.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2905?c0=oct2023_abs_em.NXXjvz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231014_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4239%2E5257348%2EKmx4kW)**

name: Mark Meckler, Convention of States Action
subject: Border materials are baking in the desert
body:
| | |
---
Friend, Here’s the latest shocker: There are 20,822 border wall panels currently sitting in storage.
That’s no exaggeration.
On Biden's first day in office, his administration suspended wall construction at the southern border. The government suddenly abandoned everything, including contractors AND materials that the previous administration had organized.
Instead of assembling millions of dollars of supplies along the border, the **Department of Defense is paying a whopping $160,000 per month** to store over 20,000 panels, fiber optic cables, and lighting.
This waste must be _stopped_. Our border must be _secured_. American taxpayers must be _represented_. **[Friend, I’m asking you to please, right this second, simply sign the National Petition for an Article V convention to save America.](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckb1u3DAQhJ-G6nSQlvpjocK2rDRJ48Jw3BAUuafjgX8gqRyUpw90OQSBGxbDwe58s8IGo8_7SPpnAnDRKhEAQp8IwPr-67q9we8fudzfpo_y9Wq_V8cvvBCAvAf8Z31MOaEV2hxqPxVqXNpBdqzAse5YTwFaCsVl7OQwVKpRSM8D7RZ2hhqBMdWobmB1uxR6hApoXdUNAAwNO7G6Z23bVaIWA6hhIU1ld2ExailcEDlqn08-roUZLzmHdM80E5ilTye3SYNbCmLFdJLeEpiNcEq7lcC8-KgwljdhTHkTKWMJhM5bttyi0psldHogdYeY_BYlEjr9V42Thj_wHy4pbBB6dYROB0bVlsfDpU_c6JR5RJeF4UsUTnGHNy592PkStXBO8LQtV5SZA7ci8IgJneIRvZRbjPfUf5d4l9FlQicnTRnoy_Prz_P705VAx53RitDpi3i_LZ3c_vlx-UY_bRFHFW7aGJ26njTVeoAeDf0JAAD__xIhrS0)**

**This is a red alert,** team: The _ultra_ -conservative Supreme Court majority that overturned _Roe v. Wade_ is proving that NOTHING is safe -- including vital programs like Social Security.

**The Court just heard a case that experts say could _"threaten to end"_ Social Security, jeopardizing key benefits for ** **_65 million people._ ** We simply _cannot_ let the Supreme Court attack this **bedrock** of Americans' retirement, so we need to take action -- _right now._

We’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that the American people support Social Security. But with just hours left until the midnight deadline, **_we still need 42 more responses from Pennsylvania!_**

**Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/15936?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231014-BREAKING-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231014-BREAKING-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF3-Pros-sl1&akid=12254%2E9716520%2Evt0Swq)

body:
She is a leader, an inspiration, and a true visionary and she needs our help today.

Friends —
My friend, Lateefah Simon, is running for Congress in California's 12th Congressional District.
She is a leader, an inspiration, a true visionary and she needs our help today.
Some of you already know Lateefah through her lifetime of work in California. If that's you, and you're ready to help make sure she gets to Congress where she will do amazing things — not just for our state, but for the entire country — please use this link to contribute directly to her campaign:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/Lateefah-Simon**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-simon?refcode=em231014-1-B-N&refcode2=1614_4767699_hIE8Gu&akid=1614%2E4767699%2EhIE8Gu)
Otherwise, meet Lateefah Simon:
At just 19 years old, a year after giving birth to her eldest daughter, Lateefah became the Executive Director of the Young Women's Freedom Center.
Years later, in recognition of that work and her success, she became the youngest woman to receive a MacArthur "Genius" Fellowship.
Lateefah was later selected by then-San Francisco District Attorney Kamala Harris to lead the creation of "Back on Track," an anti-recidivism program for young adults with low-level offenses.
In 2020, I appointed her as a senior advisor on police reform in our state.
Her list of accomplishments and awards is long and well-deserved. But what is most important here is how proud you'll be of her in Congress... if she can get elected.
So now, after a lifetime of helping others, Lateefah needs OUR help — so she can serve once again on the national stage. So I am asking:
[**Can you please help Lateefah Simon's campaign for Congress in California by contributing $3 directly to her campaign today? It will all add up if we are all chipping-in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-simon?refcode=em231014-1-B-N&refcode2=1614_4767699_hIE8Gu&akid=1614%2E4767699%2EhIE8Gu)
Thank you in advance for this donation to Lateefah's campaign. It will go a long way to help her, but it means a lot to me personally, as well.
Gavin Newsom

subject: Youngkin is wooing GOP megadonors...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
The GOP has funneled millions into Virginia to flip the Senate and defend their House majority. Just last week, Youngkin’s PAC announced it raised a staggering $4.4 million in just 48 hours. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Do you know what’s happening next week?** Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin is hosting a **retreat for GOP megadonors** in the hopes of wringing their wallets ahead of Virginia’s all-important elections next month. **He’s pulling out all the stops to woo these high-dollar donors** – _including a stay in a historic Roaring ‘20s hotel, opulent fine dining, and face time with Youngkin himself._ The GOP has funneled millions into Virginia to flip the Senate and defend their House majority. Just last week, Youngkin’s PAC announced it raised a staggering **_$4.4 million in just 48 hours,_** and this retreat could raise another record-breaking sum. [Will you chip in $7 ahead of Gov. Youngkin’s megadonor retreat to help combat Republican spending and elect state Democrats nationwide? name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: A real message Josh Hawley sent his top donors last month…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Josh Hawley is panicking, Peter.
**Just read what he recently told his top donors in a message about his race against Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat:**
**_“Missouri could be one of the closest Senate races in America._**
**_In fact, control of the Senate could come down to us.”_**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38578?refcode=em20231014-3985&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3985%2E614464%2EBPJPyH)**
**Josh Hawley is the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election in 2024, and he knows it** — as does every corporate mega-donor backing him.
**FIRST:** After Lucas outraised Hawley over the first six months of this year, a handful of GOP insiders and mega-donors launched a new Super PAC with more than a million dollars to spend propping up Hawley’s flailing campaign and tearing Lucas down.
**THEN:** A report from _Morning Consult_ showed that Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any Republican U.S. Senator up for re-election this cycle — even worse than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida.
**AND NOW:** New polling shows Hawley in a DEAD HEAT with Lucas more than a year out from Election Day, with 12% of voters still undecided!
**We have a real opportunity to defeat Josh Hawley, elect Lucas Kunce, and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year, but it’s not going to be easy —[and we need your help to get it done.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38578?refcode=em20231014-3985&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3985%2E614464%2EBPJPyH)**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38578?refcode=em20231014-3985&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3985%2E614464%2EBPJPyH)**
One of the only ways we’ll be able to continue growing this movement and closing the gap in this neck-and-neck race is with support from everyday people just like you.
Lucas isn’t taking any money from shady insiders or corporate mega-donors — he’s relied on real people to power this movement forward since Day One. But if we’re going to win this race, we need to have the resources to both combat the GOP’s desperate attacks AND reach voters with Lucas’ positive vision for Missouri. **So we’re coming directly to you, Peter:**
**[Will you please rush a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford toward our mid-month goal today? Our best shot at electing Lucas, defeating Josh Hawley, and flipping this seat is keeping up our record-breaking momentum — and we can’t do it without your support.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38578?refcode=em20231014-3985&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3985%2E614464%2EBPJPyH)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38579?refcode=em20231014-3985&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=3985%2E614464%2EBPJPyH) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38579?refcode=em20231014-3985&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=3985%2E614464%2EBPJPyH) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38579?refcode=em20231014-3985&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=3985%2E614464%2EBPJPyH) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38579?refcode=em20231014-3985&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=3985%2E614464%2EBPJPyH) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38579?refcode=em20231014-3985&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=3985%2E614464%2EBPJPyH) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38579?refcode=em20231014-3985&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=3985%2E614464%2EBPJPyH) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38578?refcode=em20231014-3985&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=3985%2E614464%2EBPJPyH)

Thank you so much, Peter.
— Team Lucas Kunce

body:
I really need your response | Fellow American – Chuck Grassley here.

I’m reaching out because one of our most crucial **constitutional rights is under assault from the radical Left: The Second Amendment.**

Left-wing politicians have openly stated they want to TAKE GUNS AWAY from law-abiding citizens. One of Joe Biden’s Democratic Governors is doing just that. [**She issued an “emergency” public health declaration to SUSPEND individuals’ rights to carry and bear arms.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b5a7824270c249efb748ee7c9649b019&_e=hW8q0OXnORIWU8n_zW_6_npYBs1BvW-5E3JAXChhGdHuudUtMVZxyemMmnqOvYVt0F97zLTf53bXTPoVRF1WeLnq0faU9aZWX6BDJe9kCCyRc_m2dwVejl5nSfAoxM_UFZAiDrlhraxQklWhVGNUU736FGUr7_HSERoT-AHCWMJPqjP0n0y49WZXEpNwL83ItpId6fEIUFmvVXiIclQtaEDRJd0toXMbLztZtlgw37_zN3PFfXuJdJpXuGao7yW67mwu02nggW1yITNqmQILM4YKw84ATKjrz9UPdluv9P_ZRXLXfjSKLGQkFPo-JMiZOd9fv6KSkB3JaPcpU-5wizHjmIMwPPReEIcbluEIpDpWkXORPHIw8pBOtwsANvIDpTSLWYQOJbfZti9nIH92VvzdmpOBb_GFO7l6hQUQC7OY2dNpdKFm3XHJ1Onczh834xNlooDJty01S-dSeZ3r_A%3D%3D)

[**Please take the CRUCIAL Second Amendment Questionnaire As Soon As Possible. >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b5a7824270c249efb748ee7c9649b019&_e=hW8q0OXnORIWU8n_zW_6_npYBs1BvW-5E3JAXChhGdHuudUtMVZxyemMmnqOvYVt0F97zLTf53bXTPoVRF1WeLnq0faU9aZWX6BDJe9kCCyRc_m2dwVejl5nSfAoxM_UFZAiDrlhraxQklWhVGNUU736FGUr7_HSERoT-AHCWMJPqjP0n0y49WZXEpNwL83ItpId6fEIUFmvVXiIclQtaEDRJd0toXMbLztZtlgw37_zN3PFfXuJdJpXuGao7yW67mwu02nggW1yITNqmQILM4YKw84ATKjrz9UPdluv9P_ZRXLXfjSKLGQkFPo-JMiZSF-0L8U2NPDBwzfCmgvNvml5b59VHqxN3TAaNRaGHNb-VVlNkID1E8MiZAKfHu_J1k5LbZ80gJb9I6pB8Xd6Pm8pqSC6O3gvDIfDuAFSco07k3OPwEnbVQeRxHLRnVJ9rpl0N_6jxA7S8s8oExqafg%3D%3D)

clean_body: I really need your response | Fellow American – Chuck Grassley here. I’m reaching out because one of our most crucial constitutional rights is under assault from the radical Left: The Second Amendment. Left-wing politicians have openly stated they want to TAKE GUNS AWAY from law-abiding citizens. One of Joe Biden’s Democratic Governors is doing just that. Our Second Amendment Rights are not up for grabs, and I’m reaching out because we desperately need help from dedicated Americans like you to PROTECT our constitutional right to keep and bear arms. Will you take a few minutes and complete my quick It’s crucial I receive your response as soon as possible with our gun rights under direct assault from Left-wing Governors.
